user_reviews: Ordered veg fried rice, chicken tandoori and kadai chickem, instead of tandoori chicken we got lolypop. All the food were very below average.
Authentic punjabi food, perfect location, Quick service , had tried punjabi Paneer (special) ,Dal makhni, parathe. Would definitely visit this place again to try other foods.

A nice place to eat in the dark alleys of Yelanahalli. You might have to find this place putting a little extra effort as it is located at 1st floor in a alley don't go for the ambience as it is mainly for ordering food. But all that and more is compensated in food quality, quantity and price. One of the best north Indian food in Bangalore which is more than affordable in price. Definitely worth a try if you are in the area. Must haves- Butter Chicken, Punjabi Chicken(in house speciality), Chicken tikka masala, tandoori chicken, butter garlic naan, laccha paratha(personal favourite) and Lassi For the veg lovers in the house you can order these dishes in paneer variant equally good. P.s.-- Do try their out of the world Tawa Parathas.
address: Shop 9, 1st Floor, SBI Building, New DLF New Town, Opposite Ample Mart, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: No doubt this place serves good food if you dine in. Irrespective of the small cozy place cus of which they delay the servings serving but its worth it.  However, my saddest experience with them was on deliveries.. they serve give you 1/3rd of the protion of the dish you order charging full amount. Which I found is ridiculous and frustrating. How can one dish which 3 ppl can share if you dine in, becomes for 1 when its home delivery? Strange but true.  Enjoy!

The name appeared quite eye-catching when i saw this on list. so we ordered combo thali of rice (enough for 1 person standard),dal(50-60 ml),roti(4),2 sabji, onion salad and raita. Taste was fine ,but i could not enjoy the taste longer as the quantity was too low. i have had from quite a lot of restaurants from this area ,i guess they totally forgot the minimum quantity required for a meal. meal had bhindi masala which had just 2 pieces of bhindi(2 cms each). baigan (brinjal) fry was another sabji . the quantity was as if provided only to taste once ?. I literally struggled to finish the food which was enough only to finish 2-3 rotis. and the quantity of dal ( see in image) ,i dont have to explain.  Quantity: 2/5 taste:3.5/5 packaging: 3/5 please dont use staplers to pack
address: 7/3, 19th Cross, 7th Main Rd, Pushpa Layout, NS Palya, BTM 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: If you can visit and eat, then do so rather than ordering as it limits the quantity of food in the process. food is very good and so is the price.,
Good taste .... especially for those who r staying in hostels...comes in Ur budget....chicken quantity is also too good.....One thali is enough for an average man....

We went on Monday morning there I was craving for punjabi dhaba style food that day we actually wanted to go to gyani da dhaba but it was close because of some renovation work so we opted for this frankly it is just very ordinary Paratha place. Very few food options are available, service is quite fast and pocket friendly but I din find great spicy taste ?

Tried two times  the food taste is good first time got sweet dish the other time no sweet Is it on their own Menu or availability? The overall food quality is good truly homemade food at a reasonable price.
awesome food
address: 324, 23rd Main, 3rd Cross, 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: Worst experience .. found 2 stone piece and stale chicken. This was my second order on basis of above average food in 1st order. But Now I won't be ordering again from Box8. Being less tasty, more oily/spicy food is OK but unhygienic and stale food is not at all OK
address: Shbari Complex, Arakere Mico Layout, Govinda Reddy Layout, Off B G Road, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Well, I never had a chance to visit the place. But these guys are surely working out some recipe seriously! I just love the food they serve. It has been, I guess 2 weeks straight, I have been ordering from them. Food feels home. Even though I always opted for a delivery, I was never disappointed with their serving and delivery. The food is really hot when delivered and its a bliss to get food served hot mode being delivery.... Just awesome! Keep it up! Cheers!  #happystomach..
The owner is very friendly and cooperative. The food very homely. It's extremely tasty. Price is very affordable. Everything in the menu is good. A must visit.

Soo after a tiring day, I decided to try out their food. I had ordered for a Make your own meal which comprised Dal, Vegetable curry and 4 chapatis.  First things first, I really did not like their dal. It was runny and had no salt to it at all. I kept on looking for dal throughout my meal. Next up, the vegetable curry was also not upto the mark. Full of carrots and caulifower. Rotis were soft but somehow I couldn't just gulp it as the gravies were not good. I feel that there is a lot of improvement required in the quality of their food.

Probably it is just me but the egg curry was too bland. I understand if you wanted to make it homely and without oil but it tasted weird. I'm not saying it's bad in the sense unhealthy but it's too bland for my taste. It's like food with absolutely no oil. At home, egg curries taste way better. Here's one request kindly fry the boiled egg before putting it in the curry. It changes the taste. Trust me. I don't know why people don't do that here.  The gulabjamun was awesome. Hope I could tell the same about the egg curry. The chapatis were fine but I've had better.  On a positive note, you get points for the sweet, the neat packaging and the delivery. Thank you.

No hassle no over the top business. They serve you exactly what you need home cooked food. I tried egg bhurji roti and gulab jamun combo. Soft rotis and gulab jamun. The egg burji is spicy masaledaar and not very oily which is the best part. Recommended.
address: 688, 7th Main, 10th Cross Main Road, 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: Order from zomato . On time delivery. Pizza ? was excellent. It was Soo meaty and taste was just mouthwatering. After long time I had a good pizza ? . You are the next pizza destination.
The best pick was paneer wrap. Andhra style tasty wraps. I recommend this place.  Very hard working and customer focused young chaps.  Pleasant experience.

I have been ordering from this place for a long time, it is a savior for my midnight cravings. Pizzas are always good, topped with lots of toppings and cheese, and base is also properly baked. Never gets disappointed.

The delivery was quick no doubt. I really didn't like the pizza crust. Felt very gooey. Also the taste of the pizza was not upto my expectations. It was more like just cheese and bread. Although I guess it would have tasted better if I had ordered some other pizza with a lot of toppings.
address: 43, Arasu Nilaya 1st Floor, Opp To Patel Medical, 7th Main Road, 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: Ambience - 3/5    Food ? 3/5  Service ? 2/5  VFM ? 3/5  Parking ? Yes  Kitchens@ seemed like a novel and interesting concept....all the top restaurants of Bangalore under one roof seemed too good to be true. And so it was. Though you do have the Kitchens of the top restaurants the catch is that there's no dining table! Food is only packed and given and they don't even provide a spoon, let alone cutlery, tables or chairs to enjoy the meal. So, this strictly qualifies as a Take away restaurant. Which begs the question, why should anyone care to visit it, when Zomato can deliver the food at the same price? Anyways I have made the mistake of visiting here once, won't go there again. The food we ordered was okay fare. A2B can't go wrong with dosas, and the Chinese bowl at another kitchen was also okay. A good concept, but flawed execution.
Great concept !!! As many as 29 restaurants together..... That's a huge variety of dishes. Loved their inaugural offer......Of 50% off on all dishes across all the restaurants.

I had ordered chicken pizza and fries tonight for dinner. The food was so bleak and tasteless. The fries didn't have salt in them while pizza has different style of stuffing. There is no presentation of food too. Large size pizza was stuffed into medium size box.

First of all-They serve low quality food That's y their price is very low n give discounts... Don't get fooled.. if u want nice food.. it doesn't matter if a pay little bit more... Order from a better place.

A fresh concept started by kitchens where you will find ample of food joints under same roof. My first experience was good when I ordered popcorn chicken from empire outlet but second time I went for fish biriyani from fish chain and it was disappointing so overally my rating goes down to 3 out of 5. As there is no provision of rating individual outlets in kitchen. Empire will get 5/5 but fish chain will be 2-3.  Fish biriyani didn?t taste that great and I couldn?t stand oily food over anything. It was excessively oily for me.
address: #35/4, 24th main JP Nagar 7th phase, Puttenahalli, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Nice gygienic food. Its usually crowded on Saturday and Sunday but you would get good south indian food. Value for money and prompt service.
Ordinary!  I?ve been here once for breakfast and for dinner. The breakfast was bad and the dinner was okay. I like their other outlets food more.

Good vegetarian food. Reasonably priced compared to other darshinis. The guy who prepares the Chinese dishes is very dedicated and serious about his job, bringing out good quality and tasty starters. But the guys at the self-serve counters are poor at managing orders and sometime you just end up waiting unusually long.

The Masala Puri is yummmmm.. perfect blend of spices and so is the Panipuri. My 3 year old tried the less spicy Gobi Manchurian and was happy.. Very quick service except for items on menu like Spanish Manchurian ( which we ordered).
Serves good south Indian Dishes. I prefer having south indian thali as it has variety of items. This place is pocket friendly and serves good quantity and quality food. Thumbs up!
address: 19/3C, Avanishringeri Nagar, Nyanappanahalli Village, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Had ordered the special chicken thali @99 rupees. The thali had 3 chapati?s, 2 chicken pieces, dal, sabji and a gulab jamun. The quantity was enough for the one person. Taste of the food was good and also the delivery on time.

This place may be suitable for bachelors only. Being a fond of Punjabi food, I had little expectations for this place. I ordered Chicken Briyani. It was full oily. Chicken also tasted old. I could not complete eating the food.
Ordered egg noodles from here.The quantity was good but taste was not so good for the price.The noodles were big and sticky.They didn't fried the noodles properly and lumps were there
Less oily.good parathas. Ordered aloo and gobhi parathas.aloo tastes better. Superfast delivery.they dont give raita but curd. Reasonable price

Ordered the special thaali @99/-. Wow.. What great food and what good quantity. 3 chapati, rice, aloo dry sabzi, dal fry, chicken curry and chicken keema. So filling and such tasty food. Really appreciate it. Thnx Apna Punjab team for the great meal :)
address: 26-27, MICO Layout, 6th Main, 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: The absolute worse Palak Paneer ever I had from this place. I am never ordering food from this place ever again, I recommend everyone to not order as well. Look at the color, it was just ridiculous in taste and super spicy.
Love their palak paneer because of the nice garlicy flavor, malai kofta was decent, kidney beans masala was good, mushroom green peas masala was good. Overall I feel its value for money.
Ordered this thali for a quick breakfast from this outlet and to my surprise it was such an amazing one...no words  Highly recommended.  Would definately order again .
address: 56, 7th Main, Yellappa Layout, 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: Just ok... Not quality of rice... Not so hygiene when we visited... Staff were customer friendly only but not satisfied as per taste as well u guys must improve taste wise as I feel but its only veg based dishes am talking about as name tempted to visit but not hit our expectations.....
Good food but too oily n spicy They can improve by using less oil and less spices The costing is optimum as people want good and affordable food
address: Near Fortis Hospital, Opposite IBM, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: I love this place. We go here even when we have cold so have soup!! Great thing about this place is beautiful ambiance and reasonable price! They have very good food options. Starters are delicious. Momos are too good! Sometimes I feel one time visit is not enough to try all the items on their menu? When we crave for some Chinese rice items, we order from here. I forgot to mention their food quantity and quality so very good! Great service and lovely ambiance. One must visit this place.

Visited on a weekday for lunch.it was half full..we sat on the outer side..we ordered very manchurian balls and triple schezwan rice.quantity with good enough..the taste was also fine...the service was really quick.. Light on wallet... Food:3/5 Ambience :3/5 Value for money:4/5 Service:3.5/5
Horrible momos , we had steamed chicken momos! Chicken was smelling in the momos that we ordered. Had to throw the entire momos . Not recommended !

Momoz is a Chinese restaurant located in BTM 2nd Stage close to Pizza Hut. This outlet is located in the 1st floor. The outlet doesnt have A/C therefore we decided to sit outside where there are few tables as well. The seating and ambiance is decent.  We ordered the Manchow Soup. It took 10mins but the soup came out was pipping hot. The taste was outstanding with the kick from the chilies. Next we ordered the Paneer in Pepper sauce along with Egg Fried rice. The Paneer dish was a bit oily but the taste was good. We expected it to be semi gravy but it was dry. The Egg fried rice was decent as well.  The service here is on the slow side and the staff are busy in their own world. The quantities of the items was really good.   The Verdict: Food/Taste ? 7/10 Service - 6/10 Ambiance - 6/10 Value for Money ? 7/10 Quantity/Quality ? 7/10  Decent Chinese food experience!  rohitdassani.com

The lunch combo has been my go to. Priced at 99 on swiggy for rice, panner gravy and Gobi Manchurian it is a deal and sufficient for one. They also have a variety in terms of rice combo and noodles combo.
address: 806, Near ICICI Bank, 7th Cross, 16th Main, 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: A pocket friendly food joint in the locality to have odia cuisine.  But it is very small and congested. No proper sitting arrangements. Only 3/4 chairs are there and a wall mounted table. And it will be very crowded always by zomato boys to collect food orders.  They have sweets, snacks and other odia cuisines as well. Chicken kassa and dahi baigan was tasty. But dint like the fish fry. It was completely deep fried and not even fresh. Food quality could have been better.  But their sweets are finger licking and really worth having. Must try!

Good veg chop but aloor chop was more of a garlic chop and not at all good in taste and sweets are also ok. Need to try more options there. But veg cutlet or chop is a must for a bong there. It?s an Oriya outlet in btm but bong can saviour there taste buds well
Very nice place to try out typical north indian snacks and food. I have tried chats and sweets here. those are awesome. thali is also nice. specially the quality of roti.
I ordered amlet ?it was to good and tasty paking was nice..... I will come regularly to there ?and oil has observed limited.... Simply it was amazing place to eat this.. ?

kalingas.... its the best place for blissful taste of odia cuisine... gives a feel that you are landed up in odisha... specially the spicy dahivara aloodum and vada ghuguni perfect place for weekend breakfast.
address: 399, 16th Main, N.S Palya, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: This was a Home Delivery. I took the promotional offer of Fried Rice and Honey Potato combo for 99 Rs.  It was a mistake. The rice was hard and ice cold, very obviously not made fresh and Honey chilli potato was soggy and tasted just weird. Me and hubby both fell ill after this meal.  I left the same review on app and provided the same rating immediately. I do hope the restaurant takes note of the review and does not repeat this kind of error.   I would not recommend this place to anyone who values there health!

Accidentally I have got to visit this place and I feel I should have come here earlier. The taste of food, ambience, hygiene, quality everything is at it's best. I would love coming here again and again. This place serves the best quality and hygienic food. Just loved their chole bhature and tawa pulav and the gajar ka halwa is toh must try.

The quality and quantity of the delicacies served here are absolutely lip smacking. A single visit to this place, and I've been craving to get back. Tasty, visually appealing and hygienic restaurant for your light food cravings.Authentic taste and items. Very reasonable and worth every penny spent.

You get delicious home type food. I like Vada pav, Gobi manchurian, Aloo Paratha, Tawa Pulao, Kadai Paneer, Jalebi, Gulab Jamun in Kanteen the most. However I need to taste other items as well so will update my review after that :)  I would definitely recommend the place to my near and dear ones :)
address: 22, Nyanapanahalli Main Road, Opposite Dominos Road, Before New DLF Township Circle, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: We stopped here @5pm for a quick bite. We ordered a Paneer Roll and a Vada Pao. It took them sometime to prepare our order as two more tables were occupied and delivery guys were coming to pick up online orders too. The taste was good for both. But with vada pao, I expected dhaniya/green chutney and not a bottled ketchup. Decor is good but they play TV on really very high volume, perhaps to kill the noise coming from the road.

Its a small restaurant n very good location n staff are good  Tasted here Banana milk shake n Pomegranate juice n Phoa n Vada Phav. The Poha was average taste. As i stayed in Madhya Pradesh n Maharashtra i realized that i made a wrong choice.  But when you compare the local taste it was good. The banana shake was awesome.  The prices are actually less compared to Bangalore
Ordered hot chocolate, wasnt that great the tea is pretty good though, eating options are ok,nothing to write home about.. the crowd is pretty good... However it gets pretty crowded on weekends ...

Crowded usually, young people mostly. Coffee and tea is good. I tried Aloo Paratha and Poha as well. All good, not too good, not bad at all. For that price I don't think there is anything to complain about.

This cafe is good to have kullad tea., the parathas and sandwich are too good., its our favourite place to meet with friends as it?s nearby and the quality of food Nd especially tea is really good., why 4 star as the ambience can been improved much .,
address: G-3,1210,16th Main Road, Opposite IS Colony Park, 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: Had ordered for mutton biriyani which was packed cool and got the delivery early only and was good in taste. Quick delivery quick service and good taste. I will order again here only and suggest friends too.
Nice tasty Biriyani we ordered , went 2 people's ordered chicken Biriyani and chicken lollypop, tasteful food served and great location , enjoyed a lot

Guntur chicken could have been spicier but it was watery , Kshatriya kabab was very good , donne biryani had the authentic taste of Bengaluru, can be order again as all dishes were going except Guntur chicken

Please do not order the chicken biryani combo. Firstly, looks like they get a free yearly supply of chillies as the biryani will burn your taste buds. The chicken kebab pieces are pathetic, n the chilly chicken is just in name. Rather, save your money. Better to visit another biryani restaurant. These guys are fooling people.
address: 99/2A, Kothnoor Main Road, Opposite RBI Layout Bus Stop, 7th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: It's a great outlet to have litti with variety of chatni and other stuff. The litti are soft and are really tasty. The staff were really good and service was quick. I was looking for a lot of places to find litti and bharta and this is the really good place to have some.

A decent outlet for having north Indian food and had ordered aloo parantha, boondi raita and sattu poori combo. The aloo parantha was crisp and complemented with the raita however the same cannot be said about the satoo poori which Turner out to be a disappointed honestly. The sattu seemed a little stale and was orange in colour and the taste wasn't exactly like the expected home type. The sabji was too high on oil and the chutneys with them were a little smelly too. They need to work on their service and shouldn't take delivery for granted.

Amazing and authentic place. Visited the place last night on a friend?s recommendation. Must say, the food was as per expectations. First ordered litti chokha and then on liking it so much ordered litti chicken. The seating area is small and it gets crowded. If you are looking for ambience or quite dine in then this is not the place. If you are looking for authentic and tasty litti and sattu paratha this is the place. I am going to make frequent visit to this place now.
What an amazing taste. we ordered for the classic sattu filled litti and sattu stuffed Puri with chhole . Couldn't get happier. The chutneys, barbeque mashed potatoes just added to the experience.

#FeelOfNorth If you are from north India (specially U.P or Bihar) Litti twist can light your mood up instantly with really tasty north Indian stuff.  Talking about place, it is small restraunt but look wise beautiful and decorated nicely. The staff is good as well as the service is great.  Food is really good, will surely make you nostalgic. I ordered dal litti and special litti both were really and also I tried 'hot gulab jamun' which is fabulous.  Being a Northie I would really recommend this place to all who miss litti chokha in Bangalore.
address: No 43, 7th Main Road, NS Palaya, BTM 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: The only thing good about this place is the packaging.  We ordered pita pockets, wraps, paneer makhani and pulao, and vegetables in garlic sauce with hakka noodles from this place.  Pita pockets - BLAND. Felt like raw vegetables wrapped in a close dosa. Wraps - Just okay, nothing too great Paneer Makhani and pulao - The only saving grace from the entire order. Vegetables in garlic sauce and Hakka noodly - Very less salt in both of them. I could only taste cornflour and felt like no hint of garlic in the sauce. The noodles were bland and had no taste.  I now cringe to even order from this place. Very bad experience with Freshmenu from this outlet.

Had placed the order for lava cake in a jar. And the order was accepted too. Later got a message saying the order is canceled. Why do you accept orders at all? Now I have to wait for 5-6 days for my refund. Disadvantages of ordering online and making online payment. Very disappointed with the service. Wise to pay through COD or POD.
The double cheese burger was excellent, so was the chicken club sandwich. Just a major lack, the bread was too dry. Please fix this and next time I will give you 5 stars.

Their rice bowl are good. Need to improve a lot in pizza section. Pizza is not freshly made like dominos but base is pre cooked. They also use mayoinnase instead of cheeze for pizza which needs to change. However their roll, rice bowl are must try.

They are great but not always consistent with the taste or quantity ! But recently I had a spaghetti in meat sauce and it was delightful!! They can indeed improve on consistence and quantity so gain that to get that 5star
address: 23/24, Ground Floor, 2nd Cross, Arekere Main Road, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Yummy South Indian breakfast. Shanti Sagar has a quality all over town. Great idlis and dosas. Request for gutte chutney instead of the regular wet chutney.
Very nice and reasonable in j p nagar, ordered north special meals quantity was good, food taste was nice and value for money is super, overall it was nice
Qualitywise below standards . am not saying we can't eat..... am talking overall rating this not abt particular dish.... Guys who r looking for tasty food and change in taste u hate it

Yup it's Shanti Sagar, one of the most common joints for delicious veg food but but but tbh for the first time it dissaponted me, paneer and mushroom manchurian, taste 3/5 and rest I don't need to mention as you can see in the pictures, please do better next time. I know you guys have the caliber
address: 77/1, 24th Main, 2nd Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: I ordered their Belgian chocolate truffle cake. It was really tasty. The chocolate was rich and tasty. They had choco chips in between the layers This is very much worth the price.
Ordered a choxolate truffle cake for my bro's bday and it was really tasty.. really moist, soft and fresh that the cake just melt in our mouth.. ? will definitely order from here again...
address: 1 B, Krishnamurthy Complex, Kodichikkanahalli Road, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Today I ordered chicken cutlet and the taste was really very good!Happy with service and food!Taste and quality was amazing,surely going to try few more dishes from this place!really happy with the service and quality

#Edited  This one is a newly opened outlet in 5th phase..Even if this place has limited seating arrangements, it's extremely hygienic and clean..?  I was invited here as a part of their food review program..I thought of trying their new arrivals which were:  ?cheesy chicken shots: this was literally "cheese burst"..just with one bite, the cheese just melts in your mouth..just perfect the way I like..crispy from outside and cheesy from inside?  ?chilli cheese coins: this one is extremely soft and will definitely make you crave for more?  ?boneless chicken strips: it was cooked to perfection, crunchy and yummy?  ?Perfect place to have quick bites at pocket friendly rates.  ?Highly recommended!!

Tried the chicken roll and mexican chicken hot dog when I was hungry on a rainy Friday evening.  The Paratha in the roll was soft, it has soft chicken fingers inside with fresh onion and green bell pepper. The in-house sauce in the roll is the highlight. It has a blend of mint Mayonnaise, American mustard and mayonnaise as explained by the owner to me, when I asked him. The roll was very easy to eat.  With respect to the Mexican chicken hot dog which I tried, it had a soft bun stuffed with lengthy chicken sausage which had traces of dried red chilli and it was very smooth, filled by the same fresh veggies with spicy tandoori mayonnaise added to it!  Overall, I was completely satisfied with both the items in terms of food quality, taste and the pricing for the quantity provided and will explore more during my next visit!! :)
address: 18th Cross road, 5th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Their poha are very nice in taste... I would suggest to eat hot only... Bdw keep it up guys. Don't make any changes. A little bit lemon in poha would be an added advantage.
I had ordered paneer bhurji poha and the packing was really in a nice way.. It was so tasty and yummmmmm.... I would really recommend to try paneer bhurji poha.
address: 24, 6th-A Cross, 16th Main, BTM 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: Ordered Chicken thali online. Got 3 tandoori rotis, rice, dal and aloo sabzi. Rotis were freshly cooked and nicely packed, chicken was delicious and was in optimum quantity. Aloo sabzi was not good, was sour and hard. Onions were not fresh at all. Overall good food at low cost.
I just had my dinner with my friends, it's pretty cool place to chit chat and share food with friends. Quantity and quality is awesome. Friendly staff as well ?. Great value for money.
It was very good experience. Food was very tasty. Paneer butter masala was awesome. They keep playing the Punjabi musics which refresh mind . Must try.

The food is awesome. I am new to Bangalore and was searching authentic north Indian food. I ordered both veg and non-veg, both tasted awesome. I just suggest them add spoons with the take away orders. I will definitely suggest this place with my friends.
Worst food I never seen any where that kind of food and third class taste and huge rates don't order anyone in this restaurant pls 420 hotel
address: 19th Cross, 7th Main, Near Alliance University, NS Palya, 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: Food 4/5 Ambience 3/5 Staff 3/5 Price 3.5/5  Ordered Death by Chocolate, it was nearly equal to death? if eaten alone. Too much of chocolate overloaded with so many nuts? I could manage to finish one. I would suggest you to share this because it comes in huge quantity.

Food -4/5  Ambience - 3/5  Service - 3/5  Must Try - Death By Chocolate  Clue - Though I really like the classics DBC Super scooper,etc. I feel they have to introduce different varieties on their menu.
Its like any other corner house across the town!! They maintain their standard of cleanliness and quality of food aa usual here as well . These days my favourite is the hot caramel pudding .

Corner House- The best place to satisfy your iceecream cravings. DBC being the usual trend here, tried Trilogy(Vanilla,Pista and Fruit salad mix) and Almond fudge . It was awesome. Very fast serving. Small place but well managed. Must try Trilogy !! Recommended.
This is awesome ! DBC is my fav !! Just don?t miss it !! Service is good and rates r reasonable . Highly recommended !! Must visit this place. !
address: 1225, 26th Main, 9th Block, Jayanagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Came as hunger saviour at night 2 AM....... Ordered chilli chicken and chicken 65, quantity is good enough not much spicy but taste was good

Nice biryani it was spicy and nonveg rice with egg curry stuff nice biryani it was really very hot and good in taste !!! Loved it i had so many times from here biryani is also good but need to improve in controlling of spiceiness!!!!
address: 10, Near Jayadeva Signal, Oppoite SBI ATM, 100 Feet Ring Road, 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: Boneless Chicken Biryani's Taste & Quantity is fine, Chicken is bit hard, if quality is increased that would be good, Packaging is ok  Food 3*/ 5 Package 2*/ 5
I have ordered here biryanis good taste !!!!!!!!!!!! Fry piece biryani was really awesome and we'll cooked here even meals are good in taste pakka Andhra style !!
I have taken from there plate meals and Hyderabad dum biryani meals were really good raaa was awsome and sambar was tasty !!!!! Butter milk was upto3 the mark !!!
If anyone wants to taste Andhra meal at reasonable price this could be the one among in the city .The taste is good and the number of items provided at that price is well.
address: EK Retail Building, Beside Vijaya Bank, Vijaya Bank Layout, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Specifically requested them to make food less spicy and they did exactly the opposite of it! Can?t even have one spoon of the gravy. Disappointed.
address: 1260, SY 35/4, SJR Tower's, 7th Phase, 24th Main Puttanhalli, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: This place is definitely a must visit! A pleasant ambiance along with courteous staff and amazing food! The quality of the food was ? and the portions were more than enough for two. We had ordered fattoush for salad. It had a tangy dressing but I loved it. For starters we had ordered mutton kebab. Soft, juicy succulent muttons accompanied by hummus and mayo. For main course we had ordered kashmiri pulao. Go for this if you're okay with your rice being sweet. This had apples, pomegranate kernels and pineapples. Of course this had to be served with something spicy, so we ordered chicken tikka masala with it. Also, we couldn't eat all of this, so half of all of this had to be packed! Overall, Food 4.5/5 Ambiance 5/5 Service 4/5

Well I was here for dinner with a gang of 8 and I loved the experience. Lets get straight to the point. There is good and bad. So lets begin with good which is more. Food is very good, we ordered grill and a lot of other things. The food was a complete good experience.  Now bad which is very little The ambience is very very dark for a family dine in. Restaurant. I strongly suggest to use a brighter lights. And where we sat right above that that tiny little light had gone off but we were able to spot the food. And the service, the staff is friendly but I think they were short of 2 or 3 coz we literally had to call out loudly and felt happy when a service person walked by.  But all In, I recommend this place for a decent family dine in. I would surely like to visit the place again and hope the lights are up.

What I Had... 1.Murgh Kalimirch >Taste : 3/5 >Serves : 2-3 Boneless Chicken pieces marinated in Cashew and Black pepper marinade and grilled giving it a mild spicy flavour  2.Pahadi Murgh >Taste :4.5/5 >Serves: 2-3 Chicken cooked in a sweet-spicy gravy of onions, tomatoes,spices and fresh cream.Goes perfectly with butter naan.  3.Chicken Biryani Hyderabadi > Taste : 2/5 >Serves : 2-3 Disappointed.It doesn't taste like the authentic Hyderabadi Biryani.The chicken was also dry.  The service is quick but the staff isn't much friendly or responsive. Ambience is good. The location seems perfect and their food is good. Recommended for Pahadi Murgh and Laal Maas.

Yum-Yum!  Delivery Review!  I had ordered Mushroom Masala and Rottis from here the other day. Never expected it to be tasty though. It was delicious. The mushrooms were smoked and cooked in the curry. It was a good meal. Looking forward to try their other menu options.
Been there with family and the ambience is awesome food is amazing especially veg biriyani is awesome and the staff are very friendly going to visit this place again
address: 128/54/10, First floor, Opposite IIM - B, Dasarapalya, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: It's a small shack... Serves generic Chinese and Indian dishes. It's mostly a takeaway place and and for late night cravings. I had their chicken Schezwan fried rice... Just about average. Very pocket friendly though.
address: 1,16th Main Road,19th Cross, EWS Colony, 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: This is a delivery only outlet which is spread across different cities in India.  The packaging has a rich and warm feel. I had ordered mutton biriyani from here. The rice is of a good quality and is a long grain rice. I do like the fact that the masala is finely spread across the biryani. The mutton peices were soft and finely cooked without adding too much of spicy flavor.  The biriyani is accompanied by gulab jamun which could have been softer.  Overall a good experience. Only thing that i didnt like is the packaging charge. Else everything is fine :-)

Last week Got to taste the oldest and Popular Biryani House In town Behrouz The Royal Biryani .  It was a Murgh Biryani I ordered. Got it delivered Before Time ,was hot as it should be. The itself look like Royal which Half justifies the Restaurant. You can see the pics attached.  The hot Biryani ,the aromatic Fragrance coming out of the Box can't be described in words, you need to order it to know the real taste of Royal Biryani.  Coming to the Biryani: The rice and chicken with proper blend of Spices made it delicious. Boneless & juicy pieces of chicken wrapped with the masalas in the Hot long grain Basmati Rice mixed together garnished with Nuts to let your taste buds taste the Oldest and delicious Biryani In town.  A must try place in Bangalore for Biryani. Would Love to Visit or Order again.  Food-4/5 Packaging and Delivery: 5/5

Behrouz have always ceased to impress me with its authentic and balanced flavours and while I was craving for biryani, I knew it had to be behrouz special chicken tikka biryani which is also my absolute favourite of all times. I ordered a pack of biryani along with chicken balls. The packaging and service was as usual perfect. The biryani was loaded with chicken pieces, chicken balls and dry fruits giving and absolutely irresistible aroma. Loved the flavours and taste. The chicken balls were also good, great in quantity and good in taste. Had a happy experience and would definitely try it again

There are many outlets for biryani but no other restaurant can measure the taste of behrouz biryani. Biryani they serve is just delicious and has perfect blend of ingredients. I ordered paneer zaikedar biryani which was very tasty and it was served with mint raita and gulab jamun which was more than enough for two peole. I also ordered falafal e khas and they were awesome. Also the packaging was very nice. Overall i had wonderful experience and would recommend everyone.
address: 69/1, Gowreesha Complex, Opposite Ananda Valmart Apartment, Doddakammanahalli, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Okay I would like to start off by saying that this restaurant has a team of unorganized workers. I ordered food online and it was 4 boneless biryanis and I received 1 mutton Biryani. When I called them, they said that they cannot do anything about it as that is what they were told to send and they already received my payment so they couldn't care less. Horrible service but the biryani tasted good. 3.5 for it but service made it a 2.

we ordered 4 portion boneless chicken biriyani and we got only 3 Biryani when i called the restaurant people saying we can't do anything. they doesn't know how to talk with the customers... But the Biryani was really good.. for the Biryani i wud like to give 4/5..thanks to zomato care they are very co-operative...
address: 81/3, Opposite Royal Meenakshi Mall, Hulimavu, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: super taste
extremely spicy food..... I've got stomach upset... kindly reduce the spice in the food or mention it in the menu
I ordered the food through Zomato. The food quality was very good. Biryani is very tasty. I liked it a lot. Very good and hygienic. This is one of the best Biryani
less quantity
raitha and sambar packing was not good, came out of cover
address: 1260 SY 35/4 SJR Tower's, JP Nagar 7th Phase, 24th Main Puttanhalli, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: This is very beautiful place for kids, family & couples. Foods are very teasty and hygienic. Special for Indian, Chinese ,Tandoor and many more.
This is the best place for family & couples. Tandoor special.Biryani, Naan, Roti, kulcha ,tikka, kabab is very good.chinese,indian,tandoor,many more.
address: No.16/30, Ground Floor, NS Palya, Bannerghatta Main Road, BTM layout, Bangalore

user_reviews: Visited this place while in Meenakshi. Price looked kinda reasonable. It?s in the food court .They have different kind of combos. Food will be served in 10 To 15 min usually. (Which I felt a lil too much for a food court). It?s alright.
Food was good but the order took too long to get delivered also there is some scope of improvement on the taste. But taste was Ok. Overall the feedback was Ok
Very swIft response to customer grievieances and good quality food, even received complementary gulab jamuns and love the way they treat their customers with lovely food ??????

user_reviews: i was very eager to have pothichoru from kuttanad restaurant. ordered through ubereats.. prompt delivery.. as if the name indicates pothichoru was a lunch covered in banana leaf and newspaper with sambar yellow curry and pappad.. when pothichoru was opened there was an omelette, full fish fry,pickles,chammandi,two types of upperi.. taste was just okey... anyway not happy to what i expected....

There I was feeling pretty homesick and missing home food and I was randomly trying to order food when I came to across kuttanad. Instant gratification on hearing the name. And then the menu surprised me was so happy on seeing the puttu and beef on the name. Bid farewell to my homesickness then and there ? kuttanad saved me !! After all what's life without puttu !!
address: 25/26,1st Cross, Beside IIMB, Bilekahalli, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: I'd say average by all accounts. This is not my first order from here. I've ordered multiple times before as it indeed is VFM when you are low on case. Food is OK. I like chicken items (chicken mughlai is favorite) but hate paneer ones as paneer here is hardest and most chewy one I ever had. As good as chewing a rubber.  I'd say only opt when you're light on pocket.
address: 11, 19 Cross, 13th A Main, NS Palya, 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: If your craving to try some yummy bohri food u should definitely try bohra bohra cafe.. I tried their chicken white cutlets which were soft and creamy in taste served with a nice green spicy chutney, chicken kheema samosas which are crispy on the outside and filled with juicy tasteful chicken kheema on the inside.. for mains I loved the chicken biryani it's just so flavourful served with the curd "kachumber" as they call it. For drinks I tried Gol Paani, it was very a soothing drink after a yummy meal.. liked the way it is served.. The best part about this place is it's easy on your pockets and so much good food to eat?..

Visited this small cozy place in JP nagar couple of times and had a great experience food wise. The food is great to taste especially the biryani, its got a nice bohri touch to it. Loved all the other items i tried to. ( Food wise its a easy 4 out of 5) Price need a special mention, if you are a student you will love their menu. I found the prices expremly competitive and worthy when compared to taste.  Update - one of my experience had me give feedback to the management and they very quickly and promptly took action, which speaks about their commendable commitment to keeping their customers happy.

This is a result of food getting personal! The food tastes fabulous!! The menu is simple exquisite Bhori food with a few small innovations that only add to the menu. The cafe is small and accommodates just enough to fill your heart. The day specials are a must try. Do not miss the custard if it's on the menu!! The service prompt. They do oblige the vegetarians with a few innovations... But it's on request! The exciting part is that It's really easy on the pocket! I really mean it! They have exciting plans and I'm waiting to try more of this!!

?A newly opened cafe along the 24th main road..As the name suggests, this place serves Bohri cuisine?  ?As I have never tried Bohri cuisine before, thought of giving it a try..Ordered Chicken Russian Kababs, Chicken White Cutlet, Green Apple juice and one more drink ( I don't remember the name exactly)  ?Everything was unique and that's the main thing, kabab and the cutlet were sooo soft and yummy?  ?Great hospitality I must say..go give it a try guys, food will not let you down..and I am gonna visit again for sure to try other items in their menu?
address: Shop 1, 129, 24th Main, 5th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: I'd like to say that the service wasn't upto the mark. We ordered the Margarita pizzas and the base was super fresh and yummy. A surprise after a bad streak of experiences I've had lately at pizza hut outlets!
address: 311, 15th Cross, 5th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Definitely worth the price or more may be. Treat to the customers and threat to the competitors and the food business for sure . Fresh coconut chutney that too in the evening. Truly impressed!

I've visited this place a couple of times for breakfast. Initially the service and the food used to be good. But now, the service is very slow and the staff aren't very cooperative with the customers. Food is not up to the standards. We'd ordered ghee masala dosa, but it did not have any flavour of ghee. Gulab Jamun had too much sugar syrup and it had crystallised sugar in it. Ambiance is okay. But they need to work on service and food quality.  Taste: 1 Ambiance: 2 Service: 1 Value for money: 2
address: Hulimavu Gate, BG Road, Behind ICICI Bank, Near Meenakshi Mall, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Outstanding Cheese corn momos,...?. and equally delicious Biryani. ?...My chosen place anytime for a quick snack or a main course dish......Also like it for being pocket friendly....

An apt name for this place as the menu offers a blend of binge worthy items like Biryani and Samosas. Pastas and Momos add to the variety. Tried the Samosas and Momos. Delicious food. Super quick service. Value for money. And a courteous staff serving happily. A recommended place for binge cravings. Enjoy Bingejoy maadi ?
Bombay Chicken biryani was very tasty and enjoyed every bit of it. This place was referred by a friend and it did not disappoint at all. Absolute value for money. Highly recommend this place.
Good response from restaurant. Nice food to have. Delivered food on time with out any issue. Team tried to resolve customer issues at the earliest

This small Food Kiosk is located right outside Big Bazaar, but do not go by its size... They serve a variety of items like Momos, Pastas, Chowmein, and surprise surprise... Even Biryani! On their recommendation I tried their Chicken Biryani which they call Mumbai Style Biryani, and it was delicious! Took momos and white sauce pasta home, and they were yummy too! I felt a lot of Joy Binging here. ;)
address: Big Bazzar Building, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Not so great but a good option if you are in this area and looking for something to eat. Food is average anything fancy here is not preferrable like manchurian amd other stuffs its just tasteless or you will feel like eating some curry vegetable Thalis here are good option so if you are short on money then go for thali instead of going for separate options. Go for half plates instead of full there is not much difference. Basically in full plates they give more gravy but the non veg or veg quantity is almost same.

Butter chicken is not butter chicken taste at all. can call it some other chicken gravy. butter chicken has a sweet taste to it which is totally missing. chicken pieces were not great .give less but give good . all the 3 small pieces were broken. I understand the price point but could have been better honestly. Thanks.
address: 315/B1, Near Police Station, B.G. Road, Muthurayya Swamy Layout, Hulimavu, Bannerghatta Road, Bengaluru

user_reviews: Lovely snacks & savouries. Cookies & tea cakes. Fresh & hygenic & tasteful. Well packed & fresh for very long shelf life. Rusk, khaari puffs & tea cake really good.
Satisfied with the quality of the food. Will get most of the traditional kerala style home made sweets like coconut halwa, coconut bolls. Value for money
address: 1, 100 Feet Ring Road, 1st Phase, 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: wrong order delivered
address: 1260, SY 35/4, SJR Tower's, 7th Phase, 24th Main, Puttanhalli, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: The food is awesome. I like everything from it. Tried chole bhature, filter coffee n tomato uttapam. Service is ok. Place is neat n clean.The outlet is small, in busy hours, u have to wait get a seat.
address: 1260, SY 35/4, SJR Tower's, 7th Phase, 24th Main Puttanhalli, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Chicken kebab is very tasty..must try! You have option to select number of pieces or weigh it. Delivery is very fast . Malasa papad is worth a try.
Food was grt. I enjoyed a lot. But one item was missing that was kebab. But it was ignored by me because of taste. Well done and keep discount in future.
Wrong beverage sent me
Ordered chicken briyani combo. It was good. Quantity was also good.. Liked briyani, chicken kabab n the sweet.. Didn't like the soft drink.. Overall it was good.

Worst service. I ordered biryani rice combo coz it said veg. I got non veg Biryani(chicken kababs). Also, there was no soft drink as specified in the order. Will never order from here again. Absolutely pathetic. Hope zomato takes them off from the listing.
address: 7/7, 1st Main Road, DC Main Road, Bilekahalli, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: they didn't deliver kebab

This biryani tastes like an electrocuted crow. Pieces in biryani can be served as leftover to dogs only . Im sure pigs have a better taste and will order from swiggy. I didnt get my kababs when i ordered . I collected ny kebabs after my work got over . Rice is like boiled rice with red color. Why is the restaurant charging 1000% margin on what they have invested and cheating customers? Extremely dissapointed . Please save your money and eat roadside bajji. I dont have a clue how they managed to get a hygenic food rating either. Everyone who has commented with one star must be dissapointed coz there is no 0 star for this restaurant .

Not expected this service from this restaurant. The order was sent incomplete without kebabs. The biryani was cold as if it was left over. Just because you give cheap rates, you should not take the customers for granted and serve whatever you have.

Be warned about the offers and the dishes served to you. Combos come with extra requirements from other sources. Parota in a combo comes with raita. Biryani comes dry. Chicken was ok.  Things gets worse post my dinner. Having a bad time n am writing this review at night 2am. Hope u guys understand the situation.
I have ordered Biryani but the quality was not good and it is not a biryani, rice and tandoori pc was like boiled no taste at all, I would give 0
address: Shop 1, 100 Feet Ring Road, 1st Phase, Stage 2, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: Always an healthy option, when one does not want to add much calories . The service level is quite ok . If it is the month end then better to opt for the sub of the day ? .

This subway has plenty of seating area and is conveniently located right opposite to Indian Institute of Management- Bangalore on Bennerghatta Road. Good hygiene, polite staff, and usually well-stocked to offer whatever one may wish to order. Keep up the good work!
It is just like any other subway outlet.good place if you want to quickly grab something which is healthy.  I have tried home delivery option as well.

This is a delivery review, my sub was too soft and they also added the sauce of their choice which I requested not to. Had to call the manager and he was kind enough to send a replacement. No issues since then, they deliver my subs and salads as I like, food is as per subway standards and delivery is always quick from zomato. Thank you .
address: Radha Krishna Towers, Opposite IIM-B Main Gate, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: If anybody want to have a taste of Muslim and south Indian Muslim cuisine should hit up at this place as they have a vast menu.They give u good food at low price.
address: 2/1, Bannerghatta Main Road, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Durbar Special Chicken Biryani is good but the flavor of biryani completely differs than regular biryani, pls try to enhance a complete biryani flavor, food packing is good, served with Sweet, Raitha & Mouth freshener

The description of food on zomato made me go wow... When I got the food well it was okayish... The kababs were properly done, good pieces and very tasty. However the description of the biriyani is what I cannot understand.. when you guys says it's Shaadi style biriyani I was always thinking the rice would be small (jeera sambha) but what I got was a basmati rice (probably basmati nd bullet rice mix) though it was ok.. It was little dry.. however the pieces in the biriyani and the kababs were nicely done and the dessert (kheer) was a let down. Cannot give u guys a 4 and a 3 is less a 3.5 overall  Price - 4/5 Quantity - 4/5 Quality - 3.5/5 Taste - 3/5 Vfm - 3.5/5

Ordered Hyderabadi chicken combo online which they said would include:  ? phulka and coin porotta ?Hyderabadi chicken gravy ?a dessert  ?Unfortunately, the coin porotta turned out to be a chappathi and was little bit hard..  ?The gravy lacked spices and had a layer of oil at the top..
address: 452, 2nd Main, 8th Cross, Lakshmi Layout, Mico Layout, Arakere, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: few sweets were not fresh badusha was very hard, and even jangry
address: 1260, SY 35/4, SJR Towers, 24th Main Puttanhalli, 7th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: The Good Bowl was gracious enough to offer me to take part in their review program.  Packaging - The packaging was good and the bowls were delivered when the food was piping hot.  Taste - I had ordered for a Rajma Rice Bowl and Paneer Steak Mac and Cheese Bowl.  Rajma Rice Bowl - Simple flavoured jeera rice with some ghee topped with seasoning of oregano powder,olives and some colorful capsicum. It blended really well with the curry. The curry was good. Rightly spiced.  Paneer Steak Mac and Cheese Bowl - This is a bowl of cheesy pasta topped with marinated paneer. The paneer pieces were so well made that had they served a bowl full of just that then I wouldn't mind paying for it. Pasta was very filling so much that I couldn't finish the entire bowl in one go.

This review is based on the food I got home delivered as part of the tasting and reviewing program conducted by Mr Arfaz Shaikh, Had requested for a 7:00 PM delivery and got the order well within the requested time. The food was neatly packed. Had ordered a Paneer tikka rice bowl and a Barbeque chicken rice bowl. Paneer tikka rice bowl came with flavoured rice, paneer tikka chunks and was topped with olive and corn. Barbeque chicken rice bowl had the same flavoured rice, with barbecue chicken and sauce and was topped with olive and corn. The food was reasonably good, though I am not a fan of olive and corn topping on all the dishes. The portion and quality justifies the price tag.
address: 161, 161 A, 166, First Floor, Vinayaka Nagar, BG Arkere Road, Near Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Only if zero star was availble, i surely would have rated the sh it they serve a big zero. I don't even wanna rate the flood, in simple words, it was the worst food i have ever tasted in my entire life. DON'T ORDER FROM THIS RESTAURANT AND DO A FAVOR TO YOUR STOMACH.

Sorry, but I have to agree that the restaurant provides unhealthy food prepared with bad oil. Last time my order had a lot of salt in it. I had to throw it. Asked for a partial refund but dint get any.

This is the worst restaurant I have ever seen. I have ordered chicken biryani and pepper chicken through zomato. They have sent very less quantity and the quality is very worse. The chicken is not fresh. They have given spoiled chicken which thrown away. And the biryani is of very low quality and taste. Not worth the price. They are cheating customers with spoiled food. Friends don't eat or order from this restaurant if you care for your health. This the worst restaurant and worst experience I have got
no quality and hot ness ,no taste also. I just wasted my money..

The food was horrendous, please avoid ordering food even if your broke because you will end up throwing it anyway. It was cooked in a very bad quality oil, I ordered baby corn I received something which tasted like burnt maida.
address: 14/6, 9th Main Road, Opposite Water Tank, 100 Feet Road, 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: Tried once, and i would say it is pocket friendly but not that good. The juices are okay not that amazing i would say. Some innovation and better quality would make it better!
address: 1260 SY 35/4 SJR Tower's, 24th Main Puttanhalli, JP Nagar 7th Phase, Bangalore

user_reviews: Kabab magic brings lots of memories back .every Thursday I used to have kabab magic food back in college days. Pocket friendly , service is great,food is delicious. I recommend u guys to try combo meals here . Shawarma Grill chicken Tandoori Chicken Lollipop chicken Arabic grape juice Rolls These dishes are very good here do try .

Its very hard to pen down a polite review,when the restaurant compromises on quality at such extend. They are selling stale kababs ,which are smelly and over priced. It comes as a very angry and disappointing experience when you get down with stomach ache because of the food,for which you had to pay so much. There are many other kabab joints which are clean, hygienic and reasonably priced. #DiscardSuchFoodJoints

One of the best grilled chicken and shawarma! It?s a beautiful sight to see the rumali roti being done too ! The place is a little small , but love the food ! Most awesome grape juice is here! Love the salad that comes with the grilled chicken !

This is my favourite place for grilled chicken and shawarmas!! Their biryani and kababs are also a must try! The kababs are crispy and not too oily.. Biryani is basically made of jeera rice and the flavours are great. The biryani here doesn't make u feel heavy in the tummy..
Taste wise food is quiet good with decent pricing..however the quality seems to be the issue. Ordered chicken 65 and it took like 30 mins to wash the color out of my hands..;)..
address: 1548, East End Circle, 9th Block, Jayanagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Ordered with lotto expectations.. asked for very spicy..what we got? nothing special.. I would rather order from other amazing restaurants..please improve ..
very bad
i did not get half of the order..please send it with the valet again.
Delivered on time but taste is too worst I ordered something I got another , and not worth for money ,simply money waste biryani its like some flavored rice

Food was not bad !!!! Worthless There is no value for the money now a days !! Zomato Delivery was worst that guy took more than one nd half hour for delivery !! If the hotel gives best taste and demand money that's ok but without taste how will u expect with this level !!!! Needs lot more improvements
address: 25/4, Yelchenahalli Metro Station, Kanakapura Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Regular burger joint n actually not a big burger fan...still like it in a average way ...n tried only chicken whopper. It?s fine ....on the Christmas Day, this place was heavily crowded n these guys were all getting confused with the orders...still not a bad experience. Will try again n check.

Whooper on a Sunday! Currently regretting why didn't I add a slice of extra cheese to it to make it a little more nicer . Thankfully the burger wasn't messy and ate peacefully. Patty was big and fulfilling. This was home delivered. Have tried their crispy burgers, wings and shakes etc. In their outlets. I don't find anything extra ordinary. These r binge eating for me and don't mind having it when I am damn hungry and any food will work. I am going with a 3 star for nothing extra ordinary. #HappyEating
Burger was fine and fries was not so good. Service is ok and not so good when compared to other outlets I've been to. Place is quite spacious.

The staff was courteous and the order was taken swiftly. I took them about 5 minutes to serve it on the table - which is good. The restaurant is kept clean and tidy. The hand wash area was clean too. Overall one of the best fast food joints which I have been in Bangalore.

Substandard!  We took 2 soft serves from here the other day. One was Vanilla flavor and the other was Choco Dip. Both the ice creams tasted awful. This experience leaves me with a feeling to never go back.  Note: This rating is only for their soft serve.
address: Royal Meenakshi Mall, Third Floor, Unit T001B & T007, Opposite Meenakshi Temple, Hulimavu, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: It is just opposite to Prestige technopolis , tried various biryanis all are good.I have also tried palak paneer and roti platter, quality is good with very good staff.
One of the few biryani house which makes really good biryani. Feels like homemade and really very tasty. Have ordered for the past 3 years and it has never disappointed me.

Starting with the good things, Chicken Biriyani was great to tastebuds and good in quantity as well. Liked the Biriyani a lot and will definitely try to visit again for that. Paneer starter was good in taste but way too oily. Bad for health.  Last part and the worst part was the service. Service sucked so much! We went at 4:30pm and it was totally empty and we were the only customers, 2 people and 1 table, still the service sucked badly. We had ordered paneer starters but waiter brought chicken starters. 2-3 things ordered still it was messed up. No gravy was provided with the Biriyani until we asked for it and then waiter sheepishly told us yes we have gravy but we don?t provide it on dining in, only on delivery orders. Ammm, what?! What kind of stupid policy is that?  So 3 stars to this place for the Biriyani n -2 coz of this stupid service provided.

We have been to Dadi?s a couple of times and keep ordering delivery from there. What is nice about this place is that it has an understated decor and good food which doesn?t burn a hole in your pocket.  They keep it simple! It?s always bustling with people, service is prompt and food bang on. The breads, curries (paneer butter masala, dal makhani, butter chicken, Kadai Murgh etc) and the biryani all are great for the taste buds.

Ordered Biryani from this place. loved the taste.. a little bit on the greasier side with oil dripping from the rice. Could not eat the last bit of rice in the container because of this.. But the taste was really good with right amount of spices.
address: 7, 2nd Floor, Krish Towers, Arekere Signal, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Ideal for quick neighborhood bite. Has good variety of North\\South Indian and Chinese options. May be annoying with long wait lines on weekend.

All Right!  We?ve been here a couple of times for breakfast and lunch. Breakfast is just okay. It is good place for lunch. North Indian items like roti curry is good here. Especially the mushroom masala is the best!  Suggestible for casual family dining.
A good place for South Indian delicacies. I ordered rava masala dosa and my friends also ordered some dishes.. it was good and taste was adequate.. can be visit for South Indian food lover
address: Near Aikya Apartment, Chikkammanahalli Road, SOS Post, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: We ordered for Alankrutha Special Biryani and Mughalai Biryani Chicken is soft and fresh and the spices flavour adds spicyness to the chicken quantity and quality is good enough

On the whole, I'd say, the ambience is beautiful, the service too. The starters are good, real tasty. Variety isn't great, but isn't bad either. The food, make sure you've a good appetite, Because it demands it. Desserts are fancy, but the variety suits only some.. Perfect place for a small family meet but would not recommend for any grand celebrations.
address: 935, Sri Arcade, 1st Floor, 16th Main Road, Near Udupi Garden Signal, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: This review should have been posted a year ago, but better late than never.  One year ago, I took home veg and chicken biryani. But it seemed like it was spoiled. I made a call, and the call was escalated to the area manager. The area manager called us back and offered free dinner for my family.  My family arrived at the JP Nagar place and had nice dinner and we were charged nothing. I had luch and dinners before at this place and was impressed. This time, I thought I would like to write a review for it. The management folks of Paradise are nice. I would like to visit often.
We had ordered Biriyani and Chicken tikka kabab. Chicken tikka kabab was really awesome but Biriyani was ok ok. I may not visit this place for Biriyani but absolutely for other dishes

Ambience - 3.5/5    Food - 3/5  Service - 3.5/5  VFM - 3/5  Parking - Valet  Paradise is popular as the number one choice for Biryani. And they sure are one of the most popular Biryani outlets in Bangalore. But this visit did not agree well with the exalted position they occupy. We ordered the Vet Platter,. Veg Biryani, Paneer Jalfarezi and rotis. The paneer dish was strictly average and not as I had expected. The Veg Biryani to was a disappointment and treated more like Veg fried rice. Surely could do with improvement, esp in their Veg dishes.
My favourite place for biryani. So delicious.... We ordered Nizami Hyderabad biryani and chicken tikka kebab. It's tasty yet affordable. The service is also good.

One of the best in town i must say. After trying a lot of eateries out there i finally got satisfied in this restaurant. Location is good near the main road. Staffs are well behaved and a calm soothing ambience gave it a edge on the other restaurant. This restaurant will provide a pure north indian flavour which is tough to get in some other so called north indian restaurant. A must visit for all north indian foodie.
address: 915, 24th Main Road, 2nd Phase, Mayura Circle, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: We tried Chicken Shawarma and Some Panner Gravy, I don't remember the name of dish. All I can remember is that it had oil floating in at least 1/2 inch.... Shawarma was average.

The place is located next to axis bank and it is one of the best for non veg food in JP nagar, budget wise its affordable, The food is delicious and hygienic, cleaniness is good and the place is well managed.

This cute little place is right beside where I stay. I don't go for dine-in much. But they do have good dine-in place on first floor.  Food worth trying and continuing to order is -  1. Grill Chicken with Rumali roti. Once a week I will have it. And it is delicious.  2. Shawarma - better than any other place with good stuffing.  3. Ghee Rice - good for light lunch.  4. Chicken Noodles - always a last option if I can't get any of the above two.  Rest I have tried other things too, but didn't like it much and didn't find worth the money.
address: 44, 3rd Cross, Marenahalli, 2nd Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Ordered Chicken Kadai and butter Rotis. Extremely delicious and mouth watering. I couldn't even wait to take pics before eating. Good food at an affordable price.  Eager to try out other delicacies.
Simple food with great north indian taste Had ordered online and it did not let my taste buds down Economical when it comes to its thalis So must give it a shy
address: 77/2 BDA Road, Opposite RR Layout, BTM 6th Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: An authentic Andhra cuisine restaurant that serves good Meals, biryanis and deserts! A must try for all the Andhra cuisine fans. This was previously named princess and they have come up with this unique cuisine.
Andhra ruchulu ... is considered as one of the best andhra cuisine to go with. Ambience is just super with too yum food and really fast service. A must visit place if you are around this.

Very good place for decent Andhra meals. The non veg dishes are good too. We tried the Ruchulu Chicken semi gravy dish and the Mutton Ghee Roast. Both were good though the quantity was a tad lesser than expected. The mutton was succullent and though the dish says Ghee, the fragrance was of beautiful coconut oil, which was yumm too. The mutton biryani was just about ok though the pieces were tender. The staff were very courteous and efficient.

This was one my favourite places and was a regular customer until my recent visit few days back where the Management have made some very surprising drastic change in the food. They have advised their cooks to make the chicken pieces smaller and lesser in the dishes which has completely ruined the taste of the dishes. Their chef special Andhra Ruchulu chicken, Golconda Chicken had some tiny 4 pieces. They believe that by doing such cost cutting customers won't realise. They don't realise cutting the pieces actually ruins the entire dish. For a steep price of 260rs for the dishes there they gave some tiny pieces. Was very shocked and I raised this point with the Manager as well who said it was Management decision. Being a regular customer I hope they read this review of mine and change to the previous way of doing things. With such steep prices for such low quantity, I would rather visit Nandhana or Nagarjuna. I did not expect this from the Pai Management.

Don?t really know how the ratings are so high for this place, this being an Andhra restaurant expected more from this place. No complains about the service, it was pretty quite and good. It will be a big let down for vegetarians as it does not have paneer biriyani. Took 3 starters, though it was delicious the quantity was too bad for the price. Took a chicken biriyani family size, paneer fired rice and schezwan fried rice. Only paneer fried rice was good. Chicken biriyani was manageable but it wasn?t spicy enough and the schezwan fried rice was the worst, never tasted something like that. But all the rice items quantity was sufficient enough. So to sum it up Starters tasted good but the quantity was bad and Main Course tasted just okay but the quantity was good.
address: 1319, 100 Feet Road, 2nd Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Sorry to say but this place served completely raw chicken with biryani. When I asked for refund they ignored. There are many better option then wasting your money in raw chicken.
Not good at all and Not recommended. We ordered to test for regular orders. But not a good taste at all. I don't recommend for anybody and packing also not up to the mark.

Ordered panner manchurian gravy, gravy was good but panner was too hard, it was fried so it was hard. Didn't like the panner . Quantity was good.
I ordered paratha instead of that I'm getting chapathi..and side one is kadai panner real photo ....both like rubber.. so worst don't order in this restaurant.

Double cheese margarita pizza was so nice But I didn't like that bbq mushroom pizza and Taste of chilly garlic veg pizza was not up to the taste i have expected Drinks was giving different tastes ok with that

Oh my God. It was worst pizza ever. If I call to this branch for enquiry, simply those staff talking we are not responsible and all, don't no is it pizza or what, some bad smell in pizza. Food 1.5/5 Taste 2/5

And not forget they serve good food.  We tried Cheese Garlic Bread & Chicken Keema Garlic Bread for starters and Margarita & Chicken Temptation Pizzas. Slightly on the expensive side, but is good on quality. See You soon Cheesiano. All the Best.
We came here for the first time, it's located beside Hotel Empire in JP Nagar. Had two pizzas and they were good! The toppings were given generously and the taste was good too. :) Cheers!

user_reviews: great guy
awsm delivery

user_reviews: Very good Arabian style restaurant and very awesome food and it's verities are approachable. We usually go here for official lunch, also with a very good ambiance. Do visit here
Great ambiance and some great food but not the Arabian cuisine though. Rest, the food, service and ambiance is really good! Would recommend this place for some good food in and around J P Nagar

Can this really be called an Arabian restaurant? No. The menu is mostly filled with typical Indian/Mughlai and Chinese dishes, and the Arabian share is limited to some barbecues. Honestly I was pretty disappointed with their barbecues. It was undercooked and missed the fire character. Though the marination was good, it tasted raw. Surprised that they served Rumali Roti as the side for barbecue instead of Kubboos or any Arabic bread, and the roti was hard and rubbery, inedible. Restaurants like Zaitoon and Fattoush serve absolutely delicious barbecues, even Empire would be a better choice. On the other hand, prawns were delicious and soft like silk.  Ambience is great. Neatly and tastefully done interiors. Pretty good for large groups and families. Service is very good too.

If you have a craving for Middle Eastern delicacies, now your taste buds would find a justification at Least Arabia. Superb interiors and courteous attendants. The foods are great, specially, the Arabian Shawarma, Nawab Chicken and Irani Kebab are a must try.
address: 15, Bannerghatta Main Road, JP Nagar, Bangalore
3, 24th Main Road, Opposite Bindhya Residency, 5th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Love all KFC places. Service was quick. Taste as usual is standard and awesome. Great place for a quick bite. Must try their crushers. Pricing is good too

The staffs here are friendly. The place is extremely well with good ambience. The chicken is cooked very well here and there is no smell from the chicken . The chairs and tables which found here are extremely well setup. A good friendly place.
Had burgers: veg n chicken. Tasted fine but were less tangy, spicy and juicy. The sauces used could have better. Ambience is quite spacious. Service was ok.
address: 948, 24th Main Road, 2nd Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: We know the military hotels in and around Bangalore right? They are amazing because of their legacy, the stories you hear from the owners, and also mainly because they nail the brief when it comes to preparing only a few dishes, but preparing them very very well. Dande's is NOT such a place. They have a wide variety, but seldom get it right.  That said, their Dande's Special Chicken Biryani is amazing. Don't be taken aback especially after what I wrote in the previous paragraph. Another analogy for Dande's is like watching Meryl Streep in the movie "The Iron Lady". Their special chicken biryani is exactly like that. They serve really good rice with boneless chicken that are mixed with scrambled eggs. Their taste is really really good and goes amazingly well with the rice. This is a Biryani that you can always eat. The best part is that you don't feel super-heavy after binging on it.  So if you feel the urge to visit this place, do so, but you know what to order. :-)

okay ,so this review is only based on special veg biryani. however this place is more popular for non veg items. veg biryani was too spicy .it had gobi, ? potato,paneer , beans, ? carrot mixed and fried properly. enjoyed eating. you get raita and biryani masala with it. there is onion and lemon salad with it.  ratings:: Food: 4/5 Packaging: 3/5 ,container would have been better Quantity : 5/5 ,more than enough for 1 person spicy: 4/5
Biryani was good in taste ordered special biryani quantity was more quality was good still the biryani rice need to be cooked well but chicken was good
Ordered a boneless chicken biryani.  It was ok ,  no complaints or compliments. Yet to try out other dishes to form a opinion. Will try in future.

I am a Biryani Lover..Ordered Dande's Hyderabadi Boneless Chocken Biryani, Boneless Chicken Manchurian and Chicken kabab.. the Biriyani and Chicken Manchurian was really yummy but the Kabab not up to the mark.. delivery was was very fast by Zomato people...
address: 5, 17th Main, 5th Cross, Behind Vijaya Enclave, Kodichickenahalli Road, Vijaya Bank Layout, Billekahalli, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Unhygienic place , chicken did not taste fresh  Pizzas were ok ok  Management should consider repainting the place and get some better people in place  Thanks

There's no point in keeping 'name of the week' (NOTW). This outlet had no pasta for the NOTW. And the menu for NOTW is so restricted. No more choices were left for us to choose. We ordered 2 pizzas, berry cheesecake and a coke. They all tasted fine. Service was so so slow.

Had ordered pizzas for delivery and they were really quick and the pizzas tasted good too.  1 pizza can fill your hunger and is open even at late nights to satisfy your pizza cravings!  They also have veg and non veg buffets and good deserts to accompany that.
Had ordered veg Mexican delight pizza and wedges for the dinner.the taste was good, liked potato wedges.the delivery was done on time.the experience was good.

It was extremely busy on 31st night. We had to wait for 20 minutes to get a table. Maybe for the rush, the service got little clumsy. We order- Chicken Pasta, Chicken cheese stuffed pizza, Fried chicken with peri peri sauce and Tiramisu for our dinner. Onesta serves Cafe cuisine, so potion sizes are quite small. Pasta was very much over priced. All the food item was tasty. Abhisek Gayen
address: Site 15, 15th Cross, 100 Feet Road, 4th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Go here for the dosas and South Indian breakfast food in general and skip all the North Indian stuff! The Butter Masala Dosa and the Mangalore Dosa are our favourites. Very close geographically to Taaza Thindi, but if you frequent the area, this is a great place to stop by, for a change in taste/style of dosas. Samabar dipped vadas are excellent, as well. One of our go tos in this area for an early breakfast, after a long night of beer-ing, before crashing.
address: 1, Gottigere Main Road, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

Apart from online ordering, I have always come to this restaurant for its pocket friendly food. Food is quite good here specially their eggrice, chilli chicken, aalu paratha etc. I would recommend this restaurant for its price worthy food.?

user_reviews: So we ended up here on a late lazy Sunday afternoon breakfast.I ordered the paneer masala dosa and my friend ordered paddu.The dosa they make are really good crispy and a beautiful golden colour it has.I was expecting the aloo to be replaced to paneer masala as stuffing but it turned out to be paneer grated on to aloo masala.which I felt could have changed,the paddu took really long time but can't blame them because we went at around 12 for breakfast but when it came burnt on one side which they called it extra fry it was a disappointed . Must Try:Definitely the Masala dosa(Not paneer ;) and palak Paneer which we always order from this place(Keep it up) Paddu:50rs (6 pieces big one) Paneer masala dosa:70rs Location:This is actually in Vijaya bank Layout Rating is based on truelly the above instance.

Ambience - 3/5  Food - 4/5  Service 3/5  VFM - 4/5  Parking - None  This is a long pending review one of the popular Darshinis at Vijaya Bank Layout. Been there  for breakfast. They don?t have much of seating space, only a single bench and some standing tables.Food was good as expected. we had Mallige Idli,vada and Masala dosa. Food was good and tasty. I?d recommend this place for their breakfast if you happen to be nearby

nice food

not at all friendly
