user_reviews: Ordered Chilli cheese sandwich and choco milk shake. The packaging was good and I actually didn't expect the milk shake to come in a shake bottle; liked it. They also kept my request of making the sandwich in the brown bread. However, the rating is purely on the taste of the food and I was disappointed. 1. One would expect the chilli cheese sandwich to have bell peppers with cheese, but here I got ONLY chopped green chillis with cheese, and that too loads of chopped chillis (see one of the photos). My mouth was literally on fire.. I couldn't take more than two three bites.. 2. Choco milk shake was too sweet for my taste and was very thin in the consistency.. Overall didn't quite enjoy the experience.

Are you kidding me???  I was so hungry, on a sunday, and decided to order this Chilli Cheese Sandwich & Chocolate milkshake, and this is what i get??  When i opened the sandwich, all i find is Tons of chilli, and almost no cheese, and damn...its so dry. The bread was not buttered enough / at all before grilling, and it was literally just bread and chilli...!!!  And see the milkshake...there is a thick layer of cream floating... which feels weird to the pallette, but apart from that, the milkshake is very low on chocolate flavour...feels like a very light boost...:/  Very dissapointed. And this is not the first time, all my previous orders were like this. I am usually not one to give a negative review on the first shot, but guys,.... thid was the 3rd or 4th time i'm ordering.  Will not be ordering again, if this is the quality you manage to put out. Please improve the quality guys. Come on!  -Abhishek Bhaskar.
address: 204, 4th Cross, KSRTC Layout, 2nd Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Quality Biriyani but nothing special in it, I am hard core biriyani lover and I had seen good reviews about mani?s and ordered thorough zomato, it was warm but the chicken taste was very average, nothing much to talk about this biriyani and its flavour. I can see good reviews in zomato but when i check online order reviews almost everyone rated less than 3 star, is there any difference in online orders ? Strange

Heard about this resturant in past which is famous for its Biryanis. Thought to give it a try so ordered a Chicken Biryan Full. The packaging was good and quantity was good for two moderate eaters. It had 3 pieces of chicken and 1 egg.  Coming to the taste, it was average. It was bit dry and there was a slight taste of raw ginger. I liked it but there was nothing special about it.
Not a biryani I would crave for. I ordered chicken 65 biryani in turn I got biryani with two chicken kebabs and a boiled egg in it. Taste of biryani was also kind of ok.
Have heard much about Mani?s Biryani and all things were true. Found it of the best restaurant for Biryani in Bangalore. Taste - 5/5 Pricing - 4/5 Portioning - 4/5
Ordered very biryani. It won't blow your mind. Average taste. Too much masala and the delivery was pretty quick. Not impressed much. Will have to try other variants too
address: 471, Kothanur Dinne Main Road, 1st Floor, RBI Layout, 7th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Food quality is okay. Rui macher jol was good. Chicken curry was too watery. And shorshe ilish was bitter. Loved the mishti doi. Price is cheap. Ambience is okay. Aloo posto was good too.

We ordered breakfast from here.. koraisutir kochuri with alurdam and luchi and chole dal...  It tasted very good... loved both the dishes... but.. 1 negative point... quantity of both cholardal and alurdam was very very less... the bowl was not even half filled..  Mgmt.. please take care of this... you know u can do that at the same price

I have been a regular customer to this place since a long time. The food is not out of the world but has homely taste. Also is very economical with an amicable staff. I know even though the hygiene level is not to the higher extent I choose to continue eating here coz of the taste. But today?s event completely changed my perception about this place. Saw one of the new guys sharpening the knife used in the kitchen on the steps of the restaurant. Told him and the other guy to wash it before he uses it but to my astonishment the guy simply started chopping veggies ignoring my as well as the other staff?s advice. Instead he asked to pull the curtain to the kitchen. Not visiting the place ever. Hope the msg reaches the owner and he ensures hygiene to some extent is maintained. Attaching image of the steps highlighting the spot where it was sharpened.

Had been there on their opening day, and so wanted to check how they were faring. And the less said the better. The quality of food was terrible, along with the packaging(ordered take away). Though I usually don?t judge a book by its cover, it?s not a bad idea when it comes to Bengali restaurants in Bangalore. The amount of oil floating on the top of every curry was scary. Thankfully this was a hard hitting nail on the coffin, so as to get it sealed in one go itself. Never repeating it.

I had ordered luchi alur dom it was fabulous and worth of money full of bengali taste without any doubt. I also had ruhi jhol, katla kalia fish items with rice and aloo posto which was mouth watering what else we bengali need, and ending with kejur er chutney. Below is the picture of alur dom
address: 19 D Cross, 7th Main, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: Not so popular Hotel in this area, decent food , good price. nothing impressive about it. North Indian style non-veg food.  All Fried rice items are good specially Mixed Fried Rice.
address: 958/60/A2A, Opposite BGS School, Hulimavu, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: One of the best biryanis ... Mutton Biryani is the best.. the pieces arent too bony... Veg biryani is pretty good as well, chicken Biryani is between ok and good.. starters are tasty, over all limited options, but these options are pretty good..however if Ur not used to spicy food take ur ant acids before u go to bed...the day u eat from here
The taste is priority than ambience, I loved the taste of Redddy's hot and Birinz special bone less biryani they both taste awesome after a long time I had my kind of biryani.

Repeated counts of wrong delivery service, be it via any delivery app, these guys just don't seem to understand the order placed and send wrong orders without even confirming with the customer. Prawn Biryani order becomes Paneer and Chicken Biryani becomes boneless chicken biryani without even asking you. The point is, if you can't deliver the right order.. just make sure you call the customer and confirm it. Being a foodie, I have had good feedback about you guys but the recent orders have forced me to rate you to this.

After pondering where to order my Biriyani from and debating all the options available around jayanagar I decided to go with birinz this weekend. We ordered the butter chicken Biriyani and Andhra chilli chicken. The hot and spicy chilli chicken complimented the rich butter chicken Biriyani. We polished off the entire serving and literally didn?t even leave a grain of rice.

Visited this restaurant with few of my friends for a weekend lunch. Had heard a lot about their biryani and the varieties of toppings they provide. The ambiance of the place is normal. Located on the btm main road. You won?t find much difficulty to locate the place. We started with some dry starters which had chef special chicken starters, Prawns dry fry, and coke, for the main course we ordered a Hyderabadi chicken biryani, Butter chicken biryani and boneless chicken biryani. Everything was up to the mark.butter chicken biryani I had tried for the first time but to my surprise it was not at all sweet. Was very buttery and and yummy in taste.i would love to visit again and also get the biryani homedelivered
address: 1st Floor, BTM Complex, 9th Main Road, 1st Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: Today was the first time I tried Shawarma from here and was happy with it. Though there were some issues yet overall it tasted nice. I wanted to give it 3.5 but Zomato does not offer that option nowadays. Having to choose between 3 and 4, had to settle with 3 because of the pita bread. I had ordered Whole Meat Shawarma with extra cheese and was not disappointed with the filling. The chicken was well cooked and the filling had enough moistness because of the extra cheese. The chicken also had good smokiness because of the grill which I loved. However, the pita bread needed a little more time in the oven.  I would have loved some smokiness added to it from the brown spots and blisters of a well-cooked bread.  That would have added so much to the overall taste of the dish.  But not a bad option to order your food from when your taste buds are looking for something middle eastern!
Quick grab? Call just shawarma. Less spicy but juicy chicken? Call just shawarma. Thanks for today's delivery. It was raining but the zomato delivery guy reached on time with the food. Good job guys!

Unsatisfactory!  I dropped down here on a Saturday night to pick up a Shawarma roll. Just when I started is when I realized that I shouldn?t have stopped by. The roll was too dry and also the filling was not up to the par.
address: Survey # 81/4A, Cave Temple Road, Opposite Meenakshi Mall, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

Ordered food in this restaurant through zomato  Nice food with reasonable price  Mutton rogan Josh was really really fantastic  With in 40 mins span I received my order  Thank you zomato nd bawarchi
Today morning i visited this restaurant  Boneless chicken biriyani taste really super  I suggested to improve their service section  Thank you achi biriyani kilaya aaj bahuth dhinom ka baadh

user_reviews: "How the fish can you do this"... As a seafood lover I've always wanted to have something fresh and good also not heavy on my belly and pocket.. Seer fish at 99 and mackeral at 70 .. U gotta be kidding.. none of the prices above 149... Howzz that even possible...!!! Well anyways though it's at a giveaway price doesn't mean the taste is compromised.. though the biriyani is bland the fish and curries are not.. the Tikka stands out too... But the best stuff is their bbq fishes... One for the seafood lover inside you.  FOOD : 4.5/5 PACKING AND QUANTITY : 5/5 VFM : 10/5
address: 1260 SY 35/4 SJR Tower's, 24th Main Puttanhalli, 7th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Place, it's located right opposite to reliance fresh and easily noticible. Ample parking space available. Self service. Food, great taste. Typical south Indian food. Good for a quick bite. It's Hygiene and quick. Good variety. Price, it's bit expensive for quantity they serve.

Very bad service and rude staff... While taking parcel staff try to cheat by entering carry bag cost two times in bill or the parcel counter person will send you back by saying lie that carry bag is not captured in bill... Same with packing and containers...
Well, to be frank, though the chow chow bath was tasty , it had oil/ghee overflowing from it, which should be minimised. But other than that, the food was good!
Cult rava Idlis, set dose and saagu. Super quick service. Go here for truly fast, South Indian brekkie and you'll never run out if options to try.
packing was not good
address: 25, 9th Cross, 34th Main, ITI Layout, 1st Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: I ordered veg biryani. It was like white rice only not even pulao. no spices no test like biryani. Only good thing was packing and quantity..
I had ordered "Baby corn Lemon& Mushroom pepper dry". Mushroom pepper dry was yummy & spicy ?? ... Awesome ??. Baby corn lemon will go with people who will prefer less spicy
After lot of scrolling I finally decided to take a risk and order from this very new restaurant. Well it turned out to be really good one. Not the best but really good in taste and quality
Delicious food. Love the quantity and packaging. Great choices for all occasions. Love the vegetarian and non vegetarian verities. A must eat!

Best place for a take away or ordering . . Both quality and quantity is high . . Satisfaction to the core . . Not only non veg, even the vegetarian is damn tastier . . Mixed veg curry and paneer chilli, the best on my first veg try here . . Highly recommended guys . . Give a try and definitely you will order for the second time . . Packing is great too . .
address: 39, 3rd A Cross, 25th Main, BTM Layout, 2nd Stage, Roopa Nagar, Rashtrakavi Kuvempu Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Have been there and ordered home delivery and have picked up myself...love the Mutton biryani and kebabs they prepare. Be prepared to wait on weekends due huge rush..

Have tried this place..koramangala outlet and the bannergatta one...so we cannot expect anything fancy or nice...but the biriyanis are nice here...spicy ones...service is okay...They take 20 min o more...place was kinda full...All regular seatings... It's in 1st floor...The stairs we gotta climb is sad (bad maintenence) This rating is only for the food served. ?

This Place never fails to amuse me with its taste!!! One of the best biryani adda? I ordered the family pack biryani combo and chicken kebabs, both were out of the world!!! Keep up the good work team?

Not a good experience I would say having tried this place many times I would say it's always a mixed experience. Sometimes it's impressive then it become dull next time. The place unexpectedly changes taste used to serve spicy biryanis earlier now it's standard has got down does not have that kind of biryani. With so many biryani restaurants competing in this area, this place sure dilutes down compare to nagarjuna and nandhana which have remained constantly great in terms of food and service. They need to make changes soon or else it would become an only delivery outlet.
address: Arakere Gate, Next to HSBC, Opposite Reliance Mart, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Stopped for a quick bite here and ordered the Chicken and Pineapple Sosaties. Delicious chicken skewers that had been well marinated and properly grilled. Succulent and flavourful. Would be nice to have a little salad or even lettuce to go with it.

Nice decor. Pleasant ambience. Persons assisting the foodies (customers) are super professional & helpful. The taste & quality of food is superb. The 5-types of sauces available at each of the tables are icing on the cake. Must visit.

It is an ok place.. the half chicken was good.. but the green apple cooler and lemonade were very very sweet . Ordered chicken espetada.. it was not all that good.. the corn on the cob was bland, garlic bread was ok n the fries were good. Don't think will visit again . But need to mention the staff were really attentive and good.. so I have given one extra star for them..

Situated in the food court in Vega City Mall, this can be your new South African inspired chicken shop. They tend to give you the spiciest flame grilled out there in the city. Minimal seating and an open kitchen make it an interesting setup for sure.  *Food* Not many options were available in beverages other than soft drinks. A lot of options in chicken available, the recommended are :  Boneless Chicken Breast Chicken Espatada Pulled Chicken Burger  The main issue I find is that even the spiciest sauces don't tend to reach for water ( courtesy Indians spice power). It is a different try for sure.  foodndestinations.com

Visited the Galito's outlet in Vegacity mall. Galito's proclaims to bring "BOLD AFRICAN FLAVOUR" to our city. Those who've visited Nando's can instantly relate to this place.  The food, the menu, the decor - they all reminded me of Nando's. I will however say that the service here is much better. Galito's' famed flame grilled chicken is "the bee's knees". The peri-peri sauce comes in 5 variants - Mild, Garlic, Hot, Lemon & Herb and Premium Reserve.  The grilled chicken breast in the peri-peri chicken burger could've been tenderized better. The chicken and veggie rice though was flavourful and wholesome.  The fiery pineapple mocktail was sublime. Just the right mix of sweet and heat. The mombo mint though was a little too thick in consistency.
address: Vega City Mall, 3rd Floor, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Good food , good pricing, what else can u ask for, the chicken lollipop is really good, combine that with Prawn fried rice and u have a winning combination, noodles can be better, however the starters are really tasty and equally spicy, however would recommend u guys to eat like four to five times a month not more, u mite end up getting bored..the place is small but pretty good..
Had ordered veg steamed momos bcoz It is craming across restaurant listing. Packaging was well packed with chutney.  Taste- 5/5 Service- 4/5 Packing -5/5
Was craving momos and came across this restaurant listing. Ordered veg steamed momos, they were packed well with mayo and chutney. Taste - 5/5 Packaging - 5/5
A very small place in BTM for authentic Chinese food at pocket friendly prices...when in doubt and in BTM jus go here...if there's no place to sit..jus parcel the food ?

Ordered from this place for dinner. The delivery was on time and packaging was decent. We ordered chicken lollipop (chicken was a bit fragile since there wasnt much meat on sticks but it was good) and chicken triple schezwan rice (good). Also the prices r quite reasonable. Overall: Food - 4/5 Delivery - 4/5 Packaging - 3/5 Vfm - 4/5
address: 16th Main, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: good nice
Worst ice cream ever
DBC was very nice. Does total the price. But would appreciate if you don't use Britannia cake in place of brownie. Britannia chocolate cake is powdery and doesn't taste good.
Good taste.i love ice creams from lassi shop,very low price and good taste packing is also good.i never tasted any where this type of ice creams
browne was bad
address: 283/1, 3rd Cross, JP Nagar 3rd phase,next to mini Forrest, Bangalore

user_reviews: I ordered chicken briyani at 2.49am,after 15 min i got call from customer care,that restaurant not available chicken briyani, so go for muttan are egg briyani finally i select muttan briyani , after 30 min the restaurant people cancelled my order , with out my permission,very disappointed and very very poor service
it was tasty!
The food was awesome and it was warm i recommend this restaurant so all should try this restaurant for great taste and quality the cost is also worth it
nice food
no spicy n taste waste of money
address: 2nd Main Road, SR Compound, Arekere Mico Layout, South City, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: You will get very less quantity and taste wise is that awesome. I think quality and quantity should be improved. Agree, you may like if your taste buds are adapted, else would differ completely from the originals.
address: 479/496/A, 2nd Block, BTM 6th Stage,Arekere, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: Busy restaurant with decent marwadi food, the food was just average but the desserts were really good. Service is fast as expected. Butter milk was little stale I believe.

Been here for dinner on Sunday.  Food : 4/5 - As always the food served in rajdhani was delicious and good in quantity. If you want to eat like a king come here.  Ambiance: 3/5 - compared with other rajdhani outlets the ambience was not that good. The seating space though was good.  Service: 4/5 - good service overall.

The rating is only for food and service because the ambience is very plain Jane and I think that applies to this chain. Rajasthani food was mostly authentic and tasty. Service was quick as well. You can surely visit especially if you are hungry,and that's when it is just vfm.
We went for full family dinner ?. Nice place with simple and cosy environment . Thali has lots of variety and most of the items were tasty. Food - 4/5 Ambience - 4/5 Service - 4/5

A royal western Indian vegetarian Thali, especially on days other than Tuesday. It usually becomes a bit heavy for me, the taste is something to look out for! Have been there multiple times and was never disappointed!
address: 3rd Floor, Royal Meenakshi Mall, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Their shawarma is the best. Havent really tried any other dishes of theirs yet. Quantity is pretty less compared to the prices. An average place.
It?s a small place in btm.. very average food and hospitality.. we had spring rolls, dragon rolls and so called sangria which tasted really bad.. you can avoid the place if you are in btm.

They mismatched the veg and nonveg items.this kind of behavior is not acceptable.on contacting zomato they said apologies and they hope to serve better next time. Food review:paneer was sour,the flat noodle wasnt upto mark.chicken was okay.watons sucked big time. Highly dissapointed from this restaurant.

Was surfing for a working lunch and something within my budget and something Chinese  Found this on the Zomato app for order in only Yummy fried rice with generous amount of chicken Manchurian and a caramel shake to wash it down  The quantity large Quality good Packing very neat Total paisa vasooli

Ordered through online, placed order for Chicken Fried rice and Noodles. Packaging was OK with cutleries Bit disappointed with the fried rice as bit tasteless with less salt. Having half boiled omelet on top of the food separately didn't go well with the overall taste as traditionally had fried rice mixed with rice.  Coming to noodles overall the taste is good could have been better with the scrambled eggs rather than small half boiled omelette. Could have had bit lesser oil
address: 240, 7th cross, 1st Main, Mico Layout, Opposite Sate Bank of India, 2nd Stage, BTM Bangalore

user_reviews: Missing item and extra charge 200

Need a decent place for lunch/dinner in Gottigere? Consider this joint.  What's good here: Grilled Chicken (available in evenings, post 6PM)  Quantity: A full grilled chicken is apt for 3 people.  Ambience: Okay-ish. The food compensates for the ambience.
Not that great food u can have the food here when u r in hurry. The service is quick which helps in emergencies situations, Hygiene is ok not that great

It?s good to have the biryani plate and the gravy chicken also nice in taste and spicy but it?s not have thick gravy. The naan is okay the tandoori item are good above avaerage I must say so basically try biryani and tandoori items and it?s cheap and tummy full items.
Tandoori chicken is super tasty I like tandoori here good service but time they Will take more but tasty food. Planning to try other dishes.
address: 98/3, Near Food World, Gottigere, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore
Near Decathlon, Meenakshi Layout, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: food is too bad not Worthy added too much of salt to butter naan it is not at all tasting like a naan and it is too hard and even panner butter masala is also not good
no sweet n papad
Very nice Taste, really awesome
I have order ghee rice but they send geera rice stupid service by udapi hotel kanakapura road
food not good,
address: N Pramil & Amith Complex, Rajiv Gandhi Road, Jaraganahalli, Kanakapura Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: It is a basic restaurant & offers value for money . Nothing special about the taste & ok service . Landed here since wanted to try out some new place in my neighbourhood.
I wanted to give it a try, since it looked quite attracting from outside and I was equally disappointed with the food, as they lack the savour and chicken in the gravy was not even cooked well..

Amazing place good foooddd my first preference if i am on bannerghatta road for sime work will never miss lunch here there biryani gravys and grilled chicken i amazing and every alternative day i buy grilled chicken to home so addicted food 5******
Head over to Chicken County for their Grilled Chicken. It's absolutely fantabulous (ideal blend of fantastic and fabulous) and a must try if you happen to visit. Their chicken biryani is great too.

Food was ok, but service was terrible. Waiters don't care about guests at all, they can't even give two menu cards at same table, it was like Guest will take it with them. Never seen such ridiculous hospitality. Very disappointed
address: 13, Opposite Auchan Hyper Market, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: I knew this was going to be a good experience right off the bat - for the care that went into packing the food for a delivery order was clearly visible. It was proper! There was zero spillage, as it happens with most dessert orders. I ordered for an English Tosca Sundae, the quantity was generous and so was it for the chocolate sauce which came in a separate jar. I never really ran out of the sauce, and had enough to continue pouring onto the never ending bowl of sundae!

One of the finest place to have Ice Cream ?  They have very good varieties of ice cream, milk shake, pastries and service is very good?  Ambience is very pleasant to chill with friends ??  They have live counter and pleasure to see how they prepare the ice Cream roll?  I just loved the roll over ice cream and it was so delicious and yummy..  I took devil chocolate chip it was well garnished and looking so cute?

They have a great selection of ice creams and sundaes. They have fries available with a variety of dips. I tried the irish coffee love from the gourmet plates section which came with irish coffee rolls, tiramisu cake and a cup of chocolate which was thick and rich,though the cake could use a little more flavour the ice cream was good. The place is very clean and perfect for family visits and hangouts.

Nice presentation by some skilled people. I guess we tried smoor sundae and devils chocolate... One had a huge jelly piece while the other had low quality chocolate sauce and ice cream. Menu was missing kid friendly and non dry fruit and fresh fruit ice cream options. Desserts quality was slightly low when compared with the lights of cream Stone or corner house or stoner. Can do better!

They have a nice setup on jp nagar to puttenhalli road.. Took a caramel chocolate based Sunday and a paan flavor roll!! Ambience is nice and the paan ice cream was nice and had real sweet supari which gave a nice fresh flavour. The ice cream sundae was okok
address: 10, Ground Floor, 24th Main, Ayodhya Nagar, 5th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Chicken Sandwich is yummy.. have ordered them multiple times and it always tasted the best. It tatses so fresh and honestly ull crave to eat more... highly recommended However there fried rice is not so great...

I am picky when it comes to momos, and I must say this place does a decent job in satisfying my taste buds.  Steam and Fried Chicken Momos are splendid. 8 pieces a plate, and a super spicy Chutney.  Wanna try something new? Order up their Chilli Momo Chicken (tastes better with Beer). Cheers!
This restaurant has some of the best momos and fried rice I?ve ever had. The staff is very friendly and cater to our customisations with utmost kindness. The food is very authentic and tasty!
Very pocket friendly and good food they have, best chicken momos and chicken lollipop. They never disappoint with food, a must have place.
Very tasty momos
address: Near AECS Maruthi Dental College, Doddakammanahalli, Bannergatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: We had never heard about yhis kerala cuisine earlier. I am so content not because I was just hungry, because the items were all delicious. Usually all kerala shops stop with sambar, poriyal, rasam, pickle and Pappad they had pachadi, chutney, fish curry, salad, puliyinchi, kootukari and nonetheless their lemon juice is just brilliant. We chose beef roast and chicken curry as sides. Beef roast was tasty. No extra charges for extra pappads I took. Really an amazing kerala cuisine. Now that's going to be dunzoed to my place often. Good place for kerala food hunters
address: 25th Main, 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: my review 11th january 2019. it?s awesome eve @ bangalore. decided to have a visit at lalbaag. but kids were hungry so orderedchicken myonaise sandwich and avocado juice through ubereats at savoury..delivery time expected was 3:40pm but delivered at 4:10\U0001f975?.. Alas what delivered was chicken manchows soup??? and avocado juice.avocado was tasty and thick one.one of the best avocado i ever had.but how kids accept soup instead of sandwich.it was not at all ok for kids... decided to reorder and called at restaurant (08049994999 number) ... too desperate reply from savoury which i never expected... the one who attended the cal just cut the fon by saying contact uber eats..mistake was surely from restaurant side.. However uber refunded amount for us.

Pathetic Grilled chicken as it has only bones and no chicken. Adding to that the staff behaviour was so bad. We saw the chicken and had one piece to realize it was just bomes and we returned it and obviously who will agree to pay for masala and bones?  So yes post that never ever been there.  Empire Restaurant which is opposite to it is a must visit for chicken.

Had heard about this restaurant that it's famous for Arabic food. Ordered Pepper chicken BBQ. The taste was very good. Next tasted Mutton Biryani. It was normal in taste. The ambience is simple and regular. Friendly staff.  Follow @explorewithketan1 on Instagram to explore more eateries ?

Good collection of platters here! They had platters that could serve a big table! We ordered Naans, butter chicken, dal tadka and rice. Chicken biryani here was also great! Parking can be a bit difficult in this narrow road during peak hours
What a place... Yammy yammyy..love the sawarma from here..it as so yummy n i m love of with sawarma.. Ambience is good..though cudnt taste more cuisins..only had sawarma but it was rocking..
address: 10, Near Maruti Sagar Automobiles, Bhavani Layout, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Just had Chocolava cake and chocolate truffle cake. Truffle was out of the world. Not too sweet and the chocolate quality was A class. But Chocolava could have been more tasty. Something was missing. Overall, great bakery nearby my home. Abhisek Gayen
address: 1, 7th Main Rd, NS Palya, Stage 2, BTM 2nd Stage, Bengaluru, Karnataka

user_reviews: Had ordered the Bombay masala quesidilla and the veg Mac and cheese. The quesidilla was stuffed generously and cooked to perfection. Veg Mac and cheese came with a good amount of cheese. A great dish for little ones as well.  The food was delivered hot and the quantity was good owing to the price.

Only delivery but no live Tracking . Not yet delivered . Not knowing proper locations. Or not asking locations properly or picking location from Zomato. Very bad experience. Delivery guys number mostly switch-off Not refunding the amount back also. Give coupon to order later. The one who can't deliver now , how he will deliver later. If u r doing delivery make sure delivery buys are not drunk

Firangi Bake, a huge delivery outlet chain delivers one of the best and cheesiest lasagne in town, it's highly recommended.  Their delivery is super prompt and food is absolutely drooling.  Along with lasagne there was mac and cheese which was okayish, couldn've been better.  To conclude, it was a good experience. Recommended.

There are a few places who know what lasagne is and firangi bake is one of them. We tried both the versions, the veg as well as the non-veg version of lasagne. The food came in quick and was neatly and nicely packed and even the aroma itself was enough to make us drool all over. The veg version had a layer of baked mozzarella cheese with crumbled cottage cheese, corns and veggies nicely tucked in between the lasagne sheets. They dish was baked to perfection and the presence of oregano, salt and pepper made all the difference. The non-veg version was no less than the veg one where minced chicken carrying a tantalizing taste was stuffed below the baked layer of mozzarella along with veggies. Though we are die hard non-veg lovers but in this case we found the veg one to be a notch higher than the later one.  All in all, we loved the dish and we soon will be trying the other dishes offered by the outlet soon

Who has ever said no to cheese!? The food I had from Firangi Bake was rich, cheesy and delicious!  ? Tandoori Kukkad Rice Pot: Beautifully cooked rice with chunky and soft pieces of chicken. Amazing.  ? Veggie Pot Rice: Absolutely filling and satisfying. Good choice for vegetarians!
address: 161 A, First Floor, Vinayaka Nagar, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Bedridden and after scouring through a number of restaurants for satiating my piping hot soup cravings, I landed onto Zaitoon's page. I had a hard time deciding to order from here coz the options are plenty. I ordered for a simple Chicken hot n sour soup. It turned out really amazing, the taste, texture, balance of flavours were just on point also with the ample amount of chicken and veggies it had in it. Im honestly craving for another bowl of it right now. Just a word for the packaging, it probably can be made a little better than what it is. The plain white run of the mill container did no justice to whats inside. Jusssayyin!
If it's time for Arabian, it should be zaitoon. The best Arabian in d town. Staff are very friendly and have good knowledge of dishes. They will suggest and explain food so well. U must try.
I ordered special chicken shawarma roll which literally made me run to the loo. It was spoiled and I threw it. Spoiled food from a reputed restaurant!

Ambience 9/10 Food 8/10 Service 8/10  Zaitoon in JP Nagar is a two floor building with the first floor for dining and the 2nd floor is a party hall. The location looks very grand on entering and they have a take away shop in the ground floor. They are known for thier grills and meat dishes and this is one area that they do not disappoint.  They serve a wide array of cuisines from Chinese to indian to Arabic. All their food is good for the price point. This location has a buffet which is priced at 599 and for that price it's extremely worth it. There isn't another buffet in the city that offers prawn fish chicken and lamb in the starters and in the main course for 599. Some of the food is under salted but I think that is because most Arab cuisine is on the blander side. Zaitoon also has an amazing offer during Ramzan where they give a box with meal for just 399. That is also delicious.  I would rate this restaurant 8/10

Had chicken shawarma, chicken plate special shawarma, malai chicken kabab and tandoori chicken from here. Tandoori chicken was very juice and well done, a little on the hotter side. Plate shawarma was good, but came with only one kubbus, was a little surprised at that. The regular shawarma and the malai kebabs were tasty. The price point is a little bit high, compared to the quantities, but quality is pretty good.
address: 21, 24th Main Road, 6th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Decent biryani with 2 pieces kabab, gravy and salad. There was no sweet in the delivered pack though the description of combo included a sweet as well.

kundana...... we went for a movie to vegacity and was searching for a typical andhra lunch and could found kundans board appearing nearby and finally we went there and ordered thali which was really Yum ? mostly the best was authentic mango and tomato pickle which was too good and was giving best company to the thalis a must visit place to have the authentic feel of Andhra.

I was not sure about this resturant, never heard of it. Thought to give it a try so ordered Chicken Dum Biryani.  It was surprisingly good, one of the best biryani. It was really yummy and the chicken was well cooked. Quantity of biryani rice was just right. It's a must try place for biryani lovers.

First point I have impressed with this restaurant is they have paid enough attention for spl instructions which we mention at the time of placing order... am not sure abt this can happen in everybody case but its happen with me.... Coming to taste its quite good and andhra reason people can enjoy thoroughly am talking abt veg dishes related only.... NON-VEG is out-of-box 2 me... if any one reach near Vega city and that time if u feel u r starving then go and dig in...

The name shows it is a Andhra Cuisine Restaurant. They are Andhra + Chinese + North Indian cuisine. They serve one of the best Andhra Meals. I havw tried their Biryani. Very nice biryani and much better than Meghana. The spices are different than regular biryani spicea. They serve Rambo Biryani which is the best biryani i ever had. They also serve Guntoor Chicken which was also very nice. They also serve some Chinese dishesh which are really good. I am their regular customer. This place is definitely recommended for Andhra people. Much better option price wise than Nagarjuna and other restaurants. Very good food without a big hole to pocket. Overall everything is good here even the ambience.
address: 176, 1st Floor, Above Vodafone Store, Opposite Brand Factory, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: The chicken fried rice were amazing, though the service was a bit slow but still its a nice place. Also, the deals here are pocket friendly so a must try place!!

Am not at all satisfied with the food, I ordered for 1* FKM Ghee Rice Combo, tase of ghee rice is not al all good, Dal taste is good, Chilli Chicken is ok pls try to improve the quality of the food it's my request   ***Coming to the quantity if you want to give less quantity chose the bowl (Food Box) accordingly, after adjusting the food properly one fourth box is still empty, pls don't do that, I think the box which you gave is common in size if you fill the box properly it will come with 450 - 500 Grams of Cooked Rice, whatever the food pack you chose, you have to fill it properly that gives the best impression at first very next to that is taste.

Sub standard quality... No necessary to sell cheap meals with sub standard quality... Customers are ok to pay if quality is good. Orders a chicken thali.. dal was watery will no traces of lentils... Chicken gravy was stale and ice cold.
address: Shop E 1 / 146, G P Rajarantham Road, BTS Layout, Arekere Near Goverenment Hospital, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: This place is good if you wanna have a shawarma roll as a small snack. Since I only had a single kabbus shawarma roll I will be purely giving my review on that. In my opinion definitely not the best shawarma I have had. The quantity, the roll is so damn small that u can finish it in just 4 big bites. The taste is good but not as good when compared to other shawarma joints. The thing that disappointed me the most is the size of the roll. It's so small, it's like a mother shawarma gave birth to a premature baby shawarma. Definitely can be bigger for the price. No complaints about the service. Won't say that I recommend this place for a snack all the time.

There is nothing better than getting shawarmas home delivered after a really long and tiring day! What's better? They prepare the shawarmas right in front of the riders when they arrive so as to make sure that the food reaches warm. They have a brilliant "customise your shawarma" option where you can literally create what you like and it will reach your plate hand crafted. Thank you for the amazing food. Cheers!

Just happend to be here at the wrong time probably!!!  Had all these Zomato and Swiggy guys swarming the place like flies , had to wait for 15mins for the food  ??Ambiance?A small shop with clean surroundings?  ??Food?Had the jumbo plate , Nothing great not a lotta chicken most of the plate was filled with onions and tomato?Such a let down  ??Price?100bucks for a quick snack , resonable ?  ?I doubt I'm ever coming back

When you are really really hungry your eyes start playing tricks on you. I read the ?Rumali Jumbo Whole Meat Shawarma? as ?Rumali Jumbo Whole Wheat Shawarma? and thought I had made a mistake by ordering too much. But when my order arrived, I realised the serving was not as unmanageable as I thought it would be. Unfortunately due to the rain it took some time to be delivered - about 55 minutes as against the predicted 42 minutes. And that had a role to play in the cold serving. The main reason for just 3 Stars is because the garnish was not as indicated - I got one each of 1inch piece carrot and cucumber and half a chilli in a small plastic packet. Frankly, they need not have bothered. Taste-wise - nothing extra-ordinary.

The shawarmas at the shawarma shop are best in taste till now in Bangalore. As I really tasted previously tasteless shawarmas in Bangalore city. I am definitely gonna order again. Perfectly stuffed with chicken n other things. Rumali roti was soft yet not soggy. Stomach filling.
address: 688, Opposite IWWA Party Hall, 7th Main, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: Momo Junction, is a one-stop place for momo lovers. I was craving for momo, and had from Momo Junction; a good spread of chicken momo.. I loved them thoroughly.  The price they charge for 8 piece of momos, is worth it.. Fried chicken momos were out of the world. It was crispy, juicy, and yummy. Perfect fried momos. Hope they maintain that quality for time to come.. ??  Steamed chicken momos were tasty too. They were small in sizes but perfect for the price they charge.  Just keep up the great work.. Loved your momos. The red sause was complementing the momos perfectly. .. ??  I came across few reviews in the page, people cursing MOMO Junction for not delivering with mayonnaise. I mean seriously, who eats momos with mayonnaise..?? it tastes good with red firey sauce..??  Please keep up the good work..??  Happy ordering guy!! ????
address: 1058, Sobha Arcade, Bilekahalli, Vijaya Bank Layout, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Zero degree is right below Subway in bannerghatta road very close to Apollo hospital serving good sandwiches, burgers, wraps, hot dogs, fries, ice creams including sundaes, mocktails etc.  What all items tried?  1. Spicy grilled chicken sandwich 2. Mutton burger 3. Khatta meetha ice cream 4. Cherry bomb milk shake, 5. Coffee 6. Coffee couplet sundae 7. Shahi gulab ice cream scoop 8. Lychee caramel ice cream scoop  What you must try here?  I loved the mutton burger. Priced at 130 is worth it. Try the coffee couplet sundae too, it tastes great and for coffee lovers it is a must. Filter coffee flavor is great, however do modify it as per your taste.  Overall, the ambience is good for an ice cream parlor, presentation is decent. One needs to have patience to wait for the food to be served.    cupcakesontravel.blogspot.com

You can never imagine that there is this place beyond that glass door. You will be amazed to see the decor inside. They have a top notch ambience for a cafe. They basically serves all day breakfast/snacks menu. Their Ice Creams are very special. They have all natural ice creams. The most famous ice creams are Tamarind and Pineapple Pudding. We tried both and they were excellent. I have tried Tamarind ice cream earlier but this one is amde perfect with blending sweet and sour taste of tamarind upto the mark. Their sandwiches are also really good. Also they serves the mocktails. Cherry Bomb is the mocktail we tried. It was very refreshing and taste very unique. They have unique way to prepare and also it is a secret. Overall the cafe is one of the best to try in this area . The ambience and food both are great here.
address: Opposite IIMB, Krishnaraju Layout, Sundar Ram Shetty Nagar, Bilekahalli Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Not every place that serves rolls is able to maintain their food quality and delivery standard like faasos has. Been the nth time that I have ordered food from here and I have never been disappointed.  This time I had their paneer tikka wrap and the quantity is just amazing. One roll and you are full! Also, the rolls are packed so well that it makes it easy to eat even while travelling.

Ordered 2 items. One item was incomplete first time delivered. Hence Panda contacted Support. There on, all they are worried about is some OTP that the customer receives on phone.  The delivery boy is almost harassing for the OTP. Before he wasn't able to access the building to provide delivery but for the OTP he came to the door and rang bells constantly.  The delivery boy also wasnt ready to hand over the incomplete item until and unless i gave him the OTP. My food, i order, i pay, you profit and i get troubled? Hence people choose swiggy and not faasos delivery, all due to the overwhelming hassles and troubles. In future i wont order itself. Need food not a headache.  A very very very bad experience. Also since then, this faasos outlet has been constantly calling. Delivery is supposed to be a good experience not to irritate the customer to their core.

Ordered Navratri thali from fasoos. I was very happy with the thali. The thali consisted of sabudana kichdi, 2 sabudana vada, paneer curry, hare tamatar ki subzi and sabudana kheer. The subudana vada was really good. The tamatar subzi was very amazing. So unique. Very tangy. Loved it. Didn't really like the sabudana kheer. It wasn't sweet at all. Fasoos Navratri thali is the perfect festive food. The packaging was done well.

Had ordered the singhada aloo paratha meal as part of the navratri special review program.  Did not for a moment felt that the meal was without onion and garlic. Liked the concept of separate meals for the festive season.  The taste overall was nice. Loved the sweet dish. Everything in the meal was up to the mark the pack was enough for one person.

I ordered the aloo paratha combo during the navratri special meal offers.the food was delicious..the aloo paratha filling was delicious.the sabudana vada was the best in the combo.. They made a sweet out of raw mangoes which was nothing like I have tasted before.totally loved the combo.
address: Shop 161,161A,166, First Floor, Vinayaka Nagar, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Small place on the corner right opposite to brigade millennium.  Heaven for people dining out daily, pure vegetarian, pocket friendly and tasty food.  First I visited this place as I wasn?t having much options left after 10 pm in surrounding area for a pure veg meal. It wasn?t disappointing but it wasn?t that great as well.  Second time I visited this place on an afternoon as this was the closest option I did have. This time the experience was altogether different.  Basic set up, small outlet like staff, punjabi aunties as owners. That?s all for ambiance.  Food taste is good and few options are too delicious.  Must try - aloo kulcha
Really delucious food. Ordered the balle balle thali at an offer price of 99/-.2 big rotis with rice dal paneer alloo sabji and ladoo. Really loved it
address: 44/1, Opposite Brigade Millennium, Kothanur Dene Main Road, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: I ordered food from mealer. Packing of all food was great. Price was also reasonable. Rajma rice was good in taste and also the quantity is good for one person. The rice was good but not as soft as I would like it to be, I guess it is personal preference. Good flavours overall.

The food was so so so good. Delivery was on time too. I ordered few snacks and a meal for more like evening snacks and dinner together. Every dish I had ordered turned out to be delicious. A definitely recommendation from my side.

If you are hungry and you don't wanna step outside and want better choices in food than junk food, mealer to the rescue.. The food is amazing. Quality wise and quantity wise and also money wise. So many options in a delivery outlet makes me happy, because now I can keep ordering and trying more dishes..

The sheer variety, veg and non veg options, the way they are packed stylishly and the way they get delivered every time on dot is like a precision clock work ...Their menu is extensive and so are the variants of desi khana...Dal Makhni is good.Kadhi chawal is good.I would recommend this place to everyone.

On the contrary, I tried mealer for snacks.It was evening, I was back home early and not really in the mood to cook or go out. Just wanted to relax in my sweatpants and eat good food and watch some series.Saw mealer on zomato.They had ample of snack options and hence I placed an order.The Bombay masala sandwich was tasty.Also liked the masala omelette.
address: 175-176, Dollars Colony, Phase 4, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Ordered Chicken Manchurian and French fries Manchurian was OK in taste but a bit too oily which also affected it's taste French Fries were also just OK Well cooked but not crispy enough This place seems to have good rolls though.. will have to try those

Loved the taste of the roll. Great taste just loved it. ?? Best ever roll tasted. I had mushroom roll and just melted in the mouth. Great work. Would love to visit this place again and again. If you eat roll the must try is out. You would definitely love it. Thanks for the great taste.

For this joint, only advice would be to stick to rolls only, especially non-veg ones. My favourite is 'Double Pathan special'. Although for a price point of 115 bucks, it's on expensive side.  Extras are not worth the bother. Stick to non-veg rolls only.

Ordered chicken fried momos from there.The taste was good although and delivery was also in time but was quite oily and the outer coat was very chewy. Had chicken nuggets also there and those were cold and not at all tasty

I got to know of Pathaan Sir through Zomato. Turns out they have 7 odd stores in Bangalore. So I choose this place when I felt like binging on rolls. I ordered two combos. A combo has a roll, fries and momos. I tried the Pathaan special and spicy baby corn rolls. Fries you get are actually the masala fries that are quite common these days. But they didn't taste great. Wasn't fried well. Momos tasted below average. Probably the weakest item present in the combos. As far as the rolls are concerned, they are packed in long carton wraps, but the rolls are much smaller in comparison. I don't know whether they intentionally reduced the size because it comes in a combo. If they did, it doesn't make sense because one orders a combo to get more items of the same value at a lesser price. Rolls were ordinary I'd say. Overall, quality was on the downside. No delivery issues though.
address: 16th Main, 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: I bet this place has a less rating because of the price.  Believe me, their ice creams are all worth it. A word from a sucker for shakes and ice creams.  I've tasted close to 7-8 flavors and sundaes here, and they never disappoint me.  The shakes are also good, but best to head here to try a new flavor every time.  The staff is friendly, polite and very lively. While the ice creams get you in high spirits, the lively staff only heighten the experience.  The decor and seating can be improved.

Cold stone creamery  Suitated in vega city mall, outlet looks cute and good..  I heard they have very good ice cream so I went and took there signature chocolate with peanut butter ice cream tasted like normal ice cream?seriously nothing much to say about it..

This is present in Vega city Mall third floor in the food court. The ice cream's are amazing and one of the tastiest flavours. The ice cream had the new Aquaman sponsor..after finishing the movie couldn't resist to buy that special edition Aquaman ice cream

Tried icecream here at vega city mall. We had sweet cream base icecream with brownie caramel sauce chocolate sauce and nuts. They served in the same concept of beating the icecream with all ingredients. The taste was mediocre... didn't really like the sweet cream base. The size of brownie was as tiny as coin. Can get better over all.
We were out at night and decided to visit this desert shop. We ordered Lave Cake Ice Cream and Litchi I?ve and it was good. It is definitely worth visiting once.
address: 3, Third Floor, Vega City Mall, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: A different way of serving a sandwich. Cut it into small bytes. Taste is unique, however can be improved. Portion size is small. (Normal small bread size)  Service is slow. Probably can give another try.

I tried Sandwich at it's main branch in Jayanagar 2 years back and I liked that very much. Few days back saw it's new outlet in BTM and thought of giving a try. Here the items we tried :-  * Veg Special Sandwich  * Hari Special Sandwich  * Chocolate Sandwich  * Hari Special Pizza  All Sandwich were good in taste. But if you still ask to prioritize. Best - Hari Special Sandwich Second Best - Chocolate Sandwich Third - Veg Special Sandwich  Pizza was small in size. And it was damn tasty and filling. Good amount of cheese was there and of good quality too. The toppings used were perfect. Oregano was good too.  Don't like to compare but still I want to tell that it is much better than those Domino's and PizzaHut Pizza.  Cost was Rs 210 including small thumbs up. But after MagicPin app discount cost was Rs 80 only. Kind of cherry on top.  Overall awesome experience. Hope they keep the same quality in future also. Thumbs Up.
Value for money I guess. But was expecting sandwich bread..whereas we got normal bread. So bottom line portion size is small. So order more if u are hungry. :D
address: 24, Shop 2, Ground Floor, 3rd B Cross Road, 18th Main Road, Roopa Nagar, 2nd stage BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: Went to try their authentic Amritsari kulcha when we were in that part of the city. We had a little trouble locating the place as google maps location is not right. (Search for Funky Punjab as it is the same place instead of Amritsari Kulcha Land) The place is open to the street and has basic seating. The staff are not well dressed or clean. Their kitchen needs to be maintained better. The floor was dirty. (Reduced the rating for this) The kulcha was delicious but the chole was very cold. They didn?t bother to even serve it warm. It?s a self service kind of a place.

Authentic amristari food served in bangalore, this is the aim by which this restaurant runs. The owner thrives to bring the best of amritsar to bangalore through this restaurant.  We had - Amritsari aloo kulcha - 4/5 (You would never have eaten such kulcha before. So crispy it was, chole was cold which led to less rating ) Lassi - 5/5 (Proper punjabi) Pepper paneer - 4.5/5 (One of the best i have had) Soya chaap - (4/5) Ajmeri paneer tikka - 4.5/5 (Paneer tikka with ajwain punch, new and unique)  A good place for punjabi food. Totally recommended!

Seen lot of great review and hence went for a bite. We ordered paneer kulcha and mix kulcha with sweet lassi. Kulcha were tasty and well made. Liked the kulchas.  The place is however not for family with kids. It's self serving and having a single counter for both customer and food delivery service, it got very crowded and messy. Plus the priority was food delivery service and hence wait time increases. Also, to get up, place order again and again is not a feasible option or a very comfortable one.  I will not come back with family for sure. It's way too inconvenient.  Food: 5/5 Ambience: 3/5 Service: 2/5

Writing this review as I am so excited and happy to finally found a place which serves Authentic Amritsari Kulcha in Bangalore.   I have tried there Aloo kulcha and I am still drooling over its taste :D. They are made with perfection and I think its better than what I had in Amritsar or Chandigarh.   Kudos to the team for making such good quality Kulchas.   A small request to please work on your Kitchen cleanliness.

The real Amritsar Food is found here. Made my way here for a fantastic Amritsari Kulcha, Lassi and Soya Chap. Pind Da Khana!!  Amritsari Kulcha: Had a chance to taste this fantastic kulcha. The layers and stuffed Aloo inside the kulcha is the real magic. Desi Butter on top enhances the flavour. This stuffed kulcha could be one of the best in Bengaluru. The low tinge of Ajwain to the fantastic tandoor tossed Kulcha is a must try here. The authenticity lies in our city.  Soya Chap: I was really tired of Panner. To my surprise this Soya Chap turned out to be fantastic. Soya chunks were marinated with spices and thick yoghurt. The proportion of spice balance with Soya was perfectly balanced. This is again a must try here.  Sweet Lassi: Stored and refrigerated. Sweet Lassi who was humble and thick.  If you are looking for some authentic Pind Da Khana, this is one of the place. Have a wonderful time. Bon Appetit, Ghatotkatcha
address: 123, 24th Main, Opposite Royal High School, 5th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Too much at decent price. ordered veg thali for the first time at 119 rs. food included chapati ,rice ,alu gravy, paneer and bean sabji, dal curd and salad.salad was not fresh but other items were decent. tasted well and hot.  Quantity: 5/5,more than enough for a single person, specially rice. taste:3.5/5 cost: 5/5 for the quantity and taste provided packaging :3/5, could have been better in sealed packs.  chapati can be improved. it had hardened a little , most probably because it had portion of maida and it had got colder so.  overall 3.5/5

I must say very bad experience at this place we ordered one veg roll in which the vegetables we're not even cooked only properly they just rolled it up in chapati and then we took pav bhaji the same with that also n also no proper response from the staff.

After reading the reviews, thought of giving it a try.. ordered chatpata chicken and schezwan chicken online..delivery was pretty quick..quantity was sufficient for the price paid..the dishes were spicy and yummy..  Recommended!!

Ordered for a chicken fried rice combo and chicken noodles combo. They had delivered chicken fried rice, noodles, chicken hot and sour soup and coke. I was really surprised with the quantity of the food delivered for the price. Coming to the food, it was simply delicious. The rice served was long grain rice, had enough chicken and vegetables and perfect cooked. Noodles also contained generous amount of chicken and vegetables. Chicken manchurian also tasted quite good. Overall a pocket friendly place to order from and will definitely order again.
Ordered Chicken Fried Rice Combo and expected the quality to be in sync with price They prepared the combo with Biryani rice and gave good quantity of everything. Definitely recommended.
address: 22, B.H.B.C.S Layout, Opposite Infosys, 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: Have ordered from this place a couple of times, haven't been disappointed ever. The parathas are quite filling. The accompaniments are curd and one chutney, oh how much I love that chutney. If not for the parathas, trust me I order only for that chutney!!??
address: 725,16th Main, 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: It's literally a place where u get what u pay for or may be little more.  I ordered for a Non-Veg Combo and I was honestly quite shocked when I got it.  There was ample amount of rice even though they say 'half biryani' and the parata's wer fine. The gravy was ok but there was just ONE chicken pieces for the whole thing !!!!  So if ur reallllllyy broke and neeeed something to eat, y'all could try this place.  Peace.
address: 17/1, SNVR Complex, Opposite Royal School, 24th Main, 18th Cross, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Such good Punjabi food that you just find in this branch of btm layout. Loved everything about the place,the food,the Sitting arrangement,the music and service too. I had dal makhni which was amazing. The kadi chawal combo was superb but the rajma chawal was okayish. Every other item of paneer and Gobhi was pretty good. The only reason I gave it 4 stars is because of the desserts. The gajar halwa and kheer was equally bad. Too sweet,not so much effort is put into cooking it even half the amount of decent that their food is. Otherwise I am okay,will still go for the food.

@ BHATINDA JUNCTION We Ordered For Boneless Chicken Curry It Is Slightly Sweet and Roti Is Not Hot, and In Paneer Patratha Paneer Is Less In Quantity And There are Flyes Moving Around My Head. OVER ALL RATING I WOULD GIVE IS 3*  AMBIENCE 3*/5 SERVING 0*/5 QUANTITY 3*/5 QUALITY 3*/5 VALUE FOR MONEY 3*/5

This place is located at the 2nd floor and serves punjabi food at a reasonable price. It has the vibes of Punjabi dhaba, they?ve seating at the bed as well. The place is quite big and Punjabi music is played on the background. I ordered for one non-veg thali. The thali had 2 rotis, rice, dal and chicken curry. The food was really good and it was not at all spicy. The chicken curry was so good. Overall a very nice place and you can get a good view of outside if you seat at left side.
Simple Punjabi food. Period. Nothing fancy. They deliver as promised. ? Their lassi is a must try. And you don't have much option when it comes to the music. You just have to ?.
They make the tastiest parathas and kulchas in the area. Ordered many times Amritsari Kulcha, Onion Paratha, Aloo Paratha, Stuffed Paratha.The quantity of one Paratha is more than enough for one.
address: 36, 29th Main Road, Mahadeshwara Nagar, Stage 2, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: We happen to visit this place on a weekend. Amazing food and ambience. Excellent service given by Mr.Karan. This place is a must visit. We ordered Reshmi silky kabab, chicken biryani and American barbecue chicken. Everything was perfect and loved the taste

Amazing ambience, tasty food and great staff! Makes stories a stand alone place.  I loved the sizzlers there \U0001f929 a balance of spices made it enjoy it to the most   Must try: sizzlers  #rajeshwrites

It's decent place to hang out... Food is quite average. Good ambience though.Even the songs played were good.  F.ood:2.5 E.ntertainment:4 A.mbience:4 S.ervice:4 T.ry:pasta was quite OK.  Pizza was average, pasta was bit good. And I'm sure that's not BBQ.  #eatawesomeliveawesome

Great food, open air cafe ambiance, good music and vibes! Loved the laidback feels. Perfect for a lazy brunch with good food and cocktails. Lived the farm fresh pizza. The ceaser salad could use some work though. Wasn't a big fan. Tried the margherita and tequila sunrise in the cocktails section. Wasn't really happy with the margherita. But tequila sunrise was very well made. They have zomato gold on food. So added point to that . They are definitely better than their rajajinagar counterpart Definitely would love to go back and try more of their menu. Ambiance 4/5 Service 4/5 Food 3.5/5 Music 4/5 Staff 4/5 Drinks 3.5/5
Great ambiance, good food quantity n quality, Great service by Mr Milan.. recommended to be visited with company of friends. No waiting required ..
address: 15, 24th Main Road, 1st Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: good service
I had visited to this restaurant couple of times. Awesome meals served in banana leaf. staff are so friendly and dishes are so good especially Non-veg.  Spicy lovers will enjoy a lot.

I have had my first Hyderabadi Biryani from here. It tasted good with all the spicey hot taste. With the complimentary raita with the biryani I enjoyed it perfectly. I have had Kolkata biriyani before as it is my home. But I found this Hyderabadi biriyani quite awesome with all the hot, salty and a little touch of sweet flavour.
chicken fry quantity is very less.not satisfy
Good to have Andhra style meals in leaf. Food was nice. Place to have was bit congested. We should try gongura pickle with Dal then we will get different taste.
address: 777, 16th Main Road, 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: The veg noodles and baby corn manchurian that I ordered was a BLAST of taste. I loved the baby corn Manchurian. A little excess oil in veg noodles but it's okay. Well together it was a nice combo after noon meal. Thanks.

Dear Sir. I used your app to see whether or not I am getting what I ordered for. That is the reason why I opted for Cash on delivery. 1) The food I ordered was definitely not from Sagar Grand. 2)It must have been from a 3rd rate hotel. 3) I had placed the order specifically as with veg gravy. There was no gravy, instead a tomato ketchup. 4) I am deleting your app. 5)I hope you will come up with something better and honest service. Good night. Bindumadhav Hunnur.
Seriously bad very bad with this food u people have delivered to us very less quantity of rice.. Not expected than what is shown in the picture worst.. K won't order hereafter frm this restaurant
I loved it... worth the price... good quality n super taste.. thanks a lot.. North Indian thali?.. they really do justice for wat they charge.. thank you

When you think of great food, delivered at the luxury of your house, then think only of this restaurant. Loved the food and authentic taste :) They prepare great varieties. Do try out their Butter Masala Dosa and also don't miss their paneer chilli gravy - its just yumm. I keep trying their various dishes and just can say that I am so satisfied with ordering from here on a daily basis.
address: 123, 5th Cross Road, Arakere Gate, Araka Mico Layout, Arekere, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Kanti sweets is extremely close to my house. I've always loved their kaju Barfi and samosas. Their kachoris are not bad too. Extremely famous brand.
I love Sohan papdi from here!! It?s so tasty ? It?s best place for sweets! I shop here for every festival when I go my home! Service is good and quick!
Kanti sweets gets this rating only for its sweets and cookie sticks.. Those are definitely yummy.. But the chaats are a big let down.. Overtly sweet, this place is not for chaats.

Amazing shop for any sweet tooth??. I order from here whenever I want to have good Indian desert or on any occasion. Everything is Pure and fresh.Savoury items are also nice. Jalebi and Ghewar are my favourites.
Good place to buy heigenic sweets and snacks. Try Kaju burfi, it is simple and decent. Although the chats are a bit down and they need improvement.
address: 16, 7th Phase, RBI Layout, Puttenahalli, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: I ordered food  from UBQ by Barbeque Nation JP Nagar more than one occasion.  I mostly ordered the combos. After Discount I got it at very attractive price. The Paneer Lazeez and Dal Makhani was good in taste. However Naan and butter Naan was not at par. They made it like a Tandoori Roti.  Love the Angoori Jamoon . Paneer Tikka is also good.  However, there is a room for improvement. Overall, The price of the combo at Swiggy as well as Zomato is quite attractive.

Ordered veg biriyani from here. Food has less/ no spice to my South Indian taste buds. They had channa added in the biriyani more like the tamarind rice. Trying to figure out which part of our country is making biriyani with channa in it. Quantity ?- 2 ppl can have. Fairly good portion. Package was good too with raitha and cucumber slices in boxes. This is a cusp of pulao, biriyani & tamarind rice
worst service ever by the resturant..
Hasan and Shaidun have offered excellent service. Food, as usual, was extremely good...expected from Barbeque Nation ?... Waiting to visit again soon

Please don't order Biryani from this place! It's a scam! They just gave me bland yellow rice in the name of Biryani! Total rip-off! Extremely upset with the quality of food delivered. Never ordering from BBQ again!!
address: 67, Phase 3, Sarakhi Industrial Layout, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: too much salt
very strange taste... could not eat
Ordered veg biryani. It was not up to that . It is more spicy and contained pepper and cloves. The boondi raita was very nice and I loved that
No sweet provided
superb !
address: 54, 5th Cross, Thayappa Garden, Devarachikkanahalli Main Road, Bilekahalli, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: One of the better option in BTM to have good value for money meal. Chicken Hyderabad Biryani was awesome and so was it's Kolkata Chicken Biryani. However service is very laid back so better to opt for home delivery.
address: NS Palya, Stage 2, BTM Layout, Bangalore

user_reviews: I tried Veg Combo Meal. The mealbox included babycorn ,salad , curd rice , veg biriyani , mix veg , roti and gulab Jamun. The packaging was good. Mix veg tasted really good. Biriyani was okay . Food taste can be improved. Overall a nice combo.

Nice place to change your taste. We ended up here because we were out nearby and we couldn?t find any other different option. Staffs are very humble and helpful. Service is bit slow though restaurant was quite empty. Taste is really good. We had Chicken clear Soup, Mutton Rogan Josh and Parota. Everything was good in taste. They are famous for their sea food starters. We couldn?t try any and maybe we will come back here soon to taste some of them.

This is one of those places we usually eat from whether getting it home delivered or be at the restaurant. We have tried almost all of their options for Arabian, be it Alfaham, grilled chicken, shawarma plate etc and all of these tastes great but my personal favorite is one of their Arabic dessert called Muhalabuyah which cannot be compared to anything else !! It?s a must try ..

Pros: 1: We got food 2: We were provided water  Cons: 1: Takes ages to deliver food 2. In the name of Arabian food we got very basic kabab with store bought mayo 3. Tasteless mutton and chicken biriyani 4. Wrong order taken even after we were specific about what we don't want, and we were served just that!!! 5. Below average food and the cost is on higher side.

I used to be regular customer of Seasons. But the biryani was horrible. No flavour. Just garam masala with rice. Very disappointed. I want a refund for such a horrible biryani for 280rs. No wonder the restaurant is going down.
address: 7, DSR Galleria, Opp Kalyani Motors, Bilekahalli Gate, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: This is for the first time I am rating a restaurant by 1 star, that too because of the delivery issues..ordered online from this place today..they kept me waiting for more than 2 hours..when tried reaching them, the delivery boy did not pick up the call..after so many attempts, he finally took my call and informed that "since there is a huge rush, it would take extra 45 mins"  I totally understand the situation, but there is a basic courtesy to inform us that it would be late, they never informed us, neither did they cancel my order nor did they take my call..  Totally disappointed with today's situation..and finally with the help of zomato chat support, I asked them to cancel the order and finally after 2 and a half hours, they cancelled my order..  This is for the first time, this happened with me..and I am not happy at all!
address: Shop 1260, SY 35/4, SJR Tower's, 7th Phase, 24th Main, Puttanhalli, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: This is my to go Chinese restaurant mainly because it's very close to where I stay. Chung wah has not disappointed us with their food.  Decent ambiance, good food, good and fast service, very reasonably priced as well.

In the beautiful evening of Friday. Chung Wah was the place we planned to celebrate my wife's birthday. She loves chinese food her love started from the day we visited Taiwan.  It was the best restaurants around our house. Have good menu and very polite staff. Everything we ordered was best except the Lime Juice too much sugar and not happy.  Overall 4/5 food 4.5/5 ambiences 4.5/5 service 6/5 Fun  Cheers

The closest to authentic Chinese I've ever had, food is delicious and the staff is very friendly and prompt. I had the Chopsuey, Seafood manchow soup and the chinese tea during my visits there. The portions we're substantial and the taste is great. It's a family restaurant and their menu is vast. It comes so close the proper Chinese food in the area.The service is quick and the ingredients are fresh. I loved the tea, which is flavoursome, I tasted a bit of jasmine flavour which was perfect for the concoction.

Went to Chung Wah at Arekere today for lunch. The place is in some amount of mess due to ongoing road broadening/Metro construction work. Had to park the vehicle couple of minutes away and walked to the restaurant which is located on the first floor justabove Madhuloka. The ambience is average with the most noticable thing being an artwork depicting Bruce Lee with a bowl of food and chopsticks in is hand ;) I found that funny. The food was good both in terms of quality and quantity. We ordered Chili Chicken with Lemongrass, Chilli Garlic Prawns and Seafood Nasi Goreng. The chicken was a bit sweet and we found it okay. The Nasi Horeng was good and the Chilli Garlic Prawns we're awesome. I utlized my Zomato Gold membership here and the meal for two cost me a very reasonable 500 bucks. Overall satisfied with my experience.

Situated at bannerghatta main road but the place inside doesn't seem noisy. Menu is good and prepared freshly when we visited. Everything arrived on time. Staff also very courteous. Needs a bit improvement in ambience.
address: 3, Arakere Gate, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Giving 3 stars purely for the nostalgia factor. Before the KFCs and the McDonald's came knocking, Indiana burgers were the place to satisfy your burger cravings. After a long time, I felt like having a burger from Indiana and it was okay although it cannot compare to the olden days.  You get generous amounts of mayo with the burger that has a thick patty (or what you would call a cutlet) wedged between two buns. The french fries are like the basic ones you get everywhere else. Packaging is good although you might have to eat the burger quick or it will taste odd when it goes cold. Taste: 2.5/5 Value for money: 3/5 Cheers:)

Horrible food. We ordered from this place as it was among the very few restaurants that delivers late at night. Ordered the chicken whopper. There was an odd smell coming from the burger which was actually from the lettuce leaves. They literally cut and fitted an entire onion in the burger. Coming to the patty, i can't even call it a patty, it was actually a cutlet. They placed a cutlet instead of proper burger patty inside. Absolutely no value for money. Totally disappointing experience with this place.
address: 1, 7th Main Road, NS Palya, Stage 2, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: Very bad food , By mistake i have ordered food from here. I am not going to recommend to anyone.The pictures of the restaurant was seems good & placed the order because of that but mistaken.
The food is good. However, the spice level is a bit on the higher side. I liked what I ordered (Andhra chicken fry). I plan on ordering more food in due course of time. A highly recommended place.
Worst packing ever curry box was completely empty it was on cover and they blame on delivery boys what they can this is mistake off hotel people
Very good food and service . service guy's r verry helpfully.
Very good Tasty and juice first time we eat this type of tandoori chicken. Such a nice time with my family. Thanku moksha thanku zomato. Toooo ?ood
address: 67, Vaishnavi Residency, Next to Yelchanahalli Metro Station, Kanakapura Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: I am very disappointed with the decision of shifting to Bannerghatta from BTM 2nd Stage.. Everyday i used to visit there( returning from office) only for Shawarma..  Best Shawarma i ever had..  Now i don't know how to manage without Marwa's Shawarma.!! ??
address: 21, Ground Floor, B.H.C.S.L Layout, Stage 2, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: One of the ho to places if you are looking for hygienic and yummy chats. Katori chat and misal pao are mind blowing. Try their breakfast items too, their poha and kachori won't disappoint you ??

Quality and quantity - both not up to the mark. Had ordered masala puri, pani puri, sev puri, dhabeli and mango lassi. All the items had a flaw.  Sev Puri was not packed well and half the quantity was gone in the transit. Puris provided in pani puri were broken, dhabeli was bad.  Not recommend..

Chaatimes is a decent place to have chats in JP Nagar. Tokri Chat is my favourite here. Basket chat and palak chat are pretty decent too. The only thing going against them is that they all taste pretty similar with the base being the only exception. I was impressed with the packaging. All the ingredients were separately packed and put together in a box to maintain the freshness. All in all a decent place to satiate your mini hunger pangs.
address: 11, Opposite Sobha Tulip Apartments, 5th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: I absolutely love their food, specially the Thai menu. It's amazing. I have tried almost everything from their menu. The best are Basil Fried Rice with Thai Chicken Curry. Szechuan Rice and Noodles. Chicken Koithio Drums of Heaven  The pricing is also good. The staff here is really nice. They also suggest what to pick. Good portion is served.  Food - 5 Service - 5 Ambience - 4 Staff behaviour - 5

As named, it is a authentic Chinese resturant. Quality of food is awesome. Nice ambiance. Service also too good. You should try Malaka Noodle which is awesome in taste. The noodles are not very thik which i like the most. Strawberry Pop was nice. For car parking no worries.
Excellent place for family Dinner.. Service 5/5 Food 5/5 Ambience 4/5  The food was good (oil can be reduced). Service is excellent. Had good time here.

So we went for shopping on a lazy Saturday to SS near dairy circle and Was craving for some Chinese stuff .. so quickly checked Zomato and based on the ratings Headed to Shanghai court for lunch. It?s a small cozy place on Bannerghatta Road. Service was ok . Coming to food part, ordered dim sim chilli chicken, mixed fried rice, king pao chicken and pie with ice cream as dessert. The food was kinda okay. Not that great. Chicken tasted as if it was frozen for a very long time. First time saw coriander leaves on a Chinese dish! Dessert was good . Ambience - ok price - pocket friendly Quantity- good Taste- lot to be desired

Our favourite place for Indo-Chinese food!! Whenever we are craving for good noodles or American crispy chop suey, we would visit this place. Order anything here, it will be nice. It won't go below average. I like their main courses as well. Momos, Butter garlic noodles, Chilli paneer, Chop suey are our favourites.  Staff is smiling, courteous n friendly. Quite fast service. No reason not to visit again :)  Ambience: 4/5 Service: 5/5 Food: 4/5
address: 1035, 5th Cross, 13th Main, Vijaya Bank Layout, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Biriyani here tastes good, but compared to their price the quantity of biriyani is less. Not a good ambience but the place is neat. The gravy which they are providing for biriyani is varying from person to person .
address: 1, Nayak Layout Gate, B.K. Circle, 8th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: The name in itself is very fascinating, Sweet truth...  I ordered cheesecake, chocolate lava cake and brownies. The packing was amazing, it all came in a cute little blue box.  the cheesecake was amazing I have had worse cheesecakes, but this was just perfect, the light golden crust with the perfect sweetness.   brownies were tasty too, they were hot, topped with dry fruits.  chocolava cake, forget dominos this was so yummm.... it definitely had more chocolate than any chocolava cake.   thank you for satisfying my sweet tooth.

Being not a very hard Sweet Tooth, I rarely need anything like the ones Sweet Truth serve. But I was with my friend and we both started to think about having some sweet thing, checking on Zomato, it was something I ordered. A cheesecake with such a creamy texture are brought in extremely nice packages to keep your cakes as intact as they were. I also had a chocolate cake slice which had on top of it, some caramelized nuts that added flavour to it. The molten lava cake was also one of the nicest molten lava cakes I had eaten in the past. Overall, Sweet Truth was truly a sweet experience :)
