Midnight craving for cheese cake compelled me to order from Sweet truth and totally loved it! Have tried something in red velvet lava ( can't remember the exact name while writing this review now ?) , which wasn't great. Too surgery and and average but definitely recommend the New York cheese cake. Cheers!
address: 69/1, Gowreesha Complex, Opposite Ananda Valmart Apartment, Doddakammanahalli, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: I don't understand why the reviews are so negetive. This is one of the best place in bangalore which serves authentic bengali cuisine. Small place with limited seating arrangements. Menu options are limited, but the food is really nice. We ordered fish fry, chingri malai curry, daab chingri, dhonepata chicken. All the dishes were amazing. Only desert disappointed me, we ordered lancha and nolen gurer ice cream, which were ok, not that fabulous.
Rip off place. Avoid. The food is very oily, the quantity is very less. The price is exorbitant relative to what you get. Won't visit again.

Avoid! That's what I can say. Even if you are desperately hungry, please avoid going to this place. Trust me, you will regret from the time you will enter this restaurant. I visited them on Friday night, extremely hungry and thought they would be serving some good Bengali dishes on occasion on Dusshera/Durga Puja. But to our horror it turned out the other way round. They only had fixed menu, which was around 875 pp for a nonveg thali. We obviously didn't wanted to take that up, as we only wanted to try out few of the dishes. But the waiter strictly told us that we would NOT get anything else apart from the set menu. It was weird. We ordered a Betki fish..which was served cold. Taste was just okay and it was very obvious that it wasn't made fresh. We just pushed off after that as we didn't wanted to ruin out taste buds anymore. Extremely disappointing experience.
Liked the bengali cuisine with limited vegetarian available option. Followed it up with the speciality ice cream, baked rosogulla... service a lot to be desired... enjoy
address: 42, Opposite RV Dental College, 7th Cross, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: This is not open yet. I don't know why it's already showing as open.,......... Please check for the date of opening. Very disappointed for wrong information
address: 1260, SY 35/4, SJR Tower's, 7th Phase, 24th Main Puttanhalli, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Ordered food here seeing the Ad on Zomato. Just done with it and I am totally disappointed! The dal was overloaded with Asofoetida , not sure why would they do this And the biryani did not even taste like Biriyani , it tasted like some South Indian rice bath  infornicle.com
address: 3rd Floor, 5, 3 Road Cross, DLF Main Road, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Found this place when I needed a quick bite. A small & friendly outlet in BTM. It has a very cozy feel to it. The staff is very friendly & food is also good. I tried Momo prepared in Smoked Garlic Sauce & Peri Peri Fries, both of which were upto the mark. If u need something to bite into when you are in BTM, please visit this.  ?? Taste 4.5/5 ?? Ambience 4.5/5 ?? Service 5/5 ?? Hygiene 4.5/5 ?? Value for money 5/5

It is alright that is all I can say about the food, I ordered it in. Schezwan Noodles and Baby Corn Manchurian. The Noodles was really great! But the Baby Corn Manchurian was really disappointing. The sauce was out of place & sweet. And it was very dry to be a dry starter.

Having a craving for Chinese I ordered panner rice combo with Yum in My Tum. It seems to nice seeing the rating of 4 but after receiving the food I think it?s paid. The food was so pathetic that I will not have Chinese for months now..mood spoiled to heights.. rice was chilli garlic which was not at all chilli garlic and uncooked, panner chilli as starter is ok but not so good in taste, paneer manchurian gravy is nothing more than that paneer salt gravy... I think salt is gst free so used in bulk. The only good thing in taste is veg momos which I had with bottle of beer! You need lots of improvement guys ! Packing is great ! No issues In that ! 2 for that only

A small indo-chinese cafe in Btm stage 2. I didn't expect much when I visited. But to my surprise, I would say a pleasant one, they serve really nice Momos, noodles and soup. I tried their hot n sour soup and veg cheese Momos. Was really impressed. So as the name suggests yum in tum and that too without burning a hole in your pocket. Isn't it a great deal..

Thanks @yuminmytum_blr for inviting me to your cute outlet ??? Thanks biplove (chef) for serving us such a yummy dishes.  My review for this cafe;  Dumplin soup -5/5 ( one of the best soup i ever tried )  crispy mayo tossed - 4/5 ( Momo's with Mayonese sauce ?) chilli sessame- 3.5/5 paneer onesta - 3/5  momo cheese sandwich - 5/5 ( my favorite one)  Overall I would rate this cafe 4/5 coz the price for each dish are so reasonable. It starts from Rs 40 -Rs 300.  Everyone who loves Chinese dishes must give a try to this cafe @yuminmytum_blr
address: 766/A, 16th Main Road, BTM 2nd Stage, Bangalore

user_reviews: It reminded me of my home...i have not visited home from a long time...so loved it.??thnku for your food. Much appreciated.?? Keep up the good service.
Had ordered cheese masala Maggie but received plain Maggie and not worth 100 rs Even the quantity and quality is bad My friend had ordered Manchurian Maggie It had nothing but extra Gobi added
Has Jain Maggi ! They put in a lot of veggies, amazingly tasty. I got the one with corn and capsicum. Both were decently cooked and not hard at all.
I understand I ordered the Maggie after 12.30 am but there was no point if I receive a undercooked Maggie. It was horrendous. The veggies added, were not cooked as all.
Maggi doesn't taste good,dont buy food here.. quantity and quality both are worst..bad experience here..what is written in the menu is different and wat they provide is different..
address: 54, 5th Cross, Bilekahalli, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: One of the weasrt restaurant have never seen, don't have manners to pick customer call this is how u guys r treating the people so please don't order food from this people again and never ever

Yesturday we have suddenly decided late night to have some outside food. Simarly searched the nearest one and took the home delivery option. The combo pack of biriyani is a great option as it has all. The biriyani is specially the show stopper. It's juicy, succulent, full of spices and chicken. Really liked the aroma of it and best part is its freshly cooked. Not like some old rotten one. Really appreciate if they continue to serve such foods. Only one thing i notice is the chopped onion which they delivered are not upto the mark.
Fiid was ok ok type. I just tried for first time and only one dish so don't know much about other dishes. Its good to try once. Have not visited no idea about ambience or location.
they shouldn't have items displayed when they can't or won't deliver it

Waste of money.. Ordered chicken biryani, chilli chicken and coke... Trust me coke was the best thing I got.. Neither quality not quantity.. Chicken pieces were not cooked also.. Cheap quality rice were used.. Even I never waste food but taste of biryani was so awful that I didn't have courage to finish it.. About chicken chilli.. Never had such kind of it.. Must NOT buy place
address: Near Decathlon, Meenakshi Layout, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: I have ordered twice, My experience with the food is bad. I didn?t get fresh food and taste was ridiculous. Dessert was fine though but overall it is not good at all and at the same time Zomato?s support is the worst. Swiggy is way better.
Great Food for a reasonable price. Specially I loved paneer chili. It was delicious. Their menu is extensive with all the varities and cuisine. Thank you.

This JP Nagar outlet a newly opened outlet of BMW in Koramangala. It continues to have all the variety that I need and the thali we ordered was well packed and of good quality. Finally we do not have to worry about options in JP Nagar in the night anymore.
The food was tasty, with good packing, and quantity and quality both upto the mark, Justify its name, Surely bhookh mita diya?. Loved the experience.
address: Shop 3, Building 58, A Main Road, Marenahalli, 2nd Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Satisfied with the awesome taste, good quality and quantity, but when they deliver it's better if they check the packed the food properly or not..

One dish that I can eat a lot of times without ever getting bored by it has to be biryani. I have tried biryani in bangalore in so many places and my recent find was biryani miya. I stay in JP Nagar and usually I go to kormangala or indiranagar but that day I really wasn't interested to travel. The food came on time. It was hot and I thoroughly enjoyed the taste.

I am a big Biriyani lover, i can even eat biriyani in all three course of meal.  On opening the lid, the aroma that wafted out was stupendous. The biryani itself had quite a nice colour combination and the taste was marvelous...Highly recommended to all!

Deceitful and disappointing. (Delivery only review) Almost all other reviews here are deceitful/fake/paid, look at their dine-lines and all of them have mysteriously reviewed same places with ratings only 4 and above. Hope Zomato takes note of this.  Pros: 1. The quality of ingredients is above average. 2. Biryani accompaniments are noteworthy and tasty.  Cons: 1. The Zomato images to the actually biryani are worlds apart! Please refer to my uploads. 2. The high price no where justifies a 4 cp tray packaging, which usualy is for executive service only. Biryanis as this price point are supposed to be more worthy than quick meals. 3. It is absolutely not hyderabadi or any other know styles of biryani, tastes more close to masala/fried rice. 4. Quantity wasn't sufficient either.  Overall, other than fresh veggies in raita and taste of salan/gravy served with biryani, everything else is avoidable and disappointing.

This is not a let down place at all.I am so glad that JP Nagar is getting so many new places!I love it...Delivery was a little delayed but the food made up for it. Biryani is soul food and I thoroughly enjoyed my food... Recommended!!!
address: 175-176, Bannerghatta Main Road, Dollars Colony, Behind Vodafone Store, Phase 4, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: The food was sent in a paper bag without separation. No box was sent. Pathetic service.

Got a six pack of donuts (4+2) under some promotion from here. In taste, presentation and variety, Krispy Kreme stands above all it's competitors. It's my go to for an afternoon snack. The location in the mall is a little inconvenient, but it's not all that bad.
Had awesome chocolate donut and enjoyed the fullest. Bit pricey however quality is great. Would like to try more in the coming days. Kudos!!

Very bad service...never choose home delivery from here. i ordered 6 donuts for around 420rs and got just 2 donuts out of which one wasn?t even the donut i chose they just kept whatever they wanted. It has happened to me not just once but several times whenever these people don?t have the donut ordered by the customer they keep whatever they want and send. Pathetic service

It was decent . However they did not have much options in chocolate . Hope they get more options . Another draw back is they don?t make the donuts fresh nor do they heat the donut . But taste was not that bad .
address: 172/1, 2nd Floor, Vega City Mall, Srinivas Industrial Estate, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: One of the best chai I ever had. Chai is a must try!! It has many other things to offer. Chicken rolls are also delicious. The pricing is good. Pani kum chai has made me a chai addict?.
address: 42,24th Main Road, 5th Phase, JP Nagar

user_reviews: One of my favourite place to have North Indian cuisine. The ambience is Dhaba inspired and the staff are very warm and welcoming.  We ordered Tandoori Kebab for starter and it was lip smacking. If you are someone who can handle spice then I would suggest you to try the ? Chicken Anagara? gravy. The Lassi complements all the dishes on the menu.

The best best punjabi food I had in a while. Their food is so rich. I went twice in just a span of three days. Really love their Lassi & Hariyali kebab was spicy and heavenly.. One Suggestion is - the staff seem to be eager to finish off each table quickly which makes the customers either feel rushed or watched/conscious.

A proper Punjabi dhaba. If you like spicy food, then you can try out the angara chicken. Taste of food is great. Staff are courteous. And prices are also reasonable. North Indian people would love the place.

I understand it's a place intended to give you a dhaba feel, but cockroaches running around on floor and water jugs - is a strict No-No for me!I visited this place twice - twice only because it has good ratings here, but you will not believe it, I had to deal with cockroaches both the times - 2nd time on the water jug! It's utterly disgusting and unhygienic! Also, the food wasn't great - we ordered one of the starters from "Today's special" menu but the masala on the chicken was rawThe missi roti was as hard as rubber-papad and wasn't edible and the manager educated us about missi roti and even refused to replace it Comeon, we havent come here to eat missi roti for the first time!Egg dishes were decent, Lassi was great but given my other negative experiences, may not visit this place again  Food - 3/5Ambience - 1/5Price - 1/5

Its a really muat try place if you care fpr the flavours in food. Obviously this place is a little costly but when you have the food you wont bother about he price as it is so flavourful and the quantity is also good. I would surely suggest you to atleast try it out for once. And make sure you have lassi and gulab jamun here because according to me thats the best you can have here and nowhere else.
address: 13, 7th Cross, 2nd Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Ghee Podi Dosa and Irani Chai make for a perfect evening snack, while the upma pesarattu and Podi idli are sufficient for a meal! Overall great food and a friendly, polite host. Must visit if in this side of town!:)

Ordered for the first time from Hotel Brundavan yesterday for dinner. Schezwan Noodles was tasty, very much like home made. Roti was good and surprised to see palak dal as a side dish. Brundavan special dosa was very nice and heavy too, loved the ginger chutney and coconut chutney. Sambhar was not that fresh, so jus ignored it and disposed too. Along with all these items i ordered Paneer Chilly as a starter which was quite a disappointed one. Paneer pieces were so hard and wasn't fresh. I really couldn't enjoy starter as it could have been better. Overall, i will rate order as 3 out of 5. It was nice on the whole.
address: 6 Ground Floor, RR Commercial Complex, AkshayNagar, DLF New Town, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: I honestly didn't like the food one bit. The pulav was very basic. It lacked taste. The rice was also a little dry. The meat pieces in the pulav were drier. The kebab was good though. It was tasty and juicy. The service is good. They actually listen to you. Overall, average food and an okish experience.

An absolute feast at this price, Mutton biryani and Guntur chicken for rs 180 The serving of mutton could be more generous but still yeah it was properly cooked and very delicious,the rice tasted like heaven The Guntur chicken was really spicy and ofcourse delicious

The review is based on home delivery hence only on the food  The pulav was amazing and tastes very different from all the biryanis/pulavs that I have tried. The prawns fry was way better than expected although its a little specier than normal  Prices are definitely reasonable
address: 4, MICO Layout, 2nd Stage, Arekere, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: We ordered for Egg Masala Omlette Combo, Taste is ok but not up to the mark, Bread quantity is very less ( 1 Small Slice of Bread ) they have to improve interms of Quantity & Taste.

Good to go place for healthy breakfast options. Its really economic and the ambience is good. Only thing strange about the place which i find is they dont keep water on table. You have to always keep asking for it. English breakfast and the sandwiches are a good option here. I wont prefer you to buy any drinks here because i dont think thats worth it. And the dessert option are also good but you have to be carefull of what you choose only go for some pastries and nothing else from that. According to me this place is only a good option for breakfast or some snacks.

Decent cafe at Bannerghatta main road, Bangaluru. Good for quick breakfast. Opens at 8am which is a good point. I tried strawberry smoothie, chicken club sandwich and mixed sauce chicken pasta here. Pasta was very spicy but well made. Disappointed very much with the so called chicken club sandwich and a little disappointed with the strawberry Berry smoothie. The chicken sandwich was very desi.. They should not name it club sandwich. The strawberry smoothie was okay but again it was not exactly like a smoothie. It was more od strawberry ice-cream blended and hurrah we have a strawberry shake ???? I was disappointed so didn't so forgot to click the club sandwich. Then I realised I look so pretty and here you beautiful pictures of me eating breakfast. #MinistryofGourmet #gurgaonfoodie #breakfastdone #shiulichakravorty #reviewoftheday #foodiesofinstagram  shiulichakravorty.com
Best place for breakfast. You will love the English breakfast but don't dare to drink cold coffee, it's disgusting. Sandwiches are good to try.
Nice ambience great service and nice milkshakes And a hot well presented coffee Recommended Not crowded as expected as per the rating Competetive Pricing
address: 128/54/10, Ground Floor, Opposite IIM - B, above A2B Dasarapalya, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Not good paneer roll. Quality was not good at all. Kindly make it properly in good way . Hhhhhhnnhhhnjnnjbhnbnnjjjjjjjjjjjjjjjjjhhhhjjjjhhhhhjjhhhhhu
Very good place for Chicken Kebabs you will get many varieties of Kebabs here... I have been here multiple times I don't even remember it. Nice Dinner with Pocket friendly.
The chicken was stinking and the restaurant should know better or close down.

The owner is very polite,good ambience but the food is not upto the mark. Indian dishes,they make it Chinese. In chicken bhuna or Bharta they put capsicum and what not. Authenticity is missed. Excess use of oil and masalas. Not even a single food is tasty starting from rolls;and they put so much masalas that the recipe becomes bitter. Difference between Indian, Chinese or other food should be known first by the chef.
Bull shut with ur order I dint receive the food n the driver was so rude
address: 96, 100 Feet Ring Road, Vysya Bank Colony, 1st Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: The food is quite on the expensive side, hara bhara kabab was nice but the shami kabab weren?t good at all they had stale chicken and not at all price friendly. They can improve their service and food.
Chicken biryani is good but coming to jeera rice taste like white rice with oil only, hara bhara kabab is also completely oily, not expected that with elegant dining, pls improve the quality.
address: 9/10/9/1, Hulimavu Begur Road, 80 Ft Road, Near DLF Township, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Good Ambience, pretty little place in BTM.. Pocket friendly pricing but great taste.  Sandwiches are awesome  - Chicken Club Sandwich - It was filling,yummy and made with fresh ingredients. - Egg Club Sandwich - Really good tasting, make you want to order more. - Bread Omelette- One 9f the best bread omelettes you will ever have. The secret of their sandwiches ate their house special freshly made cream cheese. Really tasty food.  Only thing i wasn't so fond of - Cheese Tea, turned out it's not my cup of tea(pun intended). Its kind of an acquired taste.  They also serve fresh and cold pressed juices and cold coffees and milkshakes.  Must try once for their sandwiches.
address: 24, Shop 1, Ground Floor, 3rd Cross, 18th Main Road, 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: Very bad food. My 1st and last order from this restaurant. Its costly and tasteless.  #tasteLess#lessQuantity #badFood #notPreferred #dinnerFood
Very very less quantity. Less than half plate rice and only one piece paneer in curry. #lessQuantity #badService #notPreferred #dinnerFood .
address: 1, 100 Feet Ring Road, Phase 1, Stage 2, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: Visited today. It's 1000 times better than XO Belgian waffle. Ordered Chocolate Waffle with vanilla ice cream and sprinkles. It tasted awesome! not to sweet but extremely delicious. P. S- They provide too much chocolate sprinkles for chocolate geeks like us and I simply loved it ???
Dine in @ Waffle Head Ordered for Dark Fudge, Chocolate Over Load Waffles, Taste is good but value for money I will give 2* ambience is good and hygiene is good.
address: 24, 3rd 'B' Cross, 7th Cross, 18th Main, 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: I had the worst experience from the food ordered here from zomato. The eggs in the egg chilli where all black in color and the biriyani was pathetic. I won't recommend this restaurant to anyone.
Too much of masala. Thumbs down. Bad Taste.
The food here is not good. The taste is awful and their packing is not good as well. I had ordered a biryani combo but it was not good. There were too many mint leaves and the chicken was too chewy.
Worst mutton biryani, mutton pieces was from old stock, not cooked well and tasted like wood. I doubted it to be mutton. Quantity, taste everything was poor.
food is not hot and quantity is very very less
address: 9/10/9/1, Hulimavu Begur Road, 80Ft Road, Near DLF Township, Yelenhalli, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Very bad quality of food and hygiene ordered online but dint expect the quality and taste to be so bad and delivery took more than 1 hour utterly disappointed
address: Near Brand Factory, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: There was a time, when this place was only a stone's throw away and we were probably the most frequent customers. When they just started operations, their Biryani portions were huge and they served chicken biryani with a large sized chicken raan - excellent but inconvenient to share.   We were big fans of the biryanis (both mutton and chicken) and the salan and even bigger fans of the chicken 65. The kebabs were a good bet as well. Even to this day, there's days when we brave Silkboard traffic just because the taste buds cannot be satiated with any of the alternatives. I do hope they maintain their standards and keep the taste true.

I had been craving for some good Andhra Biryani and luckily came across this place called Birinz in BTM over last weekend. In case you haven?t had a typical Andhra Biryani before, I highly recommend you to try it out. Birinz is a very simple restaurant with basic seating that serves mouth-watering food. Their menu had Chinese and Andhra assortment of grubs and we enjoyed every single food that we ordered. ... Read full post on nibblesdiary.wordpress.com

Paneer biryani and butter chicken biryani. @birinzblr was previously knows as bawarchi and serves varieties of biryani having both veg and non veg options. It's served in 2 portions I.e. personal and regular, so that the portion of food is not wasted. You can either order or just visit the place to enjoy the biryani. ??
I ordered a paneer biryani from there and it was good. The quantity of rice was enough for a person. They also gave raita and onion with it. I liked it!!

People ditch, but Biryani never ditches........ ell, this stands true for "Birinz", a recently opened paradise for Biryani lovers in BMT, Bangalore.  Guys if you're travelling to Bangalore anytime soon, this is surely your one stop for lunch/dinner.  I've tried the "Reddy's Chicken Biryani"& "Butter Chicken Biryani"which are lip smacking & unique in their taste with generous amounts of flavour to it.  Their "Rayalseema Chicken Dry"was a stunner dish!!    A chicken dish with just the right proportions of flavor..... All the biryani lovers pick up pace, and get ready to tickle your taste buds...... A must try restaurant with humble service.......
address: Shop 1, 1st Floor, BTM Complex, 9th Main Road, Layout 1st Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: Just got two shawarmas delivered. In last ten years together I haven't had that much of onion, what I had just now. 49 rupees for a shawarma sounds like a steal deal, and you hope that no food joint wants a bad name. But this one does. Chicken was there, one table spoon each in two rolls. WHY SO MUCH OF ONION?

We ordered whole meat shawarma, classic shawarma and chicken tikka. Both the shawarmas were one of the best I have had till date. The only thing missing was pickle and green chilly we normally get with it at other joints.  Chicken tikka were perfectly cooked, juicy, tasty. Accompanied with yummy chatni. Just that I found it very salty. I would like to give it a benefit of doubt and hope next time you guys will take care of the salt content.  Would definitely order again.
Great friendly place for shawarma, owner is very polite, small n neat place definitely recommended, must try sharwarma and tandoori chicken.
address: Doddakamanahalli Main Road, Kalena Agrahara, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: This delivery only food outlet has an interesting take on our beloved evening snack, samosa! You think of samosa and the second thing that comes to your mind (after the delicious taste) is the unhealthy oil!! Samosa Singh certainly addresses this issue as their samosas seem to absorb less oil and they look hygienic.  Now coming to the taste. I have tried many flavors. Masala corn, kadai paneer, paneer tikka and veggie spice. I must say they were all pretty decent. Nothing extraordinary but palatable. The stuffing though was very less and that was a let down!  I absolutely loved their dessert samosas. Full marks for the creativity and taste. I tried chocosa zesty orange and chocosa crunchy peanut. Zesty orange is my favourite.  Overall a decent place to satiate your evening hunger pangs.

So I tried out the paneer tikka samosa from this outlet.. First of all finding this place is difficult as there is no board and only a small sign announcing their name.. The filling was tasty but definitely not tikka.. The reason i have given only 3 stars is because it was more like a stuffed kachori than samosa.. Flaky n thick crusted.. Should try out the other outlets too..
Samosa Singh is King, order veg samosa platter and samosa desserts, nicely branded and packed, samosas are super tasty. Real value for money.

Try this place for their unique samosas..I have tried their masala corn, murgh makhani, chicken chettinad and chocossa caramel samosa..?  The filling is tasty but I felt that the size of the samosa was comparatively small.

I?d have rated these guys 4 stars but for their choco samosas. They were just reshaped perk. Now, coming to the real deal, I totally adored their chettinaadu chicken samosas. Just the right balance between potato and chicken, a crunchy shell and excellent packaging makes this a good deal. Imma try all their other items, and perhaps you should too.
address: #12, 12th Cross BDG Residency, Puttenahalli

user_reviews: Nice eat out place for Punjabi Pure veg food, I tried Amritsari Chole Kulche and it was awesome. It was pocket friendly as well. I would definitely revisit this place.
address: Shop 11& 12, First Floor, 3618/1, Dodda Kammanahalli, Main Road, Besides Campus Student Communities Building, Bangalore

user_reviews: Had visited zomato kitchens this weekend. Ordered a hyderabadi chicken biryani and chicken 65. Their idea of a biryani is to cook it a while back and dump oil into it to make it appear fresh.Strangely there were 3 bits of stale chiken on it as a crowning glory.It is definitely the worst experience that I have had with zomato so far.

This is my first review for any restaurant I ordered till date.worst experience that I ordered a Hyderabadi chicken full curry and I literally got 2 small piece of chicken with gravy. As soon as I saw the parcel I thought it was dal curry, when I tasted it I'm not at all wrong. I didn't felt like I'm eating chicken at all. I'm surprised that we can even make chicken curry like this? Better I could have ordered daal curry and saved some money. Management pls change the quantity,taste, packing to an minimum standard level. Worst experience ever.
I have ordered hyderabad egg biriyani today and I can say that this is the worst food I had.. I would never suggest this restaurant again to anyone..

I purchased chicken 65 andhra it was very sour and lot of coconut, and dint like it and prawns masala don't try this I thought it's a dry and I was surprised to receive a curry I was very upset roti and biryani is good last time I tried it, but very upset with my today's order.
good food.. loved prawn roast.. one star less for promotional messages and late delivery
address: Kitchens@, No. 19, 35/4, 24th Main, JP Nagar 7th Phase, Puttenahalli, Bangalore
Ground Floor 9/1, Basavalingappa Nagar, Billekalli Village, South Taluk, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Very innovative of them to serve Biryani in matkas. The quantity is massive but the quality is disappointing. They use generous portions of spices but it overpowers the biryani. I cannot taste anything more. The matka I could keep so thanks for that! Overall, average food and a good experience.
After having the food thought to share my experience, the food was really awesome, very reasonable price, sufficient quantity, well packed. Definitely try again.

Ordered chicken dum biryani.Like the concept of Biryani in Matka.Thanks for the matka.Really loved it.About the food,biryani was good but not great.Spices were dominating and it was hard for me to feel the taste.There were two decent sized perfectly cooked chicken pieces.Hope they work on masala flavor which dominates and suppresses the taste of the biryani.Quantity is excellent.If you like spicy masaledar biryani or hyderabadi kind biryani ,Matka is your place.
Food is really good. The preparation and presentation were both up to the mark. A must go in this area . Biryani was the best. Service is also nice.
address: 6185/ 15/1, SOS, Doddakamanahalli, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: A cool Dhaba style ambience. We opted for some special dishes so the price is a bit higher. apart from that food quality was good , quantity is also good.. We have chicken nun parathas, some special dishes lassi.
Awesome and unique ambience in the heart of Btm. Loved the chicken lababdar. The ambience gives u a feeling of real pujabi dhaba in Bangalore.

One of the new reasturants in BTM, ambience is pretty simple , food is like any other Punjabi reasturants, veg dishes are between good and very good, non veg dishes can be better, price wise it's ok, staff is ok.. nothing much to write home about, typical Punjabi reasturant....there are no special dishes that u will certainly come back for ...

Went there for the second time last night, and it wasn't a bad experience but what I did not like at this place was the poor behavior of the staff. Tried their Paneer Khazana and lassi and chapatis. Food was decent, but the outlet should be a little cleaner and hygienic. Plates were dirty too.  pleased my taste buds? - yes. burnt a hole my pocket? - not really. had a punjabi vibe? - yes. was the staff courteous? - could've been better.

Punjabi Swag is a North Indian dhaba style place that offers very good Punjabi food items. The ambience is truly of a dhaba and also the music played there is very lively. I have tried a number of items but their Butter Chicken definitely stands out. It is awesome and a must-try item. Masala Papas, Garlic Naan, and Cuole Kulche are also tasty. Service is slow and needs to be improved. They keep the restaurant open till late in the night so it's a good choice for the late night cravings.
address: 950, 16th Main Road, 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: My all time favourite eatery.... yummmmmm is just not the word. I love the tacos, quesadilla, rice bowl...all of it ...IN VEG ! this time I was totally in love with the ambience too... it was us a too kool...please never miss an opportunity to experience the food and place at this location in specific. Kudos to the interiors!

Ordered Burrito, Taco, Fries and a soda beverage. For some reason did not enjoy the Burrito or the Taco and also felt that, food at TacoBell - Gopalan Mall tastes way better than the food served here.
The food used to be so good here, now it's totally gone down. On our most recent visit, everything we ordered tasted stale, old stock and just inedible. Highly disappointed

It's more of a restaurant than a self service joint. While you order on the counter, you get a token number and food is served by a server on your table.  Ambiance has more elegance to it than other branches, clean and spacious. Overall, lovely.  Coming to food, we've tried many, from Tacos (Naked chicken, Potaco, Paneer Tikka), Burritos (spicy sriracha and others), Quesadilla, loaded nachos and mexican fries. Food is fresh and delicious.  Service is good too. Staff is polite and professional.  Overall, a delightful experience. Keep up the good work!
This place serves delicious tacos and super delicious nachos. We mostly order nachos from this place and it never disappoints. Great place to hangout ?
address: Royal Meenakshi Mall, Third Floor, Hulimavu, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Very worst food. Non-veg bucket biryani doesnt hv pieces at all. Biryani is lyk tomato rice. Veg biryani has no salt nd too much spicy to eat. Raita has only onions mixed in a spoon of curd. When called them they say that the one which we received is bucket biryani. Doesnot even worth half the price we paid Very worst experience from zomato till date
fast delivery
No responsible to deliver order Without delivery they simply put its already delivered its waste of time that i order from this resturant ...
Biryani taste is different. Its not ambur style... Order delivered very fastly. More oily food. Hope next time it will be AMBUR style........
chicken pieses were too small
address: 1378, East End Circle, Jayanagar, Bangalore
168, 16th Croos, 7th Mainroad NS Palya, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: This place literally brings the mom cooking to the plate and I just loved the food absolutely homely and in less oil, the place served delicious home sabzis, Dals and desserts too. Specifically would recommend their baingan bharta which is their speciality and is one of the best I have managed to find in Bangalore. It has correct spices and is complimented by the hot piping homely phulkas they serve along with it. Cheers!
address: 14, Shanthiniketan Circle, Arakere, Off Bannerghatta Road, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: This place serves great variety of dosas..but probably the spring roll dosa is best here(must try).don't miss the tea as well ,they have very nice tea.. overall its a great pocket friendly place for street food.
address: Ramaiah Garden, Beside Shoba Tulit Apartment, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: How can you serve stale n smelly food?? Beware from ordering at Babu Moshai. Today I paid for stale food.. Can you image??..  Being Bannerghatta road zomato food expertise, I highly insist, not to take chance with this restaurant. Your health is important. And so it your hard earned money. ..
address: 31454, Doddakammanahalli Main Road, Central Excise Layout, Phase 2, Tejaswini Nagar, Bengaluru

user_reviews: Ordered in for a working lunch from here via the Zomato app Found them on the under 99 section for meals Got excited but sadly not happy The quantity good packing good but taste no no I have eaten Bengali food elsewhere hence do know the difference from good Bong food and not so great Bong food The Bengali fish thali had Fish curry with a piece of fish was tasteless Dal watery and tasteless again and very bland Fried onions Lots of rice and A tomoto chutney gone totally wrong Please do look into your Tate issues

Updated: The owner called and apologized and even after refusing because of the late night. He came to give the correct order.  Great customer service!  *******************  AVOID.  Bad food. Bad quantity. Bad packaging.  And absolutely shameful Bengali food. Anyway, cheers! Never again  So Zomato wants me to write 140 characters, but I don't feel like wasting my time on this.
address: 32, 16th Main Road, 1st Cross, Mahadeshwara Nagar, BTM 2nd Stage, Bangalore

user_reviews: Run by family and wife it's a very authentic Karnataka style food. It's very tasty. Economically priced. Bit crampy inside but, you get quick service. Parking is next to nil.
completely oily, uneatable
Very less quantity. 100 Rs for 3 small piece chicken. Overly priced restaurant I must say. Also the chicken was not completely cooked. Taste wise it's ok but quantity is too less
I ordered for nati koli fry but hotel has sent regular koli fry so they have to refund and I request to take action for cheating otherwise we will loose hope on Zomato please let me inform the action

Very bad taste and food here is too oily. Not recommended. I ordered biryani which was ok type. Other day I took kebab and guntur chicken,I opened the box after reaching home to find box of oily food.
address: 33rd Main Road, KR Layout, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Worst food... chilly chicken doesn't even taste like chilly chicken.and the restaurant take 1hr to deliver food to a location which merely 3km from the restaurant.never gonna order again from this restaurant.
Food was not good. And quality and quantity was not as per our expectations. Kebab picess was very small and not good picess. So I am not happy over all
address: 2, Puttenahalli Main Road , Government School, 7th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: This is located just opposite Bangalore Central mall, JP Nagar. This is totally vegetarian restaurant. The restaurant is spread on to two stored building. The ground floor section has no seating area, but the place is always very crowded than uper stored. The upper stored area has comfortable seating area with much high price. The food was good and they had very fast service. Must try their gobi Manchurian, masala dosa, veg noodles. And South Indian cuisine is incomplete without filter coffee.
Normal!  I?ve been here a couple of times. I?ve only tried their evening snacks. I?ve had Gobi Manchurian and Masala Puri. Gobi Manchurian was good, but the Masala puri was just passable.
Very bad experience here! Staff here are extremely rude and made us wait for 45 minutes and didn't give us the table. The ambience wasn't great too and tables and cutlery were extremely dirty.

This place is just opposite to Central mall in Jayanagar, Bangalore. They have self service facilities at ground floor. If you want to properly sit and dine in then first floor is for this purpose. They have amazing food whether it is south Indian or north Indian. Place has quite decent ambience. Polite staff. Badam halwa is a must try.

opp to bangalore central mall jp nagar.this is a treat to all foodies out there. always crowded (for a good reason) this place offers the most cost to taste ratio. absolute satisfaction of decent meal. ambience is decent, purely for family (dates are not recommended) . delicious food , theres self service on ground floor nd service hall first floor. you get what you are shown in the menu. the food is adequate in quantity and served with a smile. underrated restaurant. if u go to the mall for some shopping or movies it is worth more to visit upahara darshini than to visit the food court. give this restaurant a chance and u will start to admire it.
address: Opposite Bangalore Central Mall, 9th Block, Jayanagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Original and authentic bengali food restaurant . All the items had the aroma of typical Bengali spices . Paneer in white gravy can be the signature dish, although all the items were utterly delicious. Highly recommended .

Authentic Bengali cuisines. Worth a try. Have been a frequent customer to this home kitchen. If you are expecting foods which are rich and full of masalas and oil, then you can look somewhere else as, the food prepared here is healthy and devoid of unnecessary spice and riches. Proper home made stuff.

The wife got my hunger pangs running by reminding me of some of our favorite dishes .ordered through zomato and was delivered promptly at my place. For people of eastern India u can blindly go ahead with this. We had ordered chicken kosha,fish curry,alu posto,tomato chutney,cabbage fry and cabbage with fish head. Every dish reminded me of eating at home and the beautiful cuisine which is core to eastern India. I now can get home cooked food without having to travel from my home .

Authentic Bengali food.Service is excellent.Behaviour of the owner is also appreciable.I am a regular customer here to take order.If you are fond of Bengali food must try. Chicken Biriyani taste is also good no doubt.

Yesterday night I and my roommate were very hungry and were looking for some good food. I opened the Zomato app and after having a glance at Chandrima?s Kitchen?s menu card, ordered 2 Egg thali meals. The taste of the food was absolutely fantastic. Had a fantastic evening with the food. 5 out of 5 for everyting. A suggestion to add the authentic Bengali sweet Rasogulla in the meals. It will make the food complete ???
address: 127, 16/1, Venkateswappa Layout, Kembathalli, Near Canara Bank ATM, Gottigere Post, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Milkshake from Keventers hardly disappoint you. Bubblegum Thick Milkshake was yummy and for sure people who love bubblegum will enjoy this one. Not recommended for people who don't like bubble gums. Keventers #milkshake
It's really a wonderful place to have the flavoured and extinguish taste from the shakes. The menu has to be really discovered by one to explore the actual taste.
Good taste
No straw was given along with the milkshakes delivered.
rasmalai shake in classic shake not good very dilueted
address: Upper Ground Floor, 424/376/487 SYNO 63, Royal Meenakshi Mall, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Had been recently,the food was really good and less oily,loved their mini thalis with pulkas and sabzi...must try their lassi and chaass...bikankar jn would be the right place to have pure Gujarati food... Food 4/5 Ambience 3/5 Price 4/5 Taste 3.5/5
Recently visited this place for lunch Taste is good less oily and spicy pocket friendly rates courteous staff Add more items in the menu good luck

A small and cozy place but if you're lucky to get a table, you are in for a homely feeling. Perfectly cooked items on the thali with a taste that matches close to home food. The staff are courteous and are always around to get you anything. The food was very tasty, hot and filling. I tried the thali and it was worth it. Very reasonably priced. Highly Recommended.
Love the food here...have tried most of the dishes on the menu Rajasthani paratha, ghar ki thali and dhokla are my favorite ...the dhokla is soft, fluffly and fresh must try
address: 62, 24th Main, 7th Cross, 2nd Phase, Opposite to R V Dental College, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Honestly the worst pizza I've ever had. The base is not good, toppings are stale, even cheese doesn't taste right. I ordered a jigsaw pizza and couldn't eat past two slices. Also portions are very small. I wouldn't recommend anyone to order from this place

Thank you guys for before time delivery and the hot food. But coming to the most crucial points, I felt I had paratha and not pizza, first time without oregano and it was not even cut. The size I would agree with many other, was not 8 inches and if you want to survive in the market need to increase the quantity of the chicken pieces. Please look into these issues. I will give 2 stars for helping me with my hunger.
Not worth for money, they delivered an old pizza which is not fresh and which we couldn't eat... Please don't try this hotel and waste your money

Received my order almost after 1.5 hours. Packaging was normal, most importantly taste was worst. Ordered all paneer pizza but couldn't find any panner in the pizza. Crust was hard. I gave 2 stars just because this joint is open 24 hours.
late delivery
address: 2, Mangammanapalya Main Rd, Hosapalaya, Muneshwara Nagar, BTM, Bangalore
1, 7th Main Road, NS Palya, Stage 2, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: The best chicken biriyani i have tasted in BTM so far, the authentic taste of thalasseri biriyani . thanks lassi berg . quantity is very good and quality rates 5/5 ... smell of malabar
Tasty burger and milk shake with low price I ever had.. best place for refresh your mind. Lovely staff, and management. Really loved this place and food ??
I have ordered chicken roll...but there was no chicken pieces in a roll....totally waste...less quantity... Instead of ordering online we can have in out side..
Super juicy crispy burgers
This place serve the best burger i ever had in this price range. Their milk shake, sandwich and service is also very good...  Amazing stuff...
address: Shop 984, Btm 2nd Stage, 16th main, 7th cross, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: A nice place for breakfast , great South Indian meals to choose from, they often come up with exciting new dishes every month, really unique and tasty, fast service with hygiene, pocket friendly too and really good sweets too. The palak poori is a must try, this place has been here for years to come and the taste and quality have never changed, it's always been this nice from the beginning. ?
address: 1/8, Big Baazar, Kothanur Dinne Main Road, 7th Phase, RBI Layout, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Very Tasty food. Just loved the way they prepared it. it was authentic Chinese. momos fried rice just perfect. dragon chicken was delicious.

Good food that scores high on quantity and taste. Try their combos, which are worth the money. Had ordered the chicken combo and it came perfectly packaged. So, they managed to fit in (but in good way) two varieties of chicken including tasty drums of heaven in semi-gravy form, two hot momos, and sauce. Read most of the reviews of this place and I agree with them. It is value for money although I would not recommend having often from this place as (with most places serving Chinese fare) they tend to go a little overboard with the unhealthy ingredients. As for me, would like to visit this place sometime soon.  Taste: 3.5/5 Value for money: 4/5 Delivery: 3/5 Packaging: 4/5

Felt like eating Chinese today and found this new restaurant in BTM while searching on Zomato. Though I doubted to order ,it did not upset me . We ordered the Veg Noodles combo and Peking Paneer. I must say that this was a great deal at decent price. The quantity of food is more than enough for one person. Momos in the combo were huge and tasty. Baby corn was slight saltier than normal for me so could not eat all. Peking Veg was mouth watering .Paneer (in Peking paneer ) was fresh and soft . I would recommend this place for sure and try these things if you are looking for noodles/momo/Manchurian all in one :). The packaging was nice , it was provided with chilly sauce and red sauce. Overall a pleasant experience .  Nitesh C
address: 6, 3rd B Cross, 18th Main, Kuvempu Nagar, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: This place offers really nice food. My top picks from this place are millets poha and dal kichdi.  As the name says it, I find very minimal oil and the food fresh
address: 7/43 First floor, 3rd cross, 4th Main, Kaverappa Compound, N S Palaya, 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore
45, 14th Main 7th Phase, Puttehahalli Palya, Opposite Of Samsung Smart Cafe, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: A decent place with decent food. We ordered LIIT, white sauce pasta and Nachos. All these were average to above average. Service was decent. Ambience was nice as we sat on their terrace with average music. Go only if this place is close to your house.

The ambience in the private cabins is really cozy and makes for great times. The food (especially the Guntur Chicken, which warranted a repeat!!!) was sensational. The pizza (we tried the chicken Alfredo) is thin crust and cheeseilicious. Zomato gold redemption was a breeze and the service by the friendly Mr. Bipul Sarkar was top notch. I?m surprised with the quality of outlets in my humble nook of Bengaluru. May BLRbox live long and prosper.

The place is actually really cool.. The concept of converting a box into something so innovative!  Very laid-back place, good music.. we went there just to grab some drinks. The device definitely needs to improve, there were just a few customers and it was difficult to get the attention of the staff. The alcohol is decently priced, no doubts. I had the kamikaze bomb which was priced at 220 on the menu, but I was charged 300. I do not understand why the menu was showing the accurate prices and why I was not informed that the prices were incorrect.  I had a portion of the dimsum shumai. It was an okay dish!

Lost somewhere in the end of BTM layout is this place.. with a very unique "out of the box"(pun intended) ambience. The whole place is designed in cargo boxes. Not only the ambience even the food here is equally good. If you're in the neighborhood do try this place.  My review Ambience 4.5/5 Food 3.5/5 Service 3.5/5 Cost for 2 800-1000

It was weekend and didn?t wanted to go too far from home. Saw this place in zomato and was just 10 mins away. Great ambience, its a big place with lots of space. Good food , great service, smoking allowed on the top floor.
address: 934, 1st Block, 4th Stage, DC Halli, BG Road, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: One of the shittiest Momo's I ever had, come to my place and will prepare some of the best Momo's you people have ever tasted.  One more thing why isn't the meat minced huh..?
Pork momo i love them and Pork chowmein. They have started thali too. Nice customer service too. Tried Manchurian Pork wow awesome. Keep it up.
Awesome Momo and the mayonnaise is tasty . Love the sezwan chicken. For pork Momo lovers this is the heaven and recently they have pork thali too. I am gonna order that too.

This place is good and has good customer service. Polite people , has knowledge about the products properly. I would like to order Momo and my favorite pork Momo . Keep good things up guys. Your mayonnaise is just so tasty loved it. Best place found in Bangalore for Momo and I have even heard they are in Guwahati too so I guess people in my town can enjoy too.
Best place for authentic Momo. If you are searching for best Momo in Bangalore, this is the one. I just love their Momo. No other Momo comes even close.
address: Dream Mart supermarket, Opposite To Paratha Junction Arekere, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Quality of the food was worst!!. Couldn't have a single bite also. I don't know how zamato made partner. It is totally time waste money waste.

Very very bad taste please don't buy anyone am order kabab 100 gm fully roasted not worth of money am throw dustbin online fake promotion if I go hotel price r very cheaper than online . .............fake apps
taste was very bad.. didn't expect this.
delivery before time food ok
item missing
address: 30, DC Main Road, Opposite Munichinnappa Garden, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Worst Kaju katli ever I had!! It's of no quality no Taste!!! They are just cheating people by giving this! I m very unhappy from.this product
The sweets are better than the snacks!  Must have sweet: Rabdi Bowl  The owner is courteous. Also - one of the few shops in the Gottigere area that has a good variety and spread of Bengali sweets.
Purchased fafda directly from shop,soda was very high in fafda and it tastes bitter due to high soda..worst experience. Not suggested .???

The worst thing I ever ordered on Zomato. Never order snacks from here. I ordered Nimki and shakarpara and they were literally worst had to throw them away. It tasted yuck and even too much of oil that was used many times. It was worst experience ever. Never gonna order anything from here again?

very tasty food and a friendly staff too...have gone there just for a tea and now I'm regular there, now u can imagine how good food and sweets they make....all the things are awesome especially tea vada pav and samosa....??nd if u want to taste the real side of gujarat go in the morning for freshly made jalebi and faafda ...!!!??
address: 91/1, Gottigere Main Road, Bannerghatta, Opp United Bank Of India , bef Dmart

user_reviews: I order from here quite often. Initially it was not my favourite but now they have changed the base and I like it. This time I ordered their chicken keema and suasage pizza and it was mind blowing, The overall flavours ,cheese quantity and base was amazing.

Gone are the days where the only option for home delivery pizzas were pizza hut and dominos. With players like ovenstory giving tough competition to them, they are sure to lose a lot of business in near future. It's been a year and I have constantly been ordering pizzas from Ovenstory because A. They are delicious B. They are delivered hot and on time C. They have a good menu D. They are pocket friendly  This time I tried the Spanish Delight and loved this one too!! I have two more to try on their menu and soon will be ordering those as well ?
Good authentic pizzas. Thin crust by default with generous toppings. Quick delivery and great service. Preferred online ordering over eating there.

If you wanna try the worst pizza of your life. Go ahead with them last time I order a combo. It was so first. Repeated the mistake of ordering again.. extremely bad pizza. Cold. Delivery time took two hours. Refunded me 149 bucks as a part of promo code for next pizza. Who wanna order another time. Such a waste. Don't waste your money on it. 25 bucks extra packing charges for that box.

The Non Veg Paradise is definitely as expected...!!! This is a definite GO TO pizza for Non Veg lovers. The crust was thick as the images show me Thin Crust. Overall the quantity was good for 2 people.
address: Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: A small and a warm cafÃ\x83Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x83Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82ÃÂ© with lots of friendly vibes. Located near the delmia circle in JP Nagar is this newly opened Cafe with lots of potential. Yes, this is also pet friendly with a small section just for them!  You can get whole lot of interesting books here to read or probably bring your own book of choice and enjoy with your food.  Coming to the food, it was really good and they are always up for suggestions and feedback if it's not upto the mark.  Some of my favorites were the nostalgia drink which is a unique combination of complan, hot chocolate and cocoa. Then the square shaped pizza's which were cheesy and very affordable as well. The pasta and sandwiches were also really good which was really soothing. All the bread is made in-house which is really soft and tasty.  I'm giving an extra star just for the amazing service and hospitality given by the owners here. Definitely a must visit for people residing nearby JP Nagar area.

Nice place which a pet friendly nook inside the cafe ... there is no place for the dogs to play or walk around ... we ordered for burger which was unique but tasted ok and burji pav ... may or may not visit the cafe again ... they also have books if you wanna read ...

Had a really great time at Slate Cafe, new outlet in JP Nagar. Aesthetic and very comforting ambience, The food was delicious and the staff was very hospitable, had a very positive experience in a long time, also it is pet friendly. Until next time, cheers! :)
address: 5th Cross Road, Dollar Layout, 3rd Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: A decent and economic place. Sattu kachori and puri are a go to option in breakfast here. If you are looking for meals for lunch or dinner. This place has it all type of meals for your hunger. They have some good parathas here. The stuffing in parathas are good in quantity. And really tasty.  Litti chokha here is decent enough and really flavourfull.  I wont suggest you to order starters here as they are not so great here you can try it somwwhere else. But for other suggested options above this place is good
It's best for quick snacking.. breakfast and dinner. Basically I go there for paratha. And on the road and can easily be noticed. Small place n quite hygiene.
address: 2, Akshay Nagar, Near DLF New Town, Begur Main Road, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Visited this place yesterday ... small outlet with delicious lassi. I ordered mango lassi... awesum one. Fair enough price on the basis of quality and quantity... Must try mango lassi and dry fruit lassi.

Visited this place last week..it's a small outlet with a few chairs placed just outside along the footpath..I ordered fruit overload and it tasted yummy.i don't know about lassi/juices served here but I would definitely recommend this place..

We had kulfi falooda and death by chocolate ice cream here. Falooda was okay but had lot of rose drink in it and extra sweet. The death by chocolate ice cream was a complete terrible experience- it was plain vanilla ice ceam with some choco chips and chocolate cream
Well maintained. With tasty delicious shakes. ?? with low cost compare to other lassi shops ?? staffs will co ordinate with Custy with so polite and humble.
address: 936, 16th Main BTM Layout 2nd Stage Old Ward 65, Bangalore 76

user_reviews: Decent ambience, good drinks but very slow service and the non veg menu is a bit on expensive side and again slow service. Can be improved, plus the menu should be more.

I must say this is one unique place! The place looks very different from the restaurants you've been to! Nothing to extraordinary but simple and feels so homely and greenery all around you. It's on the highest floor but makes you feel so close to the earth. A beautiful concept. And that's the ambience and I am absolutely sure you will love the food here as well  We ordered a lot of dishes and the most loved one was the Nigerian suya! The pizza is good too and please do not miss out on the sizzlers I am sure nothing on the menu is going to disappoint you. Maybe pricing is a little higher but definitely worth it.

Absolutely recommended place to come for family lunch and dinners (especially dinners). The place is beautifully done with lots of space in between tables. The interiors are quite suave. Food is really good with quality portion size. To top it all they give some really cute saplings for free :)

Well.. Have been there twice expecting it would be better from the first. Nah. Not worth your money. They have their own style but not accomodating enough for all types of food lovers. Names are fancier than the taste.

This cafe like restaurant is very artistic. I will talk about the ambiance first as I always do. :) The look of the restaurant is very attractive. Use of pop colours gives it a fresh feel. This restaurant is a rooftop place, and having greenery arround you makes it wonderful. Art is a base of this cafe, so the great food!  We had pasta and prawns cracker (prawns bhajji) And as I mentioned it was GREAT! We found pricing a little high but you can always ignore it for the great experience designed by the friendly and soft spoken staff!  #chavadi
address: 4, Arama Suites, Sarvabhouma Nagar, Off Bannerghatta Road, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: I ordered Sattu Parata and Gobi Parata from them, the parathas are so yummy and soft. The quantity is worth for the price. Loved the parathas from them.

Loved the food !!!!!!!!!!! Reasonable prices must have at least once in a week from here the food was cooked very good Kasia chicken was awesome bendhi was really very tasteful fish is really good !!!!! Very good authentic north Indian food.....

No explanations about food over here its really very good food that i had with north indians restaurant by the way quality will be good and quantity is also more !!! All the items are good except palak panner need to prepare well !!!!

Here i eat every day very simple place very less price and good quality of food I love to eat every day there kadai chicken and roti and bendhi fry all curries will be very tasteful!!! Quality is awesome and quantity is more
address: 7th Main, NS Palya, 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: One among those places that could be categorized as more quality and less quantity. Not satisfied with the price and the quantity that was provided. However the dishes were pretty good. Ordered pothu fry & vazattiyathu and would recommend the same
Amazing place for authentic Kerala food. Loved their kappa udachathu and pothu vazhattyathu. Absolutely lipsmacking and must tries. Malabar chicken biryani was also really good.

Its been long since I wrote something about restaurant. For past 2 days, I am using this restaurant for take away. Quality of the food is worth every penny. Quantity is also up to the mark. You can feel the real taste of Kerala. They took time to give the food but it was worth the wait.

Two years back, I've posted a review for Cucumber Town. However, unfortunately, after a while they closed the restaurant. Now, the good news is that they are back with a Home-delivery and take-away model. I'm extremely glad to welcome them back as they are the best Kerala cuisine in Bangalore! The food taste and quality is excellent. Try their beef/chicken and mutton items, appam/idiyappam/aripathiri, irachipputtu, seafood and biriyanis.  Only worry is that now we're unable to get the amazing sarbaths and mocktails they served. I hope they will start that too in the future. As I shared earlier, their main highlight is their care for maintaining top-notch taste, without compromising the quality (they don't add any artificial colors or enhancers).  Best of luck guys, you always deserve a 5 star. :-)
address: 45, Kasthuri Nivasa, 2nd Floor, 19th Main, 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: Street food is one of the best things in Bangalore and to experience that,you should just forget things like hygiene and cleanliness. Of course that doesn't mean street food are always unhygienic but there are few people in this world who give excuse of hygiene when we offer them street food.  Don't bother to ask and remember 99 varieties coz basically you cant remember and its just unusual mix of flavors that covers 99 in number. It's the same usual kind of menu you find there unlike any other 99 varieties of dosa food carts..  Ordered masala dosa. It was too good.  Try once:)

Try the shezwan varieties if you like spicy taste, its mind blowing taste. Worth a visit any day especially for young folks.  Seating arrangement can be improved  with say 4 small tables with 4 chairs for each table! Overall very good tasty stuff to entertain your taste buds.
address: 389, Cave Temple Road, Doddamma Layout, Pai Layout, Hulimavu, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore
18, 24th Main Road, Aurobindo Marg, Opposite Sobha Tulip Apartment, 5th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: That "wow" wala Punjabi taste is what I was looking for and this is the correct place to jump in.  Authentic Punjabi flavour of malai paneer tikka and chicken tikka is something you should taste here.  The food is simply awesome and and I have ordered the lassi here that is also something too much for one person to finish. But they took kinda more time to prepare the food. But I think that is acceptable when you know that a great food is coming on its way.  Ambiance-4 Food-5 Service-4

The food here is absolutely delicious. Do visit if you are looking for authentic Punjabi food. But whenever I've been there the buffet was always closed. Service is very very veryyy slow. Great food but not so great experience.
Very very very very very nice service. Food was north indian and punjabi, and i loved it because i am from delhi ?? Every north indian punjabi should definitely try this place ??

Worst set of experience which makes me think give 1 star for the restaurant.  Rudest and No experience staff Internet explorer is faster then their service Tasteless and cold meal pakka  Please don't consider this place with the family  Cheers

Decent place and attempts to bring you some real dhaba like feels. Prompt service, good butter chicken and naan. I've obviously had better, while not completely disappointing the place doesn't deliver as much as the name suggests it would.
address: 72, 2nd Floor, Next to Max & Crossword, 3rd Phase, Inner Ring Road, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: They make delicious rolls which are not at all expensive and also are very filling. Plus they have a hygienic kitchen. The only disadvantage is that they do no home deliver, so you have to go get your food. Hopefully, they'll start delivering soon.
Decent taste, there are better roll joints though for slightly higher cost like Zeeshan's. Still value for money option. Will try other items on the menu later.
It's a newly opened small outlet of kati rolls..I have tried their Chicken roll, egg roll, fried rice and some of the chicken starters..taste wise it's pretty good..and the quantity is worth it!
address: 8, 24th Main, Opposite Royal School, Phase 5, JP Nagar

user_reviews: This restaurant has given me a headache on my first order itself. I ordered hyderabadi chicken dum biryani (something worth of Rs. 200+ as of the menu) but with some Zomato offer, got it for Rs.99. Upon delivery, I found that the quantity of the biryani is so so less that even a child would go hungry with that. Upon complain, they said that they give the same quantity to every customer. It made me sure that they are just thugging the people with these online orders because certainly a Rs. 200+ biryani container doesn't look that small. They just kept me hungry the entire night. People please don't fall prey for this restaurant. I would have rated it a 0 star.
Biryani was mouth watering... Meals quantity was more. Than satisfactory with quality. We regularly order atleast twice or thrice a week. ???
Food is tasty but the quantity is very less. Nor worth for the price (gongura mutton biryani)
Had nice nellore biriyani.......Nice restuarant to visit again...best place to have dine in,serving people are so good and polite #Jaswanth #praveen #sameer
Chicken Biryani was just OK in taste. Chicken tikka was burnt, partly.
address: 1st Floor, 173, Bannerghatta Road, Bilekahalli, Bangalore

user_reviews: It?s on roof top, nice food and worth paying as well. Over all if it?s nearby to anybody then it would usual place to go, for people who stay far may be one time go

Heard a lot about this mini brewsky, finally got chance to visit this place and try it. Definitely it?s mini reflection of Byg Brewsky in terms of ambience. Food was equally good as the other outlets. Loved the grilled fish with mashed potatoes. The service was good, as it was very less crowded so we received good hospitality.

A great roof top brewery with a view. I had visited it multiple times but this review is for my visit from last week. This visit was after 3 long years but nothing changed. It has the same vibes reciprocating across everything. Great ambience, service, food and beverages. I can't ask for more. It was a Saturday night and seeing people bustling with energy pumps you up. Ordered LIIT, the same old monk, chicken nachos, chicken wings platter & noodles. Taste was as good as it gets and generous quantity with competitive prices stole the show. Keep it up!!! One incident worth mentioning is I forgot to pick up my card after payment and started leaving. I was near the staircase and the waiter who was serving us came running and gave back my card. Thank you so much. I forgot to enquire his name but kudos to him for this gesture. Cheers!!!

Ambience is fantastic. One of the better breweries I have visited. Nice beer but not the best I have tasted. Red ale was mediocre. American blonde was better. The chicken wings we ordered were average. One should visit this place for it's ambience.

One of the best brewery in town, loved the ambiance and the food too is pretty decent. A bit difficult to get place especially during the weekends, so recommend you guys to book it prior. Overall a thumbs up!!
address: 55, 5th Floor, Goenka Chambers, 19th Main Road, Jeewan Griha Colony, Phase 2, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Went for breakfast on a Saturday morning. They serve amazing parathas. We tried the Sattu, Matar, Paneer and Paneer Cheese parathas along with Chole Bhature. Parathas are served with curd, mint & coriander chutney and a cube of Amul butter. Not much of a place where you look for ambience, but as far as the food is concerned, it will sure have me visit again for more.
The food is extremely tasty. In short it reminds me of home away from home. Chule Bhature and paneer parathas are to die for! Would keep coming back to this place for more!
Perfect stop for Delecious paranthas, chole bhathure , chawal combos .. pocket friendly plus tasty . 5 star to this place ! Paneer parantha being my personnal favourite.
address: 3474, Maruti Dental College Road, Dodakamanhalli, Opposite Valmark Ananda Apartment, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Had ordered a fish kabiraji from them. It was pretty bad, to say it politely. Even the sauce, kasundi, was very mild, and seemed quite stale. Overall it was not a very nice experience, and definitely not worth the price.
address: 8, First Floor, Arekere Gate, Opposite Rose Garden Apartment, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: One of the most decent place in BTM, very nice food with very effective cost. Yep but I would say it's not up to the mark for ambience but overall its perfact pack for delicacy.

Great veg food. Have been visiting this place for 7 years now. The taste has been always great. The ambiance is nice n rural. good variety of veg dishes. Ppl with both veg n non-veg tastes Shud try this place.
Value for money. Amazing Rajasthani dishes. Economical, Quality, Tasty meals. Desserts are superb. Must try for cuisine lovers. Ordered couple of times for home delivery.
My go to place for veg food. Rajasthani food at it's best. Can't get enough of desserts here. Ambience- 3.5 Food-4.5 Service-4 Value for money- 4  Must try: Dal Bhati, Mushroom Masala, Rasmalai
Ordered a plate of gulab jamun and rasgulla each for home delivery. Nice packed, quick delivered. Delectable! Must try for sugar rush. Absolute value for money.
address: 170, 16th Main, 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: It was a saturday afternoon and I was looking for a pet friendly place to grab some grub when I stumbled upon this interesting lil joint in 7th phase Jp Nagar. When my pups and I walked in, I felt transported to another world.  The place was so welcoming and calm. We were greeted cheerfully by a young gentleman who then showed us to our seat. When I placed the order I had no idea what lay in store for us.  Each dish took a little time but was perfectly cooked and tastefully flavoured. The staff were very courteous and non intrusive. That was the longest and most enjoyable lunch I have had in a while.  Definitely going back soon.
address: 45/46, Ajantha Avenue, 1st Floor, Puttenahalli Main Road, 7th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: If its burgers, then it's gotta be McDonald's. Situated inside Meenakshi mall, you should definitely try out when going to watch movies there. Try out paneer burger which is bit spicy but very tasty

Friendly staff and Ok food. Service at times can get chaotic and you need to remind them to get you the food ordered. Conveniently located and thus the place can get crowded quickly during evening time.

Staff was friendly.we had ordered many items all were good except the mc cafe cold milkshake.The burgers were superb added with extra cheese . . . . . . . #foodieforlife#foodphotographyfoodblogger#kannadablogger#writersofinstagram#foodblogger#foodblogging#foodie#eatoutoftheweek#eatouts#instalovers#instafamilia#insta#instafamous#instalovers?#instalook#dressup#eatenlightened #kannadablogger#bengalurublogger#zomato#zomatoreviewer
address: 63, Ground Floor, Royal Meenakshi Mall, Hulimavu, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Horrible Food I ordered for masala dosa and masala dosa was like a piece of shit Order for dhai wada they did not have stock so sent me wada sambar I ordered for iddli they did not have stock they sent me puri The complete order was so pathetic only my waste bin was lucky to taste it  My experiance was like I ordered for chicken and they have served me beef as only beef was left with them in their kitchen. HORRIBLE is not the word to difine t hia outlet and experience...

Food was deliver cold when I called up restaurant he refused to listen. Zomato support is another pain in.... Good for nothing I would advise and suggest don't expect help from zomato and if possible switch to another app like Swiggy Food Panda and so on, even though they are from same bed but Zomato never if you want to waste your time energy and money along with nightmare from their so called support team then please enjoy thr taste  Food was provided cold taste was OK Couldn't njoy coz of food temp not happy I do not recommend
Food quantity is sufficient for one person. Need to improve on the quality of Roti, may be by adding a butter so that it remains soft and can be easily chewed
address: Yelanahalli Main Road, Akshaya Nagar, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: The waffles are a bit dry and they look good but aren't as delicious in taste. I asked for a second serving of chocolate sauce, which they were happy to provide, but that too did not help. Try with some other toppings and you might have a better luck.
Wonderful place. Had Strawberry Hong Kong and Smoothies with my wife. It was delicious. I'm willing to try Chocolate and Oreo flavours once I visit again. Kudos!
We went to the stall at Vega City Mall. The Oreo shake was good, the cappuccino was okayish. They can improve on the taste, I feel. It can get better with Service as well!

This place is located in Vega City Mall and serves such amazing waffles that you can't hv them just once.  The waffles are so tasty and yummy that you go into a different dimension altogether.  The pricing is very reasonable.  The staff was very courteous.

One of the best wafel houses in Bangalore, an world wide wafle chain now in Bangalore, a wide variety of savouries and coolers to pick from, a completely unique menu , and lip smacking taste , the wafel sandwich was really crisp and on point, The nutella nuts too is highly recommended, i loved it's softness and taste, one of the best restaurants on the Vega City food court . A must visit place for the best wafles in town.
address: 3rd Floor, Food Court, Vega City Mall, Srinivas Industrial Estate, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: I have tried only the Pothichoru from Deeja, I have to admit this is the best and most authentic pothichoru I've had in Bangalore so far. Truly delicious, it carries all the character and love a typical mom made pothichoru has. With a portion of perfectly cooked fish fry, egg omelette and generous serving of chutney, thoran and curd, truly value for money too.  Thank you!  A request: Introduce curry side like pulisseri, erisseri, kootucurry etc, atleast one, as add-on options in your menu.
address: 309, Sai Nandana Presidency, 5th Main, 11th Cross, Near Rajashri Grandhim Hospitals, Vijaya Bank Layout, Bilekahalli, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: We had chips & sprinklers mini pan cakes !! It was fresh n very delicious !! Had visited this place couple of times since it?s just a walking distance from my home . Worth the money n your time . Pocket friendly prices with ultimate taste . Must visit n recommend to all .

As soon as you enter you get a great cozy vibe!! Chocolate ecstasy made my day... well nutty banana wasn't bad either soft creamy pancakes well it's totally in the second time visit list!!! Lovely place and amazing waffles with decent music and good company. What else you need to call it perfect!?

Hufff ... The sweety creamy soft pancakes... ? It's a plan before a month to visit in here ... We had already planned what to order ... Directly went in and ordered as planned ... The bubble wrap waffle is too god and then comes this citrus zing .. the ice cream compensates the sweetness of orange syrap... But my good suggestion is please order any savoury dish with any of the pancakes or waffles... Every thing is intact in service, ambiance, music all good.
The pancakes were way too thick, clawingly sweet without any freshness or tartness. Considering pancakes are their speciality, they should do a much better job.

An amazing place with good ambience and courteous staff the prices are decent and food is worth the money.Tried the cheesy fries,Tiramisu waffle,Marble chocolate French pancake and choco bongo mini pancake,Mushroom and cheese sandwich and cheesy pops all of them taste amazing I would definitely recommend this place.
address: 24th Main, 2nd Cross, 2nd Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Amazing food have ordered dragon chillie prawns and egg fried rice the flavour the taste and on top of that the customer service was spot on. You won't get a better place to order at late night.. HIGHLY RECOMMENDED
Dragon chilli prawns n veg fried rice. Totally wasted so much money and time. it costed me rs393. but rather the food looks like for rs150. not worth

Amazing food. Late night on time services. Really glad for that. Had ordered Thai red curry with herb rice and must say it was absolutely delicious. Loved the crafted menu. Cheers guys. Keep up the good work.

1st time user, I have ordered Gopi Manchurian and BBQ chicken . I was really impressed with the food ingredients, it was freshly cook, and flavor. They even provide chopsticks as well . Delivery was timely and the best part was the owner himself came n delivered himself at around 1, he was very friendly and nice ..Overall the food was really yum...
What can i say? Finally an authentic Thai and Chinese cuisine.....everything was perfect, fantastic and amazing food!! Form Thai my choice will be Thukpa and Chinese Devils Chicken
address: 14, Patel Medicals, 7th Main, 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: Dish: American chopsuey Place: Zhangs, JP Nagar  Follow me on Instagram @vk_gopal #viveksfoodquest  Lost count of the number of times I have visited this place. Located at JP Nagar, this Chinese restaurant offers amazing dishes. Clean place with courteous staff. From #noodles to #chopsuey , everything is ??. Must try: i. Triple Schezwan Rice- Chicken/Veg ii. Chopsuey #viveksfoodquest

A good place to have Chinese cuisine in the locality. It's a very old outlet in jp nagar. Ambience is good. Place is well maintained with all interiors and lighting. They have kept a Chinese zodiac on the table, you can go through it by the time food arrives.  Ordered egg fried rice and prawn Manchurian. Food was okay. Egg fried rice was bit salty and Manchurian was very spicy. Else taste was good. Should improve food quality.  Staffs were courteous and service was fast.
Nice place and a nice restaurant of descent ambience. The service is descent. The Wanton Soup was really a good start and this joint serves good Chopsuey (American).
