Ever since this place opened in BTM in the 2000's , I have been a fan of this place. One of the best Chinese outlets in Bangalore. Foods such as manchow soup, chicken fried wantons, schezwan chicken, koietheo noodles are top notch.

Zhangs....its attract me from the name....so I Went there with excitement....it didn't failed me... Ambience: That the most part I want to share...it's awesome...we feel that we are in some area of Beijing...the ceiling lamp and the portrait hanging on the wall.... Food: Chinese food always goes well to me... Must try...tom yum soup...chicken Manchurian...if you like sea food try their fish pepper dry and chili prawn ...its yummy...they have salad and soft beverages also... Service: All the staff are dress well and polite and nice to talk to them..thank u for their service... Overall I had a great time recommend for everyone
address: 1743, Raghavendra Plaza , 2nd Phase, (Near Diwakars Hospital), JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Good place to try out some North Indian chats and snacks. If u love street food then you have to try out from their spread of snacks. Also they serve combos like chole kulcha and Puri sabji. Overall my experience was good. Also if u want to try tandoori chai..yeAh u heard it right.. tandoori chai. Den u might want to visit this place .

Had visited this place twice. Today I had Dahi Bhalla. The taste was very nice. Few days back, had North Indian meals here. Food was good. We had Phulka thali and Special Phulka thali. Price difference was 50 rs. The Raita was *replaced* by Panner gravy and one extra Phulka in the special thali. I think, they have the same menu, everyday. Overall, the food is good.

Went there today as I was having craving for Delhi chaat and the overall experience was okay-ish. The ambience is nice, its a self service place, seating is comfortable.  We ordered aloo tikki chaat, papdi Chaat, choke bhature and rajma chawal. I liked only choke bhature, else everything was average.  The chaat were very bland, which certainly is not a feature of authentic Delhi chaat, we had to add table salt in it to make it worth eating. I was disappointed with aloo tikki the most. They need to change their preparations and recipe a bit to be relevant in the competitive market.  Would not visit again.

Ordered from this place on a weekday. This is essentially a sweet shop. The packaging was decent and delivery was on time. We ordered chole bhature (chole was a little oily but good. I liked the salad that came with it) and a box of motichoor ladoos (ladoos were really good but some were broken. Not too be fussy about things but ladoos should not be broken). The prices seem fine when compared to quality. Overall: Food - 3.5/5 Delivery - 4/5 Vfm - 3.5/5

*This review is solely for the Tandoori Chai served*  Tried the very famous Tandoori Chai which was doing it's round around India & was excited because this place was the first ever in Bangalore!  It's a small stall set up right in front of Shagun Sweets, obviously for everyone to try it out. The bill is taken from Shagun sweets & then the chai is prepared outside.  It's 20/- in total and honestly, I was so bummed! I can do better masala chai at home. It tasted so bland and I regretted it at the first sip. It's all just a hype to have fancy tea served all desi.  *IGNORE this place for chai.
address: 294, 7th Main, 7th Cross, BTM 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: Price is very good.taste is also awesome food menu is good..? non veg is also very nice and tastey very good exprience .nice servce very good
Food is very tasty.before the delivery was bad now it's on time.im very happy with the delivery.prices are very good.totally very happy with the service
Very good seivce.I had ordered non veg last night.non veg items are very good.items in the menu are very good.many items are available.overall awesome
Very good experience.food taste is very good.quality and quantity is also good.delivery was on time.good service.i would really like to try more things from this restaurant
I waited for 1 hour for the food and still didn't receive my food. Shouldn't commit if they couldn't
address: Teja Complex, 2nd Floor, 30th Main Road, 9th Cross Jayanagar, B.B.M.P South, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Ordered chicken fried rice, chilly chicken and fish fry. Horrible food. When you are charging money, please provide quality. Fish fry doesn't look like a fish fry. 120 bucks for 1 and it doesn't even even good? Every thing is hot with chilly and that does not make food tastier. Not happy with the quality and quantity.

I visited the place 3-4 times.. never had any good experience at all.. ordered food many times .. being a bong i did not have much choice to order from some other restaurant.. but everytime they dissapointed me..being a bengali restaurant Guga baba provides luchi which is made of aata instead of maida.. roti was horrible... quality is so poor and order chicken curry as well which does not have much taste only full of onions.. very poor food quality...

Well never been there but Ordered 3-4times via Swiggy/Uber Eats from this place which is mostly fish curries and chicken items. Taste is pretty good what I felt like proper Bengali dishes. Love their Aloo Posto, Doi Katla and Bhetki Paturi which is a must try. Chicken Kosha and Mutton Kosha were nicely cooked but was oily. Once ordered Pulao which was not that great. So u Bengali folks staying near BTM in Bangalore u can definitely try this....as we crave for Bengali dishes like always...?

Visited this place many times and had mixed experiences. With veg meal you will get rice, dal, two types of vegetables, alu bhaja and chatni and they changes the vegetables on daily basis. Since it?s a Bengali cuisine, you will get different types of fish items but the fish quality is average. Chicken and mutton dishes are okayish. In the dessert mostly you will get misti doi, rosogolla and gulab jamun.
address: 25, 6th main, Mico Layout, BTM layout 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: A decent place to have good Chinese food. Ordered their big plate combo which gave a fair idea about their dishes. Chicken momo had a generous stuffing of chicken. Pepper chicken was okayish. Schezwan hakka noodles was more Indian than Chinese. The chicken mushroom gravy was well made. It perfectly complimented the schezwan noodles. Apart from these their speciality, the tangy orange chicken is my favourite here and a must try.

Very clean and tidy place. Great to chill with friends, casually. A place that serves this type of standard Chindian menu at these prices, doesn't normally look like this. Full marks for that! Food itself is your average Chindian fare, but with excellent value for money, if you consider the quality of the venue and portion sizes. Been here 4-5 times and tried a variety of dishes. The Fried rice section and the Chicken appetisers section is what we end up ordering the most.

I'd heard really great things about Oogway and decided to get dinner from the place. 4 of us went there with hopes of great food, but everything was quite the opposite.  Everything was bland! Everything lacked salt. Nothing was flavorful. We got 2 combos in which we got Chilli paneer, mushroom broccoli Namprik, Asian greens, veg Manchurian, schezuan fried rice, plain hakka noodles, wantons and spring rolls.  The only impressive ones were the wantons, but not by themselves. The sauce made them taste good.  The food though, although super affordable, I'd like to get my money's worth.  This was a wasteful experience.

Great food, good service, clean place. This is a good place for friendly get together or a night out with the family. I went there for their buffet, which offered unlimited main course and side. And you can have drink or dessert for additional 35 bucks. The price is very reasonable and the food is fresh off the wok.

Really good soups and starters... I love the chicken manchow soup and their babycorn and paneer starters among others. We have always got the food home delivered and the service is pretty fast. Ordered the chicken hakka noodles once, didnt like it though, found them to be overcooked and bland.
address: 18, 24th Main Road, Near Sobha Tulip Apartment, 5th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Pizza not delivered till now and showing already delivered
Delivered within 20 minutes, hot pizza. Kids loved it. Nothing to complain about. The chili flakes and oregano packets give real kick to the pizza flavor.
Domino's is always my first choice for pizza. Not only by the taste but also the vast variety of menu @ very low price. Delivery timing also great.
good food and on time delivery.. thanks
The food is not delivered yet
address: Ground Floor, Gowry's, Next To Vijaya Bank, Arakere Gate, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Just like any other outlet but cleaner, better in service too. The food taste is very much like any other outlet. In terms of cleanliness I have had bad experience with other outlets. Comparatively they are very neat.

This place is one of the restaurants which offers pure comfort food. At that particular price point it's a great option as you get good Italian food which has been made well. Although you should keep in mind that it's an all vegetarian place.
address: Agastya Suites, 116, 8th Main Road, Next to M.K.Ahmed Retail, 4th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

restaurant_name: Balaji Bombay Vada Pav Gujrati Dalebi
user_reviews: This place was in my bookmarks since quite some time ever since I saw the menu. Main attraction for me was Dabeli and Vada pav. Both were nice but Dabeli was a hit. Pav bhaji was not the best but not bad either. Chocolate sandwich was okay, took it for my son. He loved it. The place was homely and mainly clean and tidy. They just need to have a small wash basin. I am visiting again for the sandwiches and Misal pav, which we couldn't accommodate to order today :D!!
address: 7, 7th Phase, Near EK Retail, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Awesome cake and even better service. The owner Deepa is a darling. Placed a late night order at 10.55 minutes before they were closing. And got a very yummy cake delivered by Zomato. Thanks guys. You rock!!!
address: 15, Ground Floor, MN Complex, Near Brigade Millenium, 7th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: If you love eggs u will definitely love this place . I ordered for vegetable cheese omelette and tea ,they served it with bread and butter.They had a lot of options with egg, almost all varieties, I also ordered for tea and it was good . Small and cute place with friendly staffs and good service ?
Visited this place after a long time and found that the look and the feel has changed. Friendly staff and decent food. The only problem is the service; for at times they really test your patience.

We came early morning at 8 on spot for breakfast. The beans were dry and not so nice. I love mushrooms and I was it wasn?t so dry and a tad bit of seasoning would have done some good. The scrambled eggs were soft and lightly fluffy. I don?t like white bread though. I didn?t realize this before ordering and I don?t know if they do give that option. If they don?t , it would great if they would keep it. I typically never order white bread on the side. The food was only okay. The service pretty good. And I love that they used paper straws. The world needs more paper straws , less plastic.

i am revisiting this place after 6 long years, and the most happy thing about it is nothing has changed.. Neither the menu nor how the place looked.. ( ofcourse being scarcastic) I expected much fancy renovationa s St.marks road one looks more lit.And with the food, yes over years it has not gotten better but defnitely not bad either.Ordered for a egg Pav bhaji, srilankan rice and a plain omlet.. unfortunatley nothing impressed me.. Omlet wasnt as before, srilankan rice had no salt in it and the veggies served with it was not fresh either.Very disappointed that my once upon a fav place do not serve a tasty food  as then! :(
Unlike other egg factory outlet s, this has a very bad ambience. Not at all clean, very badly maintained. Taste of food is also nit like other outlets. Would definitely not recommend.
address: 288, Ground Floor, Opposite HP Petrol Pump, 15th Cross, 18th Main, 5th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: I ate Chicken Thupka from this restaurant, I had ordered my food in Swiggy. The food came hot and I like that. However their Thupka was full of fat noodles, sausy water , garlic and oil and thats it. It contained very less chicken and vegetables. Absence of fresh herbs were notes as well. It was more like a Schezwan noodles sipped in boiling water with some oil.  It wasn?t bad as in BAAAD.. but it was not that so good to eat too. I see a lot of scope of improvement with that dish.  BR

Being very polite I recommend everyone to not visit this restaurant. They do not have the basic understanding of what i called veg. and what i called non-veg. They served my with chicken dish when I ordered for a pure veg dish. Why? Because my friends ordered non-veg and they assumed i am also a non-vegan and hence can serve me with a chicken dish. The worst experience i had.
This place used to serve good food in the starting but slowly their quality and taste has come down. Hopefully they'll take a look at it and see if things change as it used to be.
This place, is the mother of all Chinese restaurants. Good to see small places working hard to keep their food amazing. I will literally marry someone in this restaurant. 69/10 would recommend
Good food,Prompt delivery,Quick service, Decent quantity,Great taste, reasonable prices. A definite saviour for bachelors and spinsters in and around Arekere
address: 1, Opposite British Biological, Arekere, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: We like the menu here. We dined here, took away food and ordered food many timea. Very tasty food and fast delivery. But there is lot of opportunity to improve on hygiene. I would love to give 5 stars if hygiene is stepped up.
60/- for 2 idli is way too high. :|
worst experience
Food was very good and price also reasonable
Tasteless food. Hard to eat.not enjoyed not good panner is too hard. Biriyani sprinkled with masala Not cooked well. Curry's are not tasted good.
address: 20, Gottigere - Kengeri Road, Royal Lake Front Phase1, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: One of the best mangalorean sea food in the area.. Tried Pomfret masala fry, Nang (Sole fish) tawa fry, marwai (shell fish) sukka & fish curry... I can certify for authenticity...

One place which I visit every time I crave for actual sea food... They make the yummiest prawn ghee roast and neer dosa. It's budget friendly and the restaurant is open until 11 PM. The staff is also very sweet and kind. A must visit for all the coastal people craving for dome actual sea food
Good food! Non-spicy, sufficient quantity and reasonable price. Decent seating available. Convenient location, near Arekere main road, off Bannerghatta road.
worst food ever...no taste and food was very cold.

Been to this restaurant twice and had a good experience here. We ordered fish meals, bondas sukka (squid sukka) and chicken ghee roast. Ambience is good. Good spacious tables and the menu is very reasonable price. Bondas sukka was tasty. We loved fish meals. It's an authentic coastal food. Fish meals costs 130 rupees, And we get 1 full mackerel fish cut into 2 piece. Half in curry and half fried. 2 neer dosa, 1 cup clams sukka and veg curry. Chicken ghee roast was also great  There a other restaurant serving coastal foods around. But this one serves authentic coastal food. Will visit again
address: 11/2, Arakera Main Road, Arakera Gate, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: One and only chocolate boutique I have seen with hundreds of flavours best to gift on any occasions. Unique flavoured chocolates available here.
address: 28 1st Main 2nd Cross Sarakki Garden, JP Nagar 6th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Situated near Hulimavi hate, this has become our lunch spot as it's very close to college. Most of their food is good. It should be among the most pocket friendly places around here. Good food, service might get delayed during lunch hours as it gets very crowded.  Kerala porota is a must try here. Their veg n non-veg curries are all good. Chicken Hyderabadi Biryani is also a good option here. I like their chicken shawarma as well. Overall a good, pocket friendly restaurant.  I wouldn't recommend their malabari chicken biryani because is basically chicken mixed in ghee rice. Their Chinese menu is just decent. Also the Chinese main course I have tried, the chicken was very hard. Their juices tasted very good the first time I tried but later on it became too watery.
address: 941/1, Shop 4, Hulimavu Main Road, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: This place is a pure joy. Lovely food. It was home delivery and it was quick. Totally recommended. The Momos are nice and also the baos. Good food by good people.
A small place , not so easy to spot. Momos were good but too small as compared to the price. And their mustard oil was lil uncooked. However they do have a vast variety of momos of all kinds.
The new menu of chicken isn't great.  The seasoned potato momos have been removed. Bring it back! . They were awesome! It's removed in the new menu.

This place I visited back when it was pure veg and was opposite to Black Pearl, Koramangala. I had no clue when it did get shift.  A must place for all music lovers as they play reaallllllyyy reaalllyyy beautiful and amazing soundtracks.   Coming to food : I have tried mixed momo platter which was authentic and too good for my taste buds. Also tried a fried rice which I customized and was damn filling.  Price: Moderate.  Wifi- super strong at early stage and they reduces drastically.  Service : Really appreciate the way the owner himself interacts and makes sure you are comfortable.

No more a pure vegetarian place. They are selling non-veg also now. Days.  Noodles are always not available. 3star rating based on their previous taste for fried rice.  A big disappointment with start of non-veg.
address: 2nd Cross, Kothnoor Village Main Road, Natraja Layout, 7th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore
Hongasandra, 1st Main Road, Bommanahalli, Bangalore

user_reviews: Located in a nice quiet place. Good ambience and place is kept neat and tidy. Its more like a restobar. Had Shyam Savera a type of kofta which was a delight to eat. Recommended to visit here once.

I have been visited this place more than 15 times and every time this place is managed to impress me. Every non-veg items are mouth watering. Veg Doha is so delicious. Crunchy palak Paneer ..u must try.
It has a multi story seating arrangement and offers quite huge space with family area separated and bars separate. The quality of food is explicit and tasteful especially the non vegetarian items.
When you feel like going out but within your neighbourhood to avoid traffic . Good options for Mangalore non vegetarian options . The staff is courteous.

Well to be true it's near my home so, no mood to cook let's go simply Indian. I just love the place. They have ample parking space. it's 3storied building they have roof top as well which I prefer the most.? Service wise they are pretty decent. Quality and quantity of food is good. People around there are polite and decent. If u have someone coming home and u need to take them somewhere simple Indian is a quick fix. With live Match and light music definitely will do the work
address: 500, 2nd Floor, 2nd Block, 6th Stage, Near Sai Baba Temple, Arekere, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Special Basmati Rice Biryani Moradabadi and Hydrabadi styles Chicken korma Chicken kali Mirch Butter chicken Ckicken changezi Chicken kabab Rumali Roti
address: 1059/1, 16th Main, 16th Cross, Mico layout, 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: This place literally served us dog meat. I had ordered for chicken kabad and the meat was too soft and filthy. Yuckkk it totally ruined our day. Feeling really disgusted and unhappy. Someone please note this.
Excellent food try prawans briyani...???
too bad
Less price more food
Good food
address: #8, 1st main, 1st Cross, Opp Jaraganahalli Park, 6th Cross, Second Floor, Second house, Chikkaswamy Layout

user_reviews: I went with my three friends and we enjoyed the food like anything..  The Interior of the place makes u feel more good and what better way to enjoy Punjabi food when you have Punjabi ambiance like dhaba!!  Food was extremely delicious, order too many to remember the names..  Gonna be visiting this place again nd again..
Typical Punjabi restaurant. Had my favorite Pulao and rajma. It was delicious and would love to go back there again. P.S. The ambience is also Punjabi with pictures and dolls

After reading reviews from here we went to this place. We were craving for North Indian food. It was not as we expected! ? Ambience is good. Hospitality is good. Rotis are great! Normal vegetable sabjis are good but paneer gravies are very sweet ? Starters are okay. Finally food is over priced! For the price which we paid we would have eat in some other North Indian restaurants twice!

Whenever I crave good punjabi khana, I head to this place. They server authentic Punjabi food. Every dish is slathered with butter for the extra richness. If you are in bannerghatta road and looking for good food, you know where to go

Just Wow ... Visited with my Friends for a Casul Dinner on Last Week. Though we went there on a Week Day but the Place was almost Packed. I am regular to their Bellandur Outlet. The best part is their Consistency. There are so many Choices in their menu. Perfect Ambiance. Quick and Friendly Service. As usual the Hospitality at it's Best. I must say that they are the Best Punjabi Restaurant in the Town. If you really wanna try an Authentic Punjabi Food then you must Visit this Place. Highly recommend! Will surely Visit this Outlet soon. Cheers!  Ambiance : 5/5 Food : 5/5 Service : 5/5 Value for Money : 5/5
address: 15/1, Opposite Shopper's Stop, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: I just loved the hummus and chicken. Decent taste and thickness of the hummus. In the menu this is called Chicken and hummus roll. It?s clearly not a roll but I didn?t mind because I liked the taste. I also ordered the Falafel salad which was simple , fresh and acidic. The falafel was crunchy and yummy. Do try !
address: Shop 4, 7th Main Road, 2nd Tage, BTM Layout, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: The very poor food quality and worst packing ever received via zomato I wonder where are the quality checks how zomato can allow this kinda restaurant to be partner with them please do not order any food from this restaurant.
address: 52, 1st Floor, 3rd Cross, Near BIB, Omkar Nagar, Arkere Gate, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: One of worst experience of the quality of service and quality of food , beverages and package is worst then all above  Mixing Vada Pav with Banana Cake really?

veggie Maggie was without any vegetables and tea was fine as shown in the picture. That was a spoiler. But the jaggery tea was amazing but I think the quantity for 1 is actually a lot and can be easily served for two.
address: Royal Meenakshi Mall, Hulimavu, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: What can someone write about some of the specific places like Starbucks or CCD. But still there are lot of other things to consider about the outlet. 3 star rating is because of the service. Its like some of the generic things to be taken care of which i felt were not upto the expectation. If someone asks for a cold coffee, it better be cold instead of being served with a normal coffee. Chillness of the coffee enhances the taste for it. Basically what i am trying to say out here is they didnt take care of the temperature of coffee be it hot or cold. In other outlets this is not the case. Hot coffee is exactly how it needs to be and the same is with cold.

Bakasura gives it a five just for the free stuff. BOGO was on, ordered a chocolate milkshake. Thinking i'll be getting one more. That's two all together. But they get me 4 all together and the delivery guy says "enjoy sir". The shake was amazing too as usual, but yes you get a special mention. kudos.

Located in a calm and quiet locality opposite to the garden. Staff is courteous but they don't listen carefully to our order. During evenings the place seems a bit crowded. Best time to visit is morning.
address: 524, 60 Feet Road,Vijaya Bank Layout, Opposite Police Station, Belekahalli, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: I was a little sceptical when I heard that the burgers here taste like KFC's, on giving it a shot though, I was not disappointed. Fast forward to a few months I ordered its Chicken Popcorn and that too was quite good.

Ordered for their jumbo chicken patty burger meal. The burger didn't looked jumbo from any angle and smaller in size. The patty tasted quite good though. The french fries were tasteless and bland and totally soggy. Looked like old stock.

Tried popcorn chicken and hot and crispy wings . It's literally like the cheap version of KFC . But tastes almost like the fried chicken served in KFC but a little oily . The taste was good especially the wings tasted too good . Popcorn chicken was just average.

To begin with , I ordered only two items , rock burger and aloo Patty burger for home delivery. Though the items are few but it's worth sharing for it's quality. It was a bang on for my cravings. Had to share the half picture of rock burger to show that how juicy it was from inside. Good thing is that the burgers did not feel dry at all. Will be visiting or ordering again, undoubtedly. Good job cravy wings ?

Another one like KFC. Its so nice to see KFC having cheaper versions at other stores???. But with ?150(50 off) I had a lot of things for lunch, fries, lollipops, even a ?20 coke. So yeah why not, do give it a try??
address: 1/52-10, Bharath Petroleum Premises, Opposite Subramanya Arcade, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: It's been 4 years we have been visiting this joint very regularly. You get good veg Punjabi and Chinese food here. Also recently they have added Amritsari kulcha section to it. This place has such warm dhaba vibes .

Just beside the main road is this restaurant, which has the look of an on-the go restaurant that is self-serviced. I will break my review into three parts.  1. Do not expect any ambience because there aint any.  2. The prices are very reasonable but yes the most worth mentioning part is that there is amply variety to choose from. So many different combinations of North Indian Vegetarian food. And they're all totally worth the price. The food is good. You can definitely eat here once a while.  3. I would suggest the management to cover the area facing the road with some type of shield either plastic or any sort of thing to prevent dust from entering the premises. I would rate your restaurant with an extra star if that could be taken care of.  Recommended.
address: 123(2), 24th Main, 5th Phase, Opposite To Royal High School, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: The food was very good,,and especially Kolhapuri chicken was so delicious,and service is also better with good quality people,, totally fine

am from manglore .when am coming from register office near konankunte police station ... at that time i wil ... going to these hotel ... very low price the food quality and quantity both are satisfied ..... nice place
It's good quality food.. ample space for parking n located in very good place.good variety of options for both veg and non veg , economical value for money try it u won't get disappointed for sure...

Nice place which offer good food at affordable prices. There is ample parking space available. Hotel is clean with courteous staff. But personally for me the food could be a bit more masaladaar/spicy.. more apt to their name.Totally loved it worth to try out for sure?

Happened to spot this new kid on the block two nights ago. Decided to give it a try. Ordered lemon chicken and chicken szechwan fried rice. The fried rice was good but the lemon chicken was not lemony enough for my taste. When i expressed my opinion to Mr.Shivu, it was considered immediately and he modified the dish for me. It came back perfect. I greatly appreciate this kind of customer service. Will definitely visit again to try something new.
address: 1, Amruthnagar Main Road Konankunte, Kanakpura Road, Bengaluru

user_reviews: I never received this order. ETA was 9.15 pm and I checked *unwell* option as I'm having bad health. These Zomato guy's are drawing too much nonsense and they trouble the poor delivery guy in rain. Instead they should sent the order at the first place itself. It had nothing to do with the restaurant or the delivery guy rather the poor and disgusting operational efficiency as always of Zomato guys. They didn't even cancel it, neither delivered it and nor refunded my money and it's 9.51 pm.  It would have been very less effort for me to cook on my own in this sickness also instead of dealing with these people's sickness.
I order delivery from here often.They serve really nice food. No gimmics, affordable price and quick delivery. Gobi fried rice was one of the best I had here. Would definitely recommend.
Ordered chicken kababs online..? the chicken was not so fresh is what I felt..quantity was sufficient enough for the price paid.. Would like to try their other items!!
address: 13/11, 1A, BVN Building, Arekere Main Road, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Food- 4/5 Ambience - 3/5 ( More like a get together and drinks place. A no frills place) Price - 4.5/5 Hygiene- 3.5/5 Service - 4/5 Parking - 4/5 Fire Safety - Mostly open air restaurant. No visible fire safety device or secondary exit.  Details soon.
address: 53/A, Hulimavu, Bannerghatta Main Road, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: We ordered for Schezwan Paneer Sandwich Combo, Taste is good but I hardly find paneer, I hope they would increase quantity of paneer next time, Lemonade is ok, packing is good.
Nice compact place with outdoor seating. Ordered veg momos, mc cain platter, virgin mojito. Food was good but not great. Need improvement in food taste. Presentation and quantity of food was good.
address: 7, Ground Floor, RR Commercial Complex, Akshay Nagar, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Lovely place and a lovely ambience with loads of space. This is a very good burger place. The meat is usually fine minced that they use. The Bun is very different and is flavoured as well. I would have preferred a lot more veggies as well which is a bit scarce. The drinks are decent. The service is a bit laid back depending upon the flow of customers. A warmer welcome would do more good. Having said all this, the place still beats MacD or Burger King in the overall taste vs price rating.

Probably my favourite place for burgers as of now. This place is my preferred place for working with buddies, brainstorming sessions and a lot more work and fun. You can get a variety of burgers, shakes and much more here. The burgers are juicy, the fries crispy and shakes so thick that makes you want more. Only bummer being that the service takes a lil while longer than you can expect normally. Price wise, not so bad but a bit on the expensive side.  Overall a good place to hang around with friends and co workers. Good food, ambience and a decent value for money.
Actual rating: 3.5  It's a delivery order. I've tried only the Veg. Grilled exotic and the choco brownie shake. Both were equally good. Will definitely try more from this place.
Awesome ambience...food tasted great Friendly staff...fast service All in all I would highly recommend this place for some quick bites...!!!

Intended Rating: 4.5/5  Biggie's burger is one of my favourite burger joints. They have exquisite range of burgers both veg and non veg. The burgers are very different from the regular ones. Must visit burger joint. They also have hot dog, fries, wedges, shakes and mojito's.  ? Ambiance: This outlet is huge compared to the other outlets. It's very spacious and has indoor and outdoor seating. The decor is quite catchy and lit well.  ? What I had: ? Chicken Cheese Beast: This is the best burger I have had. The chicken patty is filled with cheese inside. The cheese oozes out of the burger at just a bite.  ? Veg Exotic: amazing blend of Mushroom n Paneer patty with grilled veggies and cheese.  ? Cuban Classic Mojito: very fruity and refreshing. Just goes well with the hot fresh burgers.  Ambiance: 4/5 Food: 4/5 Service: 4/5 Price: 4/5
address: 114, Kothanur Main Road, Santrupthi Nagar, 7th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Highly dissapointed with the biriyani. It was highly greasy and it was like colored rice with chicken.the kebabs were ok ok . Mutton biriyani was okaish but highly inconsistent taste.

This was my first order from this particular outlet. Ordered their mutton biryani, peas pulao and chicken maharaja. Packaging was good and food arrived hot. Coming to the biryani, I am a great lover of their biryani, as soon as I opened the pack, a foul smell came out. It turned out they had provided old stock of biryani which had gone so bad that it was smelling. I had to throw it. The peas pulao and chicken was really good though. One suggestion to the management, you guys make awesome food and we love the biryanis. Don't take undue advantage of our trust and make us waste our money. I used to be a regular customer of zeeshan, but after this never going to order again.

Zeeshan the famous name for biryanis Calcutta style, but this time I ordered this delicacy, which said chicken bharta but was not bharta yet was tasty, basically boneless chicken and half egg filled with yummy shorba,now you would have got a 4 start definitely if it was actually bharta and was delivered a bit faster, overall yeah man it was a lot and tasty for 215? ?
address: 1, Gopal Reddy Layout, 18th Cross, 21st Main, 5th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: We ordered for 1 full and 1 half meals, quality is quit impressive taste wise it is good, I would like to suggest ambara to use containers instead of pouches for packaging.

This place is the safest place to order when you just don't want to take risk .We always order food from here when we don't want to try out any new place,from there chicken biriyani to starters all were mind blowing..We don't dine in but the restaurant is a family place and looks good.

Ambara Gardenia is a contemporary mangalorean restaurant with good ambience and service and we tried chicken meals, butter squid fry and tandoori chicken and every tasted good but everything includes a lot of coconut as it?s a manglorean cuisine and in chicken meals only rice is unlimited,curry is limited. Overall a good place for a casual lunch or dinner!

Good ambiance and very good service. Restaurant is quite big and specious too. Food quality as well as quantity also good. They served Andhara style veg thali and Mangalorean style non veg thali. As the thali got over by 10pm, we have tried Chicken biriyan, Pepper Mushroom & curd rice. Curd rice was awesome. Andhra style Chicken biriyani was ok having three small pieces. I will look forward to taste thali here.
I think you have to try andra style meals instead of biriyanis and other stuffs, i was so disappointed with chicken biriyani and chilly chicken
address: 1065/A, 5th Cross, 13th Main, 2nd Floor, Vijaya Bank Layout, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Tried this new place for pastries & Thanks to them... The cakes were pretty good & everyone in the family loved it.  Had 4 different pastries for the evening which includes  1. Red Velvet 2. Chocolate Truffle 3. Pineapple 4. Black Forest  My favorite picks would be Red Velvet & Chocolate Truffle :)  Red Velvet was pure love to have from this place. rich chocolate in the truffle gives it extra edge over the others.  Was informed that the cakes are freshly prepared one hour before the delivery , which made the cakes super soft & moist with good texture..Cake slices are cut to good portions which makes it value for money..  Appreciate the staff who made these yummy desserts..  Definitely recommended & will order for more occasions.
address: 544, 6th Main, 11th Cross, BTM layout, 2nd stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: Tood Chicken crispy and hungry bird. Taste was not good. It has only patty and mayo. Mayo was havng very bad taste. not sure if it was old. Avoidable

I loved what I ordered ,though apprehensive at first ,I ended up relishing the chicken crispy burger and the peri peri chicken.The latter being my all time fav had to be good.A good restaurant with decent and affordable prices. Kudos!!!
The chicken in chicken role was under cooked, chicken popcorn was good nice quantity and tasty, spicy chicken was very small
missing item
good
address: 116/1, Devarchikkanahalli Road, Bilekahalli, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Bhavani chats is a great place for a evening snack. Chats, juice and sweets are available at very reasonable price. Dont go by the look of the place.. taste and hygiene is what matters and there is both at this place. Everything will be prepared in front of your eyes. Cheese vada pav, samosa, chum chum sweet are a must try. Enjoy!

There are a few places where you get good chaats.. This is one of them.. It is not that clean... But ya chaats are good.. Especially pani puri, tikki chaat. Jalebis are good... Hot n crispy Jalebis... Moong dal pakodas are nice... They do serve parathas like paneer, aloo, Gobi which are average.. Even milkshakes n fruit juices are OK.. On weekends this place is crowded in the evening.. For breakfast which starts by 730, you get parathas, poha n puri sabji which is also good..

Very decent place for chats and parathas in this locality.  Should tell the guy who makes the chat your preference, otherwise good luck ;)   May be on a next visit, should try out their items in the breakfast menu, which are their specialties
address: A11, Opposite Ranka Apartments, Bilekahalli, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: The biggest disappointment is name ..Tandoori Chai, I expected they will put kullhad in tandoor and when it is red hot they will pour tea and serve it in another mitti ka kullhad..for this experience I went there and completely shocked and disappointed!!  They served normal tea in chini mitti kullhad, tea was ok and french fries were ok but major disappointment because of expectation.Please change the name of shop or serve real tandoor chaim.

I decided to eat from this place with my fingers crossed as there are not many reviews about this place. The shawarma I ate here was the best shawarma I've ever eaten. Must try the shawarma in this place.

ordered shawarma and chicken burger. i must say its amazing. packing was good. never tasted shawarma lyk this before. the best part is there is no extra packing charges for any of the product. loved it... must try...
Best shawarma I had ever tasted in Bangalore.. It's really very good... Best among all the rest of the restaurant. The quantity is amazing must try...
Just ordered shawarma. First I thought it?s a new restaurant but again ordered by finger crossed. I must say it?s amazing and mouth watering shawarma. Yummmmmmy.
address: 3/1, VAV Avenue, Eshwara Layout, RBI Layout Main Road, JP Nagar 7th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: The shawarma had french fries. It tasted good but my expectation was an actual authentic shawarma. Too much of onions as well. Could be improved a bit
Very bad, not worth it. Coke is warm, shwarma is too small, they would have mentioned it as mini in their menu. French fries are hardly 15 in numbers.
this is a ripped off. the size is very small and less quantity
address: 172/1, 3rd Floor, Food Court, Vega City Mall, Srinivas Industrial Estate, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: This place is located next to Oracle office. The ambience is good n nice. Coming to taste and price it's decent enough pocket friendly.  Tried the veg pizza it saw yummy, well cooked n the size was worth the price.

We had a Paneer pesto sizzler, a hot chocolate and a cafe latte. The hot chocolate and cafe latte were tooo sweet! We asked them to fix it, they said that they have a vending machine. They also tried to fix it by adding more milk but it ended up being sweeter. ?? On the bright side, the sizzler was amazing!! Would certainly visit again for the sizzler here ?
address: Ground Floor, 21, Krishnama Raju Layout, Near Oracle Dorasani Palya, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: If you want delicious 'ghar ka khaana' in BTM, then this is the place to visit! People here are friendly and service is fast. There slogan is 'Good food is good mood'. And they sure follow it. Cheers!
Very tasty food in budget price. Must try the paneer and chicken dishes along with delicious Parathas and Veg Starters.  Highly recommended !!!!!
address: Hose 17, 19 cross, 7th main 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: Reasonably priced and tasty food. Perfect for a snack or two. I especially love the cutlets from this place. We had ordered chicken cutlet this time and by mistake they sent us veg ones. But they were kind enough to send us chicken ones later, late in the night. So good service by zomato and the restaurant. You know how to keep your costumers happy.

Lemme first look at this cheese cake again ?? i was loving it .. the taste was really cheesy cheese .. it was a blueberry one .. and i also tried chicken kabab hot dog ( If i am Not wrong with the name ) .. it was so filling .. the ambience was quite pleasant ?

Nice ambience and a lot of good food on their menu like sandwiches, pizzas, chicken roll and burgers.They serve pastries and milkshakes too. Overall a good cozy place to drop by with family or friends for your evening snacks.
One of my favourite place for hangout. Second floor is really very cozy.... Delicious food and great smoothies. Cake is really tasty..... Especially the rainbow cake...
address: 7, Doddakammanahalli Main Road, Central Excise Layout, Phase 2, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Newly opened in JP Nagar 2nd phase, this small place serves you amazing Continental food dishes. Amazing options to choose from. I wanted to check this place out and went there for lunch. Their menu is crisp and to the point. Neat and tidy place, with decent seating and ambience. From starters to their Mexican and Italian dishes, everything was freshly made. 1. For starters, had paneer fingers where the paneer was fresh and melted in my mouth. 2. Garlic Mayo dressing Salad: tasted good but was too salty. Told this to their staff and they got it changed. 3. Mexican Veg flat bread: try this, and you will love it. All vegetables added, freshly baked with wheat base. 4. Main course: Fish curry with rice and chicken lasagne: my friends loved this.  Try out this place, and I am sure that you will start frequenting here often.  For more such updates follow me on Instagram @vk_gopal #viveksfoodquest

Bland, just too bland. Everything was extremely bland. I don't recommend this place to anyone. Service was fast, but food was disappointing. We asked the manager, he said ' This is Italian, so its supposed to be bland'??\u200d??

Sorry that I'm rating it 3 it's only because of them ... Took such a long time to serve the food ... I hate being waited to get served .. But coming to the food ... I can rate 5/5 stars .. the burger patty was crisp n fresh ... Since we asked to make it spicy they made it I usually do not prefer milk shakes .. but I tasted brownie shake.. it was light n yummyyyy Even the chicken wings was rightly spiced and tasted very with slight of sweetness and herbs on it. And the Alfredo pasta was also good but could have been added with right amount of salt n spices in it In total I like the whole ambiance the only problem is you have to wait if u have ample amount of time.

This place is placed on main road at first floor jp nagar.. Ambience: it?s simple and plain with some quotes on the wall with simple seating arrangement Food: their menu is good with healthy substitutes We ordered brownie shake and burger with cream cheese paneer wrap The salad was ok ok but the fried were yummy The wrap was heavy The burger was good the tiki was made from kidney beans Rates are reasonable too
Had food here for first time . Quite healthy n delicious. They have variety of options in wheat instead of maida stuff. We had veg here n I loved it !! Would recommend all to visit this place !!
address: 1304, 1st Floor, 9th Cross, 20th Main, 2nd Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: All right!  I had been here on a weekday just to have a fish fry as I was craving for fish that day. I chose this place as it was a mangalore cuisine. I asked for bangude tawa fry. The taste was just satisfactory, nothing impressive. I don?t know how their other menu items would taste. Rating is just for for the fish fry.

I wanted to try out this place since a long time.. So one night we decided to order in.. The delivery was done in time and the food was delicious..! We ordered rava fry fish, neer dose and chicken gassi.. Will definitely visit this place to try out more manglorean style dishes. An added bonus for this restaurant is its pricing.. It is extremely reasonable for coastal cuisine!
address: Sir M Visveswaraya Road, Kutappa Garden, Mulki Sundar Ram Shetty Nagar, Bilekahalli, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: As it's located to near my house, I was planning to visit this place from long time and happen to visit last weekend. Located on the main road, it's ambience is nice. It has authentic sea food, esp Mangalorean special fishes.  We tried Chicken Ghee roast with Neer dosa- wherein Chicken was tender and spicy. Dosa was so soft and tasty. Loved the Bangda Tawa fry- which was less masala and cooked well.  Ladyfish masala fry was semi gravy and was good in taste. Also Anjal (Seer) Kebab was nice. Lastly we ordered Ginger Juice, had more of ginger flavor.  Service was appreciable. This is a nice restaurant if your looking for authentic Mangalore style with a pocket friendly price.

This particular Restaurant is located just walkable distance from our house. Was wanting to visit this from a very long time. Finally, got to visit for today's dinner. It's a sea food heaven for sea food lovers. Loved the ambience too. Its a mangalore style cuisine. We had ordered for chicken ghee roast. It was very authentic. It was filled with flavours. The chicken was very tender and tasty. Next we ordered for bangda fish fry, we could taste the actual taste of the fish, so delicious. It was made with very minimal amount of masala. This gave the fish a very distinct taste. Then we ordered for neer dosa, it thick and filling unlike other places where it would be very thin. Then anjal fish kabab was the best. The fish was very fresh and cooked to perfection. It was boneless. It tasted much more better than the usual chicken kabab.

Was very curious about a seafood place in JP Nagar. Well you know what they say about curiosity and the cat. Long story short, the seafood was extremely stale and rubbery. The seer fish and butter garlic prawns were fork resistant and i gave up after 5 minutes. The only good thing was the lime soda and we made a quick exit after gulping it down. If anyone is interested in the feedback, please please make sure you serve fresh seafood.
address: 30, First Floor, 2nd Main, Santrupthi Nagar, Opposite Axis Bank, Kothanur Dinne Main Road, 7th Phase, Bangalore, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Not worth the price. Price is very high but taste and quality of the food and packaging is not upto to the mark for the price charged by them. Even taste is also not that great. Very bad experience. I will never order any food from this restaurant as they are cheating and charging high price in the name of authentic Karnataka foods. Worst food experience. Friends don't ever order from this restaurant.
When ordered the food on Zomato, received stinky food. Not a fresh one. When I called the restaurant on the mentioned number, it is saying wrong number
Good service with naati mane team , their approach is very good , had very good non veg combo , planning to visit again and again, naati chicken Curry favorite.
address: 4th Floor, Bangalore Central Mall, 9th Block, JP Nagar, Bangalore
1, 100 Feet Ring Road, Phase 1, BTM Stage 2, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: I had ordered Paneer tikka biryani for lunch.  The quantity was good. Had decent amount of masala, rice and paneer tikka . Packaging was neat.  The only suprise was that the printing on raitha tin said "Oye amritsar" instead of "Mad over Biryani".. :P...  Value for money - 4/5 Quantity - 4/5 Quality - 4/5

Got biryani ordered from here. I am not fond of veg biryani of all the places. It has to have the aroma and taste that differentiates it from pulao. This place had that. What perfect taste. Neat packing and good quantity. I just wished the paneer cubes were a little more cooked.
address: 72, 2nd Floor, Next to Max & Crossword, 3rd Phase, Inner Ring Road, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Sent some other items instead of ordered ones. Highly disappointed. Should consider the order before they send it. Worthless. Cant be trusted

Always have had good food here, be it dine in or home delivery..... every time I've gone there.. I'hv had good Experience.. I really Loved the Chicken Biryan Of Garma garam.. Yummy Biryani@reasonable price...

I ordered food from ZOMATO through paytm amount was (160/-)food was on d way but when i contacted restaurant my food was cancelled and they didnt refund. I was dying in hunger If your order rejected by hotel they will never refund the amount totally fraud fraud fraud..cheating GARMA GARAM

I ordered egg korma and egg mughlai for delivery and the food was very bad. Half the containers were full of oil, literally. Seriously, not kidding! The food smelled bad too. Had to throw the entire thing away.
I ordered paneer chilli , fried rice and palak paneer...all of them were satisfying w.r.t taste , quantity, packaging n delivery. Thank u..wait for my next order!! I'm an economical foodie ..?
address: MICO Layout, Arakere, Opposite Vijaya Bank, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Sambram Biriyani Paradise located in JP Nagar 3rd phase. It's famous for biryani, it's perfect joint to satisfy your craving for home styled food. This place has quite good seating. Quick service  Food : 4.5/5 Service : 4.5/5 Ambience : 3/5 Cleanliness : 3/5
address: 633, 100 Feet Ring Road, Dollar Layout, 3rd Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: If you're craving for some crispy chats... Here it is... Mr. Meetharam serves delicious chats at there outlet... Much like the conventional touch of taste... Loved these masala and dahi puri here... A must visit chat shop to full fill your snack needs...
Food taste was average and it was very cold. Looked like some left over food of morning breakfast was being served in the evening. My first and last experience with them.
probably beacuse it was delivered late and packing was torn and got wet from the rain
It was extremely oily and was uneatable..it can make someone sick...waste of money
their pav Bhaji is filling and always delivered with garnish!
address: 449, 9th Cross, 2nd Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

restaurant_name: The Coastal Crew by Fujian on 24th
user_reviews: I wanted to try out a restaurant serving Asian food and was prompted to try this as it's close to my home.  I will list out my experiences as per categories :  1. Ambience : Not good. The ground floor has a fine dining vibe and the rooftop gives off a pub vibe but the crowd is mixed in rooftop as families come in big groups. It's extremely confusing as to who the rooftop caters to as the music is played loudly, a projector displays sports games.  2. Staff : I was disappointed by the hospitality extended towards me yesterday. Not one of the staff members so much as even gave a smile and I waited 20 minutes to get my bill.  3. Food : Manchow soup was good but the crispy corn starter wasn't great as the corn wasn't crunchy. Pan fried noodles with schezwan sauce was good.  Overall, if you are looking just for decent food at a reasonable price then this place is good.

This is a very nice place in the heart of jpnagar.Opposite to zaitoon jpnagar and having a nice big parking lot.They have an air-conditioned dining area and a roof top dining area as well. We went there for a lunch and chose to sit in the roof top area.Roof top section is good with lots of indoor plants and all.However they don't have a seperate smoking area.So if there are lots of smokers nearby you it could be an issue for nonsmokers. Service is very good and fast. Coming to food,we tried Chinese/Thai food which was very good.Tried Diced chicken with green chilla paste & namprik goong for starters.Both were very much tasty. For main course,we ordered Thai green curry with rice and Hakka noodles.Loved the Hakka noodles which was fairly spicy.Thai green curry was very much creamy and mildly sweet.One Thai curry with rice should be enough for two as it's very heavy.. The menu is well priced.Not that pricey. I will definitely be visiting them again ..even more hungry for more...

Loved the food here and they have good offers too. The variety in the cuisine is something to appreciate and so is the courteous service offered. They also have three different types of seating area to cater to variety of needs. Definitely recommended place to go in JP Nagar.

Fujian we located in JP Nagar but never got a chance to enter inside. From the name thought they serve only Japanese food but surprisingly they make really good coastal food too. We ordered ghee roast, mutton pepper,appam and prawns gassi.. Every dish had quality and quantity.. Will be again going to this place.

Another restaurant on main streets of J P nagar . Wide range of options for non-payment vegetarians since they have coastal, coorg , north indian and Chinese varities. We being vegetarian thought of trying Chinese this time . In starters we ordered crispy corn chilli pepper which was a bang on. We ordered butter garlic noodles and schezwan fried rice and it had perfect blend of spice and Chinese flavor . Not to mention the quantity which is good . Ambiance vice they have an indoor seating and a rooftop . Rooftop dining is recommended and is beautiful . If you are around JP nagar definitely must try .
address: 25/1, Near Sampoorna, 24th Main, 5th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: I ordered from this place yesterday. The eggs, beans, mashed potatoes served with toast and butter were yum. The sausages were slightly undercooked. Since this is a newly opened outlet, maybe it's too soon to put out a verdict.
Ordered the typical english bfast. 3 slices of toasted bread, lil mushroom, 2 sausages, eggs 2nos and butter. Tastewise it was ok. Highly overpriced at 155 per portion.

Was a little reluctant before trying, but went with it as I didn?t have many choices early in the morning.  I ordered The Great English Breakfast with sunny side up. Though the taste was okay, serving size seems really really small. Bacon tasted little uncooked, sausages were tasty and mushrooms were okayish. I could literally count the number of mushrooms on my finger tips and that gives an idea of serving size.  Overall an average experience, but if you?re craving for some English breakfast, this can be an option
address: 52, 1st Floor, 3rd Cross, Omkar Nagar Arkere Gate, Near Reliance Store, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: I cannot say a word about the food, since I never tried anything from this place, and I?m very sure I never shall. Have seen this place, and thought I should share a picture of it, for you to decide. My opinion, it doesn?t look hygienic at all, and I think Zomato should have an eligibility baseline for listing restaurants.
This place is located next to IIM Bangalore, the food is fantastic, the biriyani there is worth a shot. And their in house speciality is payam pori (banana fritters) and banana cake, fluffiest ever.
address: 1st Cross, Bilekahalli, Near IIMB College, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: After a movie at gopalan innovation mall @ bannerghatta road, me with couple of friends tried food at wow momos. The veg momos was just ok and was oily. We also tried the tukpa which was highly spicy and extremely oil. Have shared the pic for your reference, we were very disappointed and just the food as waste. For sure the team has improve on the quality of food while presentation is really good and appealing.
Rightly named, momos are absolutely wow! The shezwan fried momo and the tandoori steamed momo are two of my most favourite dishes from their menu.
address: Gopalan Innovation Mall, 22, Sarakki Industrial Layout, Bannerghatta Main Road, 3rd Phase, JP Nagar, 3rd Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Main course was not good at all .. description follows ... Aloo paratha with NO Aloo Gobhi paratha with NO Gobhi And paneer paratha with NO Paneer All of them were just for name sake.. look at photos  Though I liked paneer chilly where they added good cottage cheese cubes , onions and capsicum ..
bad quality pizza i need again

Went there for a brunch. Ordered Indori Poha and Katori chaat, Poha was below average a little bland in taste while Katori chaat was wonderful on par with some good north Indian chat. They have recently changed the ambience of the place for good, good soothing jazz was playing. Staff was courteous. Overall it is a good place though a little pricy and average taste.
the burger was not so good and there was no cheese burst in pizza
super
address: Beside Radiant Shine Apartment, Akshaya Nagar, Yellanahalli, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: This is the best place for lunch,and also budget friendly. Especially North Indian food is fabulous here. Good taste Hygienic place. Quick service

Should be one's last resort.  Had north Indian meals with Paneer Butter Masala, the amount of oil I could extract out of it would give anyone a heartache.  The only reason I gave 2 stars was their south Indian snacks viz Dosa and Idli/Vada are pretty decent, minus the chutney/sambhar which have a bland taste.

This is a reliable and very pocket friendly place for home delivery for breakfast.. I have not tried many items from their menu.. multiple times I have ordered their poori kormas and Medu vada.. medu vada in particular is crispy and very good.. poori korma is also good.. the best thing is that their delivery time is quick along with a scoop of ice cream which is complimentary irrespective of the order value for online orders through Zomato..
address: 173, Bannerghatta Main Road, Stage 2, Bilekahalli, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore
45, 14th Main, 7th Phase, Puttehahalli Palya, Opposite Of Samsung Smart Cafe, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Ordered burger meal with pulpy grape and a mixed fruit juice from here. The burger was okay and so was the pulpy grape. Although the mixed fruit could have more real fruit, it was more watery sort of. Like with no taste. Packaging was done proper.
address: 5, Ground Floor, Opposite Royal Meenakshi Mall, Hulimavu, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Decided to visit this place because it was fairly new. This is much better than subway in the taste section. The subs are delicious and the service is fast. Doesn't burn a hole in the wallet.

Ordered from the Bombay Sandwich company and was very please with the packaging and quality of the sandwich! Ordered kukkad sandwich, although I could not taste tandoori spices as mentioned in the description in zomato, it tasted really good. Very filling with the right amount of chicken and fresh veggies. Looking forward to trying out other varieties on their menu.  Second order: Spicy chicken sandwich. Not really spicy, it's just mildly spicy. Bread was quite hard, other that that same like previous order. I really appreciate their excellent quality of the veggies.
address: 45, 14th Main 7th Phase, Puttehahalli Palya, Opposite Of Samsung Smart Cafe, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: A restaurant nearby the Kalyani and Oracle tech parks in JP nagar. Have ordered numerous times via online orders but visited th place for the first time this friday. Its was completely full. Never had a complain with the food before also and it was the same this time. The biryani, Kandari kabab, crispy corn, butter chicken everything was just good. Service can always improve.  4.5 stars for this place.

This restaurant is located on top of a pizzeria and right next to Oracle.  I had the Tomato Soup which was good. It was creamy and the bread crumbs we're crispy.  For starters I had the Kandari Kebab which was very soft and succulent and tasted amazing.  I also had the Chicken 65 which was good.  For my main course I had the Garlic Roti which had a lot of garlic and butter with Chicken Tikka Lababdar Curry. The curry had some dairy in it and it mad the curry taste brilliant.  I also had the Mutton Dumb Biryani. It tasted good with a good taste of spices but I feel that it should have had more flavor. The pieces of mutton were tender though.  Overall, great food and a great experience.
Sent stale chicken, never order chilli chicken from them. Made me feel sick after having it. Worst experience ever, won?t recommend this place to people.

Hello foodies Here management is so responsive though stewards r bit carless only.... still these stewards have their own reasons for their mistakes.... But still I feel they r lack in their presence of mind while doing their job... apart from this The authentic paneer dum biryani any one can enjoy thoroughly here... The gravy ( not sure whether its mirchi ka salan but its awesome.... the thickness of gravy add on taste 2 it ).... management gestures and responsiveness make u feel comfort so that u feel to visit / order once again

It was for a quick snack.. forgot to mention that I like the wood firred pizza spicy. #bland. #quicksnack. I felt it?s overpriced but for the place....... we have too.  Saturday evening so the place was empty.
address: 21, 1st Floor, Next to Oracle, Kalyani Magnum Technum Park, 7th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Amazing place to order food, super fast delivery and the Peri Peri pizza was really good. Loved the whole experience..would love to order again
Ordered chicken spaghetti pasta from here yesterday, it tasted amazing and the quality and quantity was very good.. and the delivery was super quick. Will order soon
Had ordered pizza which took them 1.5 hours to cook and dispatch.the delivery guy could not find my location and it took 15more minutes.The pizza i got was cold.
Great food & speedy delivery ! Pizzas & grilled chicken are out of the world ! Highly recommended.My goto place to satisfy those late night cravings & munchies.
address: 14, Patel Medicals, 7th Main, BTM 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: First time we visited ROCK STONE ordered for Doctor Nuts and Fruit Extravaganza they both taste awesome Doctor Nuts are fully loaded with almonds and cashews quantity and quality are really worth full

Writing this review after multiple visits. This is our go to place if we want to chill & catch up The ice creams are pretty good. Ambience & seating is nice. They even offer ice cream cakes. The staff is quite nice, friendly & courteous. Try their seasonal fruits ice creams. Pretty good.

This is a nice place for dessert lover in BTM. I have been to this place for a midnight dessert cramp. Even my friends ordered my birthday spacial ice cream-cake also from here and I just loved the taste of it. But price is a bit more compared to the quantity, I think that can be improved.

Must for Ice Cream Lovers !!!  Rock Stone Ice Cream Factory is a small outlet in BTM Laout. Got to know about it from a friend and visited it .  The experience was totally different and the ice creams were really fantastic.  The ice creams are prepared on a ice table(frozen table) in front of your eyes and the process of preparing itself amuses you. You can even get your ice creams customized with the fruits/candies you want.  MUST visit for all ice cream lovers.
Ordered ice cream from here midnight and it was delivered on time. Taste of ice cream was too good. I am in love with ice cream from this place.
address: 7/31, 7th Cross Road, Stage 2, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: Good stumptous Parantha, tasty food you should try. Good collections of Parantha available with yummy side dishes .... feel like Delhi in Bangalore

Nice crisp paratha and in reasonable price also ..nice place to have some interesting parathas at this place and they have more varieties in many ways as they have given different name for every stuffing of paratha so u will love to enjoy your meal here

Have lost the count of times I've been here.. A small outlet on the roadside, this place doesn't have parking or anything.. Yet it is always having a line of people waiting for their order.. They have only 3 tables in their seating area but that doesn't affect business as most of it is take away or delivery.. With a variety of parathas to try from, funny paratha names and smiling hosts, its a pleasure to eat from here.. My favorites are the paneer ones as wen u break a small bit, the stuffed paneer just flows out... Oooo.. Yumm! U must try!

Ordered from here thinking they will serve the best authentic parathas but only ingredient they know is Salt i guess. The food was so salty that i could not even eat it felt like puking. I think curd also was not fresh. Nothing was good about it. Worst parathas ever. A total mood spoiler.

We ordered vegetable manchurian which had baby corn, potato, capsicum and gobi. It was average, a bit oily. Coming to parathas, everything we ordered were great. 50-50, chilli milli, Raja Rani everything tasted well and it was quiet filling as well. It was served with fresh curd, mint chutney. Packing was neat and parathas were hot! Definitely coming again..
address: 3, Millennium Ave, Jagruthi Colony, 7th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Food delivered with swiggy tape ?
Food quantity was good. Very spicy. Taste was ok.
Nati Style mutton is good here . It can be had with rice. Their price is pocket friendly. Earlier they were serving Nati style chicken curry which was good in taste. They should start it again.
address: Sir M Visveswaraya Road, Nyanappana Halli, Hulimavu

user_reviews: So I had the brocolli and almond soup which was enough for 2 cups and it was delivered hot. The packaging was excellent!  Also, I ordered the Russian chicken sandwich, it was okay but I guess it should be priced cheaper. (Rs. 109 for a 2 bread sandwich with no sides)  The verdict, I enjoyed the meal! Thanks to foodie February that I found this place!
address: 172/1, Vega City Mall, Floor 3, Food Court, Beside, Srinivas Industrial Estate, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: k fine

Amazing place to order for evening snacks.. food is tasty and delicious and delivery is fast.. packaging is good ... I like their masala fries alot a lot. Rates are also reasonable for food items. I really enjoy the taste.

These unprofessional restaurants should be closed down immediately. I blame zomato as well. My order was cancelled so bluntly and casually after making me wait for almost 30 mins! #TakingCustomersForGranted
they gave me vadapav instead of burger..and French fries quantity is too less
address: 90, Sai Baba Temple Road, Arekere, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Absolutely love the variety of kulfis here. And the temperament of the space is lovely too. It?s the perfect place to chill on a Sunday evening. The banana and watermelon flavours are a must try! All the natural fruit flavours have a unique taste to them. Blueberry and strawberry are personal favourites as well.
best place to have awesome kulfies. got inspired with the real fruit flavoured ones. their must try is GUAVA and JACKFRUIT.. they serve guava topped with chilli powder and salt.
address: 1-90/18, 100 Feet Ring Road, 9th Main Road, 1st Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: Small and cozy Karnataka Coastal Restaurant. Quick service, Top dishes are chicken ghee roast, Chicken sukka, Kori Rotti, Fish fry. Reasonably priced and offers decent quantity. Their both Indian and Tandoor dishes are good too..! Like a hidden gem in the area. However, Though they have AC seating separate, Not a very comfortable seating. Recommended for a quick lunch or dinner.

There is no better place in the entire area for fish and coastal cuisines. Gassi, Pulimunchi, Masala fry, Tawa fry, everything is cooked to perfection and the taste just lingers. Amazing is the only word. Must try: chicken/fish meals, kori roti, ganji chutney, neer dosa, fish tawa/masala fries, prawns ghee roast, chicken pepper dry fry, fish gassi and fish pulimunchi, kokum sarbath. Very fast service.

As the name suggests, this restaurant caters coastal sea food pallets. I find my comfort food there. Everything tastes home cooked and quantity/quality is pretty good too. Not a fancy place to keep in mind. Whenever I feel unwell, I pay a visit there.

Poha Quality may be not good

user_reviews: Food is good. 4/5 Package. 3/5  In Zomato, delivery will be closed all the times. So you can avail in Uber eats.  No chapati combo ( only chapati/rotti and sides)  If you order individual items, it's costs more. Almost double for 4 chapati meal.  Now a days they started with packaging charge as 10/- which is fine but cover used is worth of 1/- only.  Better to go and take from Vendor directly.
As per my First order today, Puliogare and Egg Burji it's completely like Mom made for us.Awesome the quantity is good enough for one. Taste also very good.

But unfortunately jowar roti isn't available these days. I hope it's back on the menu soon :) I would rate them a 4.5/5 for both quantity and quality. The sabjis provided along with rotis is equally good.  So glad to update my review, jowar roti is back on the menu and as good as it was before.
They prepare very homely food and the quantity also is on a generous side. With the cost being feasible, it has become a perfect dinner solution for me and my roommates.

user_reviews: Ambiance - The place is located in a narrow street surrounded by smoking joints. The ambiance is simple. Uncomfortable. Aloo paratha was served with curd and pickle - Tasted really good Jeera rice was served with dal - Was served a large portion of rice and it was well-made. Ordering food from this place would be a great idea as the food is tasty and atmosphere unpleasant.

user_reviews: Food quality and taste were very poor. I ordered roti and paneer butter masala and chicken dum biryani. The paneer butter masala tasted like raw onion and tomato with cold paneer chunks. The curry did not even blend well and were like separate uncooked ingredients. The chicken dum biryani was literally bone chunks in tomato rice. The chicken pieces were not good either. And the biryani rice was literally tasting like tomato rice. Maybe it's their style of cooking, but it is not dum method for sure. The paneer butter masala was for Rs.215 I guess and the chicken dum biryani was Rs.210, and I applied a new year promo code. This quality and taste for such a cost is completely unjustified. The restaurant should seriously consider improving the food quality.

user_reviews: Best place for andhra food. This place serves amazing andhra cuisine. We ordered meal, simple menu, tastes good. Only drawback is waiting time. This place is overcrowded on weekends and you have to wait outside for your chance.
Nice food with great ambience, crazy south indian food guntuk chicken was amazing everything was a bit spicy but still everything was pure south indian.
Had chicken biryani, the best part i like here is raitha ? after 2yrs tasted again Nagarjuna ??????? gonna visit again before i leave Bangalore

This place serves authentic Andhra cuisine and is one of the most popular chains in the city. They serve food on banana leaves and their menu has a variety of mouthwatering dishes. We had their famous thali. It had a variety of vegetables which were extremely delicious, sambhar, rasam, ghee rice, and a few other components. It tasted heavenly. We tried the mutton biryani which was prepared so well and was extremely flavoursome. We also had the chicken 65. You usually get small diced pieces of chicken when you order this anywhere else but they had chicken legs that were spiced very well and again, tasted super yummy. Their service was also quick and prompt and the staff was very nice. A must visit if you want to have some good food that will leave you satisfied.

A typical Andhra reasturant...the same menu, the same meals... The taste is almost the same...just the pricing is more...the meals however was pretty tasty.. but that's like in all other Andhra style reasturants...

The samosas, kachoiri are very fresh. They make these fresh everyday. I love everytime I went there or ordered online.

So as usual on a festive day, I ordered few sweets and chaat from ladoos. Delivery was on time but the quality was really low. I ordered kaju roll, papdi chat, and khaman dhokla. The dhokla was the worst thing. Food color was added and didn't taste good at all. Please avoid these things from ordering.

Not very attractive ,but does not matter considering u would visit it for snacks for shorter time.

Let me start with good thing. Sweets are good. Their other food items like parathas n pooris n meals arenÃ\x83Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x92t good at all! Quality is too poor. The guy who sits on counter is arrogant. Dunno how to greet people? They have to improve a quality of food a lot better. Their parathas are just simple parathas. None of the stuffed parathas would have any filling ?  I donÃ\x83Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x92t recommend this place.

After a lot of hits and misses finally found a place in Bangalore, which makes authentic chats without adding carrot and stuffs like that as is normal in Bangalore. Also not just chats but the pay bhaji, chhole Bhatoore,lassi and dhokla were the dishes I tried and they were awesome. Not exactly the same taste as of any chat shop in Delhi you will get but when compared with other outlets in Bangalore it's one of the best north Indian veg restaurant. The laddoos in BTM is a good place to start and follow it up with some genuine North Indian dishes like sum aloo which is not sweet and the Paratha, samosa etc, ending the meal with some good malai lassi.
