user_reviews: Raagi Mudde. Balls made of Finger Millet. This was what drew me to this place...apart from the fact that it was next door to my partners office in JPNagar :-)  Food- 3.0 . We started with Ragi Mudde with Nati Kurma ...a gravy curry containing Jungle Fowl or Nati Koli. Spicy. And filling because of the Mudde. We then tried simple Chappati with Guntur Chicken. Another Spicy item. I liked this better than the Nati Curry. We had some spicy and piping hot Rasam to close the session.  Ambience-3.0 . Clean and decent. Not crowded. Nice paintings on the walls. Some one actually put effort into the paintings...  Service-3.5. Friendly and prompt.  Value for money- 3.0 . A meal for 2 at Rs 700/- . It's not bad...But the bottle of water at Rs.25/-!!! That's annoying.
address: 92, 1st Floor, DSN Plaza, 1st Main Road, 7th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Loved the place! The desserts presentation looked absolutely mouth watering. There are many varieties of waffles based desserts in the menu. This is a must go place if you are a sweet tooth and ever go to BTM.
Polite staff, more of a self service place. New n clean waffle is good n so are the toppings, tried chocolate Icecream n Choco chip. Swing seatings are an added attraction.

Located in BTM 2nd stage but at a place not too crowded..Good location, ample parking around the place..they have good options for Waffles but need to add more stuff on the menu apart from it..hardly any options for other finger food etc or even drinks..Waffles quaity is pretty decent..Pizza samosa is nice too but very small in qty..

This is my dessert hangout place with my friends most of the time. Almost all the waffles that I have tried at this place were good. Some of them are Butter Scotch Sundae, Brownie Sundae, Choco Blast Waffle, Nutella Waffle & Iced Lemonade. My favourites are the Brownie Sundae & the Nutella Waffle. Others are good too. A good place to try out yummy waffles.

If I ever want to eat waffles, this is the best place to visit. Nuff Said!  The usual order is Waffles with Whipped cream, Maple Syrup and Bananas. This is a classic combination and never goes wrong. The waffle is freshly made, the whipped cream is thick and doesn't slide off your waffle in the next 2 mins. The syrup is the Goldilocks kind, neither too sweet, nor too bland.....and bananas are bananas (no build up here). There is no decadence here. The waffle is just perfect.  This joint is located along with Freeze-it, who make frozen nitro ice creams. They make it quick and serve it cold. My fav is the Hazelnut Chocolate flavour that tastes amazing. Their slushes are good too.  But mainly, just go there for the waffles and you will feel like a kid sitting on one of their swing like chairs with your feet in the air :-)
address: 22, Ground Floor, 7th Cross, 1st B Main, 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: Late Night has become my go-to spot for comfort food. Although the quality has varied but I have enjoyed the food from the outlet every single time. Most often I would go for a serving of Chicken Chilli Garlic Fried Rice or Chicken Chilli Garlic Noodles along with a side-serving of Chicken in Hot Sauce. The North Indian section of the menu is also something one can try out. Particularly the Chicken Tikka Masala they offer.  Late Night offers food which are slightly pricey but they are full of comfort none the less.

Hands down the best late night food in the area Gobi manchurian- absolutely love, perfectly fried with taste Sweets- Gulab Jamun, Gajar ka halwa,Randi All could have been better The delivery time is too long,took almost an hour
address: 1st Stage, Kumaraswamy Layout, Bangalore

user_reviews: although the delivery was very much delayed, I understand it was due to the rains. no issues. food was good.
Just canÃ\x83Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x92t get over the peach tea . Must try ?
address: 69/1, Gowreesha Complex, Opposite Ananda Valmart Apartment, Doddakammanahalli, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: They have many kinds of different waffles. Must visit here if you ever visit Meenakshi mall. You can even customize your waffles at will. However some improvement is needed for eggless waffles.

Had a chance to have their amazing waffles, perfect blend of crispy and soft. The owners are very passionate about it which makes it a lot more amazing as they prepare fresh batter everyday and invest in quality. You have to go here if you want to have authentic waffles. Plus they also offer cool internships to college kids ;)

Have been there so many times in breezy Bangalore weather. The taste is great and service is nice. Plus point is that the service person remembers your favourite order if you have been there few times.

Ordered waffle combo from here..one was waffle with chocolate sauce and the other was waffle with caramel sauce..?  I am not a fan of waffles but I liked whatever I ordered from here..  Waffles were crispy and hot..?

ORDER REGULAR!! I would recommend a regular size if you are opting for a snack. Also, do opt for the Liege instead of Brussels if you have never tried the former. Loads of different toppings, mix-n-match and go crazy. In my opinion Caramel + Cashew > Belgian Hot Chocolate + Whipped Cream + Chocochips. Loyalty Offer - Buy 10 Get 1 over a period of 3 months.
address: Royal Meenakshi Mall, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Dakshin cafe - daily breakfast goto place! Great taste, Great crowd anytime.   They have a varieties of breakfast and meal options are available in the outlet which is behind called dakshin thindis. Dakshin thindis has wide variety of combos, north indian food.   Idlis are the best here! you can have it with chutney or sambar of your choice. Love the both combination. Vada is crispy and good. In dosas main attraction is open dosa with butter on top! which has great taste!  Also try kharabath, Kesari bath, and Bisi bele bath here.  Coffee is always love! ?  delivery is available through major food delivery apps.  card accepted, no wallets or scan pay available.   ? Best breakfast place ? ? Great taste ? ? Affordable prices

Ordered podi dosa,open masala dosa and idly vada for breakfast. The dosas very very small. They were not dosas they were mini dosas. It is too small for the amount paid. The taste was good but not great. Also the rates were increased in swiggy.

Was really hungry and craving for some good south indian food.headed to this place. Totally satiated. The puliogare out here is very tasteful. Even the rest of the dishes looked mouth watering. And it is very reasonably price. Ambience is good and friendly staff. One of the best south indian breakfast joints i have been to.

IÃ\x83Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x92ll rate it 4.5 without thinking. One of the best cafe that everyone should taste. The food here tastes really good and awesome. But the staff behaviour is the worst sometimes. So considering the staff behaviour I would rate it with 3.5

ItÃ\x83Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x92s replica of legendary South Indian outlets of Bangalore ? With more options! Best place in jp nagar for idly ? ditto to b2k and taaza tindi ? I recommend idly vade, uppittu and coffee!
address: 53/1, 3rd Main Road, Dr. Vivekananda Layout, Santrupthi Nagar, 7th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: This is the perfect place to grab some milkshakes and some snacks, but the price is quite costly when compared to others and poor service too, but it's a thick milkshake where u can't find it anywhere

They make one of the best milkshakes. Ordered two KityKat thick shake and was quite impressed with the quantity as well as quality. Its a cute little small shop with a cute seating space for four people.

Located on a main road and is a very small joint for great milkshakes.. Has place for oly 4 ppl to sit. The food was good and so was the milkshakes. It's fun to sit with friends and play games while you sit there and enjoy your snacks. Maggie and milkshakes are the best here. Have tried the fries and sandwiches too and was good.
address: 34, Ground Floor, 15th Cross, 4th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: As usual Bombay kulfi tastes great, I had ordered kulfis from here packing wise they should have done better, they pack three kulfis in one aluminium cover, taste wise it's always good
fast delivery
Amazing! Amazing! Amazing! So colorful and tasty ???????? The delivery was also way before the scheduled time ? Great home delivery experience ?
Packing is bad. Mixed all the ice creams
Strawberry kulfi was awesome Suggestion is if more than one kulfi is ordered you can better package in separate covers instead of putting all into one.
address: Near Brigade Millennium, 7th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: We tried samosa, masala chat and tea. They served cool, we were behind them to heat it. Once we asked they kept the chat plate in oven and given back
Chaats here are tasty. Loved the samosa and kachori. Priced bit high as it is inside mall. Raj kachori is yummiest. Lassi is available here and they give it in mud pot.

Chats here are truly tasty. They are generously topped with yoghurt and sauces. Most impressive of their lot is lassi, served in matkas. Jalebi's are also well worth ordering.  mypointofview92.wordpress.com
address: Food Court 3, 424/376/487, Royal Meenakshi Mall, Arakere, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Had this place on my bucket list for quite some time. I have been observing this place from a mediocre rating to rise to a 4+ rating. Coming to the restaurant itself honestly was not blown away by the ambience. The menu Is cleverly designed incorporating wizardry acronyms. The food is also quite tasty and well presented. The prices are economical. A good place to chill with your friends for a few hours.

Happened to drop in to this place without much of an expectation. First to notice was the pleasing ambience. This place is on the first floor, with a Harry Potter theme set up. With a menu that needs time to grasp and order, the food also was as good as the ambience. Overall, would recommend you to visit this place. Worth your time spent.

I like how the first floor is conveniently converted into the cafe. I loved the fact that this cafe has a theme and what makes it better is that it is Harry Potter themed. The names of the dishes served here are very catchy and the food here is great. Lovely place to visit with friends.

Lovely wizard ambience of Harry Potter ....loved the place . They have placards to take photos ...food is also tasty.  Ordered white slime soup , jack o runner chicken in grapes and chicken just ....yummy ....lamb and cheese in red sauce and cats ....all dishes were good , cheesy and yummy. Will go once again ...

A cosy place to hangout with friends and colleagues. The ambience is very thrilling along with the menu. Though the names will cause tingle to your throat but the taste will be a contentment for ones soul. We ordered for a wide variety of dishes which were all served hot and fresh within a decent wait time. Quantity of the dishes were value for money. The staffs are very courteous and will help in figuring out the dishes in details. Do spent some time in the menu and you will end up spending quality time munching some mouth watering food. The beverages are also worth mentioning. Our menu included: Bloody Bruschetta, Flying Faith, Flit Flat, Mumble Munch, Fire from the Forest, Dragons Diary, Warlocks Wrath and Ghosts Gluttony. I'm eagerly waiting to try the other dishes soon.
address: 39, 15th Cross, Besides HDFC Bank, 4th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Very nice decorative medium sized restaurant for buns cakes n beverages. The staff were friendly  I ordered Red Velvet Lava Cake n a variety of Donuts. I have a large experience on Red Velvet n i am fan of that. The taste not cheated me  Actually it was compared to Indore n Pondicherry taste.  The rates were average. The service was fast n memorable time passex there

My favorite place for all evenings. I just love sitting there with my buddies. Having tea and blueberry muffins. Chocolate brownies. And you have to try their vanilla bun which has been my all time favorite from their menu.
Had tea and bun here. The tea was good and bun was soft and tasted nice, little sweet (4/5)  The red velvet cookie was not good and a little chewy (2.5/5)  The ambience and service are good.

Food simplified. A comfort zone kind of space.  Parking: no specific space, but the road does help Ambience: cozy, quiet, compact, neat and well-lit Service: Prompt and friendly Quality & hygiene: above average. They have a limited menu serving chai and different kinds of stuffed buns as well as sweet stuffs like cake. Either ways they don't disappoint you. Quantity: might let you down a bit. Just a bit? Cost: affordable Fav: Banana cake, walnut and date cake, egg submarine, Hot chocolate- satisfactory.  Easy access and smiling people. Bun-Town.

I've been here a while back to grab a quick snack and to cross it off my checklist. I ordered the veg mayo bun, shakes and red velvet cookies. The mayo bun was just okay. I was very disappointed because this place was supposed to make tasty buns!  The only saving grace were the shakes and the cookies. They were decent and scored the brownie points for this place.
address: 458, 2nd Main Road, Mico Layout, Stage 1, BTM, Bangalore
45, 14th Main, 7th Phase, Puttehahalli Palya, Opposite Of Samsung Smart Cafe, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: The review is solely based on juices and not on ambience.  I loved the juices here. They serve juices as is which means no added water or sugar. They have cold pressed juices and alot of healthy juices with spinach, wheatgrass, corriander. I have tried antioxidant and green tea with orange juice. Both are really good. Antioxidant consists of pomegranate, strawberry and blue berry, is a wonderful juice served here. It not only tastes great but is Rich in minerals and extremely refreshing. Pomegranate is a great source of iron, strawberry and blue berry is known for their Antioxidant values. At just 150/- INR it is totally worth it. Green tea and orange is good but the flavour depends upon your taste buds.  Taste- 5/5 Price- 5/5 Presentation- 3.5/5 Ambience- 3/5  cupcakesontravel.blogspot.com

Ordered online  The mango banana shake is good, not much sweet loved it. (4/5)  The dry fruit shake is also good but comes with dates and may not be liked by all (2/5). The first time he gave it, the milk was not in a good condition.  Ordered Oreo milk shake and received a warm milk shake. Cooled it and had. The only good thing about it was the bottle it was packed in. (0/5)
address: 1210, 16th Main Road, Stage 2, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: Loved the regular dabeli here . Very fresh and good taste . Would recommend to all dabeli lovers. Located on the main road . Staff is friendly and many flavors options they have .
Good place to satisfy small appetite. The Price is affordable. The Bun was sooo soft that you can tear it with your lips. Had Rajdhani spicy and Double butter.
address: Shop 11, 24th Main Road, Ayodya Nagar, Phase 5, JP Nagar, Bangalore
BTM Layout 2nd Stage, Opposite to Mico Layout Police Station, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: The pizza tastes good but the quantity showed in the picture and given is totally opposite. The layer of the Pizza including topping was so thin. I would never recommend this cafe if u are a foodie. U'll be disappointed for sure. It's not worth the money!!!
I had been to this place. Tried new varieties of pizza, one can get authentic taste of italian food at reasonable price here. Good place to take family too. Must try.
address: 97, Wilson Garden Housing Society, 7th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Don't place online order..prices are almost 50% higher than offline prices..taste wise- samosa is fine but did not like papdi chaat at all. Also pani puri is not that good
Awesome chaat , i loved Pani Puri and Samosa. Very authentic taste and quality. Loved Gulab Jamun made with pure Khova.  Hot Ghee kee jalebi was toooooo good.... enjoyed and will keep visiting...
Amazing food and very good quality .. .. All the items are made fresh and very hygienic.... Dahi puri and pani puri are superb.. Even the potato twister is very nice
A wonderful place for snacks and other north Indian dishes. The place is clean, the preparation is hygenic. Never had a more fulfilling North Indian meal in the South before :)
Very good quality food. All items are having authentic Indian taste. Must try Samosa, Jalebi, Gulab Jumun n Pani Puri. Motichur laddu n methi sticks snacks we just loved it.
address: Durga Complex, Central Excise Layout, Phase 2, Tejaswini Nagar, Dodda Kamanahalli Area, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Ordered rajbhog kulfi "family" pack and got a box that literally fit between my fingers. Expected much more for 355 rupees. Forget the family, this wasn't sufficient even for one person. Also the MRP mentioned inside the pack was 250 rupees and I was charged 355 rupees and 20 rupees for delivery.

A bit costly place but no replacement for this nearby the outlet. Falooda is a must have here and the malai kulfi is so flavourful. Sitafal kulfi on the other hand i did not found it to be that great but other kulfis are. Kulfi falooda is great but its so costly there is lassi shop nearby where you can have kulfi falooda but not as good as this so if you dont bother about cost then you should have it at asharfilal or else go for the lassi shop

Asharfilal Kulfi - near DLF new town is a tuck shop for ice cream and kulfi. This place is well lighted and clean next to Krishna Kuteera.  Seating and Parking  It doesn't have a place to sit and park your vehicle. For vehicle parking you can park on road as long as there is some space.  These guys have kept few stools to sit down and enjoy kulfi.      Our Kulfi  We had Pista and Regular Malai Kulfi. Kulfi was good but did not find it to be fresh. Our kulfi was brittle and hard not as smooth as it should be.    Recommendation: Enjoy the kulfi, it is a good place to grab sweet post lunch and dinner.  letmecookfood.blogspot.com

Totally amazing ... the small shop offers really yummy kulfi's ... such creamy ku?fi's, divine taste amazing flavours ... variety really surprised me but the quality is simply superb !!! A must visit for Ice cream lovers ...

small place..Good for pickup/parcel...Must try Mewa chowpati and natural malai.They are the best. Dont go for rose coconut its worse.BPK is kind of okay.Mewa is the best of the lot. Dont eat it frozen allow some time for the chilness to come down.  Edit 1 ********  Kulfi choco bar is too good. It gived taste of chocolatr and chowpati kulfi.
address: No 19/3C, Next to Krishna Kuteera Restaurant ,Avani Shringeri Nagar, Near Nano Hospital, Begur Hobli, Bangalore, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: This outlet is opened in the place of Kailash parbat which was there earlier in the Royal Meenakshi mall. It's far superior than the earlier restaurant and it's a better option in that foodcourt.  I don't know where to give review for the sane street foods by punjab grill newly opened in the Airport. Sorry to say that the thali available there is pathetic despite of charging very high prices. They are giving some stretchy and very hard maida paratha in the thalis. It's not even nan. Please provide quality food for the price charged. Kindly note that Paratha is a whole wheat bread .
Fresh and hot food is what can be said. Authentic taste for kebabs. Service is prompt and rush is due to location. Please give time to prepare the food as it is at food court and rush is unavoidable.
One of the best Chole Bature I've ever had in Bangalore. The taste was authentic. Tried their Veg Biryani, it turned out to be good too. The price was bit high though.

Full Flavoured!  I love the Gol Gappes here. More than everything they are hygienic. Very neatly served tasty Gol Gappes. IÃ\x83Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x92ve not had this type of Gol Gappes in Bangalore till now (The puris especially!)
address: Shop 10, 3rd Floor, Food Court, Royal Meenakshi Mall, Hulimavu, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Ordered paratha platter. Although methi and aloo had good stuffing. But paneer needs more filling hence the 3 stars. Taste is good otherwise.

Food is yummy and liked it very much. But the time took for preparation and delivery is too much. I literally waited more than an hour. Delivery person is not sure about the location and had lots of difficulty in guiding him.

A great place to hang around with friends and munch on variety of parathas available. Taste is good but during my last visit found all the parathas were way too spicy . Tried mooli, aloo and rajma masala parathas. Do try out their gulab jamun!
address: 637, RBI Layout, RBI East Layout, JP Nagar 7th phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: We ordered Egg Dosa, Kaaram Dosa & Onion Dosa, Nice food good in taste, if they can increase the quality of food & packaging it will be good too
address: 993, 1st Floor, 4th Main, 1st Block, Royal Shelters, Stage 4, Bilekahalli, Kodichikkanahali

user_reviews: Located inside the Woodrose Club in JP Nagar this restaurant has been around for quite sometime. However, they've never really been able to maintain their standard as their food has always been just average. Even though they have a good number of options, this place certainly isn't somewhere we would recommend.
address: Woodrose club Brigade Millenium, 7th Main, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: pathetic, never order, think twice, u will get sick after having stinkinking , very very bad, how could they do to give such bad food
I ordered tandoori roti, Paneer butter masala and chicken sholey kabab. Pathetic food. It was my mistake to order from here. Waste of money. I never suggest this restaurant.
Nice taste and good quantity but pieces only little bit less but it's good taste I loved it ... .............delivery boy naveen also good attitude skills
Nice food i had tried almost every item in the menu it was just nice.nice food no bad coments.i used to order every week here.they never disapointed

Ordered a large Chicken Biryani and chicken lollipop. Biryani was not only less in quantity but also way too dry. Its not for the first time we ordered from Pot Biryani, their Quality and Quantity is inconsistent.
address: 7, Hulimavu Begur Main Road, Near DLF, Akshya Nagar, Yelenahalli Village, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: True natural flavored ice cream one can get it only here. I liked their black current, sitafal, Belgium walnut. The green chilli flavor was unique and I had it for first time. It was good. The shop is open till late night so if you crave for icy natural desert then check it out. Price is pretty reasonable at about 70-100 per scoop. Do also check their ongoing offers in collaboration with various deal partners.
address: 766/A, 16th Main Road, 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: Cool place to have food!! The Restaurant is located little away from main road, and in the middle of a Mango Farm. The place is very calm and gives a nice experience . The service is good. The food is good. Overall good experience.

Nice cosy place in JP Nagar. Good ambience, vast parking area, nice food and service. Place seems to be in a mango field.. which have been well converted into a restaurant. Will visit again to try the buffet.

This reason being located at the residential area of jp nagar 7th phase looks like a farm house on outskirts. Trust me, ambience is so must relaxing without the hustle bustle of the city vibes. Food was damn ? delicious. Wanna visit again and again.
The Mango Tree's ambience is great. The revamped menu was long overdue. The service is exceptional and the waiters are very professional.  Overall a great place to visit with friends or family.

Been here for a farewell party for a collegue.. Around 20 of us. Fantastic ambience, great interiors, courteous staff and very spacious. Food was perhaps average or disappointing for some them. We tried nearly all veg and non veg starters, most of them had more spice / masala to it and less taste. They do offer alcohol with offers on draught beer. I skipped the main course and desserts as some them claimed it to be bad as well. Overall a good place to spend time with friends and family but not much on the food. Need a lot of improvement to food.
address: 99/4, Nataraja Layout, 7th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: I have been ordering few drinks from Dessi Cuppa lately.. I have tried their Oreo and Ferrero rocher shakes.. they were perfect and yummy too.. thank you guys..
Desi Cuppa has been my recent favourites for their Oreo shakes and I totally love the taste,quality and the packaging and will definitely keep ordering it!
Small joint for various types of beverages. We ordered chiku & kesar falouda. Loved those. The service is fast, price is reasonable. It's located on a small road, so it's easily identifiable.
address: 57/1, 7th Main Road, Yellappa Layout, 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: Been there twice. Unfortunately they didn't serve food. Was highly disappointed. Second instance I was there by 3.30 and I was asked to come after 6.00. Why would they keep the restaurant open they are unwilling to serve.
Excellent Village Food Taste !!!  I tried Chicken Kebab, Keema Balls and Parota. All were great in taste and texture. Looking forward for more in coming days.

This place opened just few months back and I tried their food twice. Once it was a takeaway and once I went with a friend.  It's located in JP nagar 7th phase and easy to locate if you know the area but the board is quite big and you can easily identify this place.  Most of the local food outlets doesn't have good ambience or it doesn't suit for family to have a comfortable meal. This place is no exception but the food here just makes you feel that you are sitting at home and having a great meal.  I have tried chicken biriyani, kabab and chicken fry. Biriyani is just outstanding, the flavour is so subtle that you can identify every ingredient. Packed with flavours and good quantity.  Kabab was soft and fresh. Chicken fry is semi dry item and the gravy is just too good just like homemade taste.  I'm a fan of these local places as their food is prepared fresh and do not judge the place by its ambience. Do try this place and you won't be disappointed for sure.
Enjoyed Authentic rural Non Veg food. Variety of dishes to choose from. Very reasonable. From Paya Soup to Ragi Balls, Chicken Fry to Biriyani and perfect ending with Rasam rice.... loved the place.
Very taste nonveg dishes yumm.. liked pudina chicken , kabab n biryani .. must visit for non veg lovers ..... Enjoyed the food there .. LL visit again super taste
address: 6, Sri Krishna complex, Gaurav Nagar Bus Stand, 7th phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Have ordered cakes and puffs a couple of times. The quality is very good. Honey cake is the highlight with honey dripping from the cake...just yum. Packing is also good. Just one suggestion,please include more items. Veg puffs have nice filling inside doesn't have garlic which is a plus for me.Keep up the good work.
address: 3/7, N.G.R Complex, Arekere Main Road, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: I had ordered for one Veg and other non Veg Food item, But got both Non-veg, and in non veg it was completely cabbage filled in it with minimal chicken chunks.
Never had such bad food!200rs for a veg biriyani n it was worst food ever! It was not even worth 50rs!!Low quality high price. Had to throw the food. overal cheating with customer's trust.
I ordered a food now in 50% off ....and now the food quality is so poor that I had to throw it.  I m feeling like I drunk oil... So guys be aware of this offer.

45, 14th Main, Opposite Of Samsung Smart Cafe, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Food quality was bad ... i asked for simple vada pav but I received different food.... no taste in samosa and bread pakoda... will never order from this place again.
Cold food
overall good
bread pakoda was tasteless. But vada pao was fine.
Bhajji size was very small. Chutney quantity was insufficient. Delivery was very late. Overall disaster. The bhajia was cold as a stone by the time it reached.
address: Next To Radiant Shine Apartment, Akshaya Nagar, Yellanahalli, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore
45, 14th Main, 7th Phase, Puttehahalli Palya, Opposite Of Samsung Smart Cafe, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Had been here for quick lunch in between my exams. This actually turned out to be really good joint to have your food peacefully and most importantly if you are going by urself I recommend this place to you. Enjoyed their shakes and mushroom rice combinations. This became regular place for me to visit during my exams. Price is worth it what you have. Quality and quantity is maintained. Ambiance is good. Loved their cutlery than ambiance.

You will notice their lovely lighting in this dark street \U0001f928 They serve very authentic phad thai here. And honey chilly potatoes is a must try. They serve a bit slow but food is cheap and good.

Great place for vegetarian Chinese and Thai food. We ordered Hunan wonton soup.,honey pepper panner,spring rolls, vegetable dumplings in garlic sauce ,leefu fried rice and danmein noodles. Everything tasted great. The honey pepper panner was just amazing. The quantity is not great though, especially the starters. They have very small bowls and plates. Good service and nice ambience. They also have a display which shows what the dishes look like which can help in choose the food. Overall a must visit place.

Went in here noticing the board outside but items mentioned in the board like pizzas were not available. Then there was another large poster inside offering combos but that too were not available either. Tried a few Chinese and Thai dishes. Overall quality, taste and price were all good. Quantity is good enough for the price and food is presented nice. The bowls and plates look fancy but clumsy. Will try again to explore more on the menu, although I don't frequent vegetarian restaurants usually.

Staff fights amongst themselves. Angry faced staff, angry customers, salty food. user_reviews: Very bad place. I usually don't feel the need to put out a bad review but went there because I know Lassi shop is good, serves good quality . What I got was watered down shit with spoiled milk. Mouth tasted all sour after I was done with the shake
address: 24th Main, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Have ordered from this place for more than 5 times and haven't been disappointed with the food. Haven't visited the outlet yet. It's located near the elita promenade in jp nagar 7th phase.  Have tried fries, cheese chilly sandwich, alu Cutlet sandwich, potato pops, garlic bread with cheese. Ordered Tandoori roti, Dal Makhani and Gobi Manchurian.  Really good quantity! Food was delivered hot and packed well too. Gobi manchurian was a little too oily.

This restaurant is in a very busy area of BTM. Its busy during the evening . Great place to try north indian dishes . It has quite good number of tables . Good place to try .

user_reviews: Food is good but our experience with restaurant management was pathetic. They forced us to pay service charge stating that they are providing ac,good ambience,table service etc etc. Also they have put a board at the entrance that service charge(10%) is mandatory. Where in our tax rules states that service charge is mandatory. But at Chervil you are bound to pay sgst, cgst, service charge. I will never recommend this place to anyone. Also i will be posting this to Twitter and other social sites so that strong action can be taken.

Got to know about this restaurant through Zomato gold. So, decided to give it a try on a special occasion in our family.  Good ambience for a group dine-in, multicuisine options are available with quick servicing staffs. Main highlight is the owner / manager who's hospitality. He greeted us and gave as a comfortable seating. He explained us the dishes and took the orders with our customizations. He was polite and patient to listen to us and our requirements.  Tried noodle pepper sea food soup, chilli prawns, prawn sukka (Mangalorean style made of coconut and coconut oil), garlic roti, mutton gosh, Hyderabadi chicken biryani cooked in clay pot, guava jack and strawberry mocktail.  All the dishes were good. I liked the strawberry mocktail a lot and guava jack was spicy with green chilli and masala powder.  Great experience overall. Recommended for multicuisine lovers with groups.

One of the rarest restaurant in Bangalore where each dish is a delight , from soup to desert every bite gave satisfaction to the core . We went to this place on our engagement anniversary , manager is knows all the details of the menu and preparations and helped us order right. Chicken sweet corn soup was so perfect ...not over sweet like other places. For starters the banana wrap fish couldn't have been better than this , right spices properly cooked. Chicken lasuni tikka had nice creamy gravy with garlic and juicy chicken ,for main course . Last meal was desert ... Strawberry Pana Cotta had just the right amount of sweetness and very nice texture. Staff is well trained and overall was a great dining experience.

user_reviews: I feel this kiosk is a bit underrated at this point. Of all the momo kiosks that have mushroomed lately, this one definitely is better than the others, in this area. Stuffing is adequate; most places tend to only add chicken fat and onion and this isnt, at least as of now! The soup is also nice but seems is served only when asked :-)
Just a basic and simple filling based momo. Filling was all right ,nothing special. The casing was of quite low quality,lacking taste. Price point for 8 momos was the saving grace .

Overall, the momos taste really good.. i had chicken momos.. Momos are stuffed well and the stuffing, tastes really good.. The soup they provide which is complimentary tastes good as well.. Also, they offer discounts which is a good aspect of it as well Had a satisfying experience..

We tried the steamed veg ones. Average sized but lots of filling inside. The outer cover is better than the ones available elsewhere. They also pack a version of hot and sour soup to go with the momos which is average. The red chutney is similar to what is available in regular roadside momo stalls. I also tried the line white cluck it was yummy and healthy as it was all rich protine. My next visit i again tried the same burger with crispy chicken and also their pasta. Although they have usual mashed potato but their sweet potato mash was yummy. Chicken Quesadillas, Chicken Wings, Pulled Chicken Burger and Rice Bowl. Rice bowl is kind of a Mexican rice stir fried with corn, bell peppers and pulled chicken.  Poultry they use don't fed with hormones and chemical stuffs which was good for health. Apart from that they have healthy food and beverage option for which you can ask. Burgers freshly made every morning you can taste that from 1st bite.  Bon Appetit Chef BB  chefbb.in

user_reviews: Ambience - 3/5    Food - 4/5  Service - 3.5/5  VFM - 4/5  Parking - No  Upahara Banashree is a Darshini located at Gottigere. We went here one morning for breakfast. The place was decently crowded and the kitchen seemed hygienic. We ordered Vada Sambar dip and filter coffee. The vada was freshly made and crisp. Sambar was typical Karnataka style Sambar, which I enjoy a lot. One thing about Bangalore Darshinis is that they simply don't go wrong with the coffee. The filter coffee was strong and flavourful, and set the right mood for the day. Do visit if you're nearby and want some quick and tasty eats!

A decent Darshini in Gottigere. Variety of dishes available. You can either eat standing or there are also a few tables available for sitting.  We tried their vada sambar dip. Vada is crisp and fresh. Sambar is a bit on the sweeter side but good. Dosas are also good and freshly made.  The one thing you should definitely try out here is their ginger coffee. Traditional coffee with a strong flavour of ginger, this surely will perk you up.    parkstreet19.wordpress.com

Smoor is one place where I love to indulge but this one let me down. First of all, it did not have intensive red velvet cake. Secondly, the seating is way too less and I had to wait before I could get a place. Only good enough to take away not to eat in.

Newly opened place in Vega mall with most of the range of pastries and other baked products available. Yet they did not hv intensive red velvet cake.  As other branches of smoor are, this place is also quite expensive but you can't beat the taste of the products here.
address: 172/1, GF K 03, Kiosk Unit, Vega City Mall, Srinivas Industrial Estate, Bilekahalli, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Kafe Nook is a tiny place in BTM for quick bites. Food is good in taste and quality. I have ordered chicken and cheese burger & chicken keema roll. Both were good. Visit here whenever you feel like to have quick snacks. Also it is very pocket friendly.  Total price of Chicken Cheese Burger & Chicken Keema Roll is RS 120/-

A tiny little place with a few seats outside. They play nice music. We usually go here for a cup of lemon tea or black coffee and if we happen to be hungry we get something to snack on. The falafel roll is tasty and is pretty big and quite worth the money I could say. IÃ\x83Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x92ll make sure to click a few photos next time round.
Out of 5 star  Packaging - 3 Delivery - 4 Taste - 2.5 Quality- 3 Quantity - 2.5  A bit overpriced , Taste was fine ,didnt expected that size Overall a rating of 3

user_reviews: Kumbha Bhojanam is a great place for a casual meal with your friends and family. The place offers a huge variety of non vegetarian and vegetarian options. Bamboo biryani is a must have.
Went to Kumbha Bhojanam a few days back. Delicious food and amazing ambience. Bamboo biryani is a must have. Lots of vegetarian and non vegetarian options.

Visited the place with my friends on a casual day and we just wanted to experiment with food so we ordered food from here. It was amazing! A wide range of items for vegetarians as well as non vegetarians. Totally recommended!!!
Really amazing food!!! Loved the authentic flavours of Karnataka and Andhra!! Also, the Bamboo Biryani is delicious!!! The prices were also reasonable... Also got a 10 percent student discount!!
If you want to have good food and a great time, this place is for you. Service, ambiance, food quality, everything here is amazing. A restaurant with a strong basics, and no BS. Cheers!

user_reviews: Had the spicy chilli guava drink and did not like it. For some reason, never got the hang of drinking over priced milk shakes from a bottle.

Frozen Bottle definitely serves good milkshakes but the price is too high. It has a similar branding as Keventers, Drunken Monkey and other milkshake outlets. However, even if the milk shakes are good, the taste and quantity don't justify the price. Had ordered Snickers Milkshake. It was quite tasty but it was all froth and very less amount of 'actual milkshake' was there. The bottle wasn't fully filled up.  Taste-4/5 Value for money-2/5 Overall-3.5

user_reviews: The mind-blowing cocktails, live music and authentic dishes served by this fine dining restaurant cum bar will let you have a soul-satisfying taste effortlessly. And you know what the USP of Casa Piccosa is? Well, it is their unique Mesoamerican style of preparing Spanish dishes. My favorite here is Garlic saute shrimps served in a cocktail glass.

We landed here by chance and we don't regret it because we got to witness Live performance #sunday  Food/Drinks: Quality is good but quantity is okiesh. Panner tikka as usual half cooked but I loved the pasta there. Drinks are reasonable you get variety of draught beer and bottled as well. As we had only beer so can not comment on drinks. (3/5)  Ambience: You have a specific bar section rest is dinning space. Bar space is of moderate size so please have your booking done. But still enough space to dance and show your moves.(3.5/5)  Service: BEST part of the place, fast service of both food and drinks. Quit satisfactory. (4/5)  Overall 3.5/5
They serve really good taco and chicken wings here,other than this food is average here. The open are is bit congested . Ambiance 3/5 Food 3/5 Service 3.5/5
Mesmerizing Live music and delectable food options. What else one needs on a weekend dinner. Little high on price end. But with the music it fits perfectly.

For music lover this is a place to visit, we had visited this restaurant on Friday night,live music was going (a person was singing very nicely) , ambience is pretty good , little crowded but worth visiting,pricing is decent.can hangout with bunch of friends.
address: 745/AB, 2nd Floor, Shravanee Square, 24th Main, 15th cross, 6th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Before shifting to Mahadevapura we used to stay in Bannerghatta Road. This Rolls On Wheels is close to my house. I visited this place with a wonderful experience I had with Rolls On Wheels near Christ College. But this is something different and it proved that all Rolls On Wheels are not the same in quality. Always some or the other options will not be available and also the taste is not that great. Many a times I will not get wheat base as well. Overall it's a bitter experience with this place.

One word for this place. Pathetic! I ordered a Chiney Combo meal and a Chicken tawa fried roll. I asked for extra chicken in both rolls and was told there would be extra charge for it, which I was fine with. What I wasn't told is that the extra charge is actually the price of two rolls for one roll!! So I paid 160 for a roll that was priced at Rs. 80 just for the little extra chicken! All places charge extra for extra meat, but it's not supposed to be double the MRP! Not just that, the taste of both rolls (chicken manchurian and chicken tawa fried) were horrible. There was no egg at all in the rolls! The meat was cold (so even the microwaving not done properly I guess) and the masala fries were stale, soggy and again cold. More than 500 bucks for an absolutely pathetic meal that you couldn't even finish because of the bad taste. Am never going back there for sure!
Rolls are okay but biryani is awful...I don't recommend ordering biryani from this place. Doesn't taste fresh, probably reheated frozen stuff.
My order was not delivered. And when i tried to call their contact centre no one replied or answered the phone. The worst experience possible. And even better payment was done online

Ordered a mix veg roll . Could not have more than 3 bites. The cook was very busy on the phone so he hurried up to prepare the order and leave it on the table . Very very spicy .. vegetables were tossed in the Masala which was raw ..Very soggy .. it was like a few vegetables dipped in some Masala rolled in a tortilla. My first visit was also bad just thought of trying again but they made sure i don't visit again. Guys..We don't ask food in exchange of paper we GIVE MONEY.
address: 27, Sri Vandhana Sai Nivas, 80 Feet Road, Near Saibaba Temple, Arekere, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: A full 5 star for Bake addiction. I had been to bake addiction to order couple of speciality cakes for my daughter's birthday this month. Srobona and her team was fully dedicated and helped us choosing the best flavours available. We ordered a strawberry and a chocolate one both of them were really yummy. They uses butter cream instead of other toppings and the flavour was just awesome. Unlike other cakes we felt like eating more and more cakes and never got bored with it. They even delivered the cakes much earlier almost by 7 30 in the morning just as what they have committed. Kudos to Srobona and team. Would recommend bake addiction to all who are looking for varieties and definitely they are one of the best bakers in the town so far.. cheers!!
address: #1178,18th A Main Road, 3rd Cross, 2nd Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Soothing food and environment. A must visit place for everyone. A calm place in JP Nagar with a whole lot of menu full of Millets(jowar). Went for lunch with a friend of mine, at first after seeing the menu i was little disheartened but when the food arrived and i took the first bite, i understood the meaning of simple and healthy food. There were no extra spices and oils in the food. Cant express the taste and ambiance by writing.  For all shopping lovers, they have a in-house healthy shopping complex.

Some really authentic dishes. All very tasty. Definitely try the Aralu majjige (buttermilk) - its out of the world. Ambience and service are average. Best thing about the food (that is apart from it being tasty) is that its very light on the stomach.

A beautiful yet simple cafe where you get a peaceful ambiance. With a great variety of millet items and a sandal free sitting, you would love to visit this place. I along with my friend talked to the owner about the benefits of organic food and a whole new vision opened up. A must visit for all health conscious people out there. Highly recommended.

If you are looking for a delicious and sinful meal... you should NOT go here. However, if you are looking for a healthy and filling meal- this is a nice place. The ambience is very relaxing and the staff are humble and polite. Not my kind of joint... but I'm sure there are loads of you who might enjoy it.
address: 277, 15th Cross, 21 Main, Outer Ring Road, JP Nagar 5th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

BAKE - OOH is by far one of the best ever start up in the bakery chain. The mother daughter duo are gifted beyond the ordinary. They have artfully brought delicious home made goodies to our finger tips.  We love their biscuits, cakes, brownies and festive goody boxes because they are healthy, low on fat and sugar, use natural ingredients and are made in hygienic conditions.  Done with rats running around in bakery shelf's!!! Recommend them to people who want the best out of life's sweet moments.
Delicious and healthy snacks. Loved the ragi beetroot brownies, especially the egg-less sugar-less variant. Trail mix is a must with evening tea.
address: 973, 6th Cross, Vijaya Bank Layout, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: The most authentic Chole Bhatura I've had in a long time . The chai is to die for. Can't wait to come back and try the other chats and sweets!

Was on official trip to Bangalore for 11 days. Wanted something north Indian and hit upon this place in bangerghtta road. I found it on 8th day and for three days my breakfast, lunch and dinner was this place only. Very nice location. Must visit. Must try all things One by one. 5 star 1000%.

I went to banglore and tried the north indian chaats at the outlet. Be it chole bhature, aloo tikki or kachori...they were just mind blowing..I doubt if such delhi taste exists anywhere else in whole banglore at such reasonable prices. I would give it thumbs up n 5* rating. I m gonna recommend all my friends in banglore to try n go there.

The best place in bangalore if you are looking for authentic delhi styled chat.. Aloo tikki and samosas are lip smacking!chole bhature is simply irresistible.. I came all the way from hennur to try the chat here and it was totally worth the travel.awesome food!!

Run by an old couple, the outlet serves tasty Delhi style chaats. Best Samosa in Bangalore and amazing aloo tikki chaat makes us momentarily feel like we are on the streets of the capital. The chutneys taste so authentic too. A must visit for everyone who misses the true taste of the North.
address: 24, Bannerghatta Main Road, Himagiri Meadows, Gottigere, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Average.

Horrible packing !! Delivery took the longest time !! Rice &  Rajma were uncooked !! Raita was just white colour water with 3 tiny pieces of tomato !! I am highly disappointed because whenever I order through Zomato I have faced with these problems !! There is always a delay in delivery, food is either bad or after confirmation it gets cancelled !!
Accessories was not provided
Found a cockroach in the Gulab Jamoon. This is very bad service and unhygienic. Will never order from Mast Kalamdar.
Authentic veg food

user_reviews: I and one of my friend (Kanndiga)visited the restaurant and had naati chicken curry with chapati and rice.. Taste was pathetic and much costly too! First and the last visit.
Awesome place to have traditional food! Good taste and the best part is the Ragi Muddhe! Good hospitality, fast service, great ambience. Overall a good place, better than the most MANE hotels!.
Had mutton pepper which was very spicy than expected. Ravi mudhe was not manglorean type . Quantity was good . Like to taste some more dishes to conclude . Good ambience and hospitality.
Awesome experience.. Food is too good.. That raggi mudde meals makes me come back again and again. Feels like home every time i visit here.. If you r looking for proper naati style then must visit..

Visited this restaurant on a lazy weekend. I tried their mutton meals and I loved it. The ragi ball was soft and the curries were very tasty. The meat was tender and done well. I have tried their mutton fry and it's my favorite dish here. Biryani can be done better and is not up to the mark. Overall a decent restaurant with an genuine attempt to serve nati style preparation and the interiors are beautifully done with a rustic touch. Do try this restaurant if you looking for different taste in this part of the city. Sunday's they serve leg soup and other specialities at morning. I am coming back to try these dishes again.
address: 9/10/9 2nd Floor, Opposite SBI Bank, DLF Road, Bhagyalakshmi Avenue, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore
5th Floor, Gopalan Innovation Mall, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Worst quality cakes. Bought a birthday cake (butterscotch flavour) from this place - to call it a cake would be offensive to cakes. The 20% of the abomination that these guys sold, consisted of sponge cake. The remaining 80% was some cream substitute (not real cream, mind you). See the pic attached - the thin sorry mess is the cake. The rest of the "cake" is nothing but a sorry-excuse-for-cream.  The "cream" didn't have the taste, texture or feel of cream that is there in cakes usually. Not even sure if it is fit to eat, as we arent even sure what the "cream" is made of. This is undoubtedly the worst cake I've ever eaten.  Overall, it also had a chemical smell and was hardly palatable. Will never ever visit the place nor recommend to anyone. Please avoid.

Pathetic cakes. If possible would have given a negative rating. Unfortunately Zomato provides rating from 1-5.  Ordered a 2 kg chocolate cake didnt taste like one. On complaining they came in with a 1kg replacement. But that too tasted bad and rough. Post this they didn't even return our calls. No cake no money.  Pathetic cake and pathetic service. Unfortunately I ordered seeing a 4+ rating on Facebook. Please don't get cheated.  Not even worth a try!!!

They serve stale foods... I had a egg puff from here, the worst ever tasted.. it should have been prepared weeks back...  Unhygienic place, happened to see their kitchen... the door wasn't closed.. I stay nearby, 4 buildings apart...
address: 6, 60 Feet Road, Bilekahalli, Near Vijaya Bank Apartment, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Tried Crepe from Crepe Nation ? It is Epic. Lovely Food truck which loaded with yummy crepes. Crepe is a french pancake version. You can satisfy your sweet tooth with crepe varieties from Crepe Nation  They serves Waffles, Hotdogs, Fries , Mojito too. Everything from the menu which falls below 200 bucks. Best part they have both veg n non veg ( Halal ) and dessert option in the menu.  Best in the menu ( Personal suggestions ) - Mushroom n Spinach crepe - Snickers Crepe  Food truck owner Nadeem, was very interactive and informative to us about crepe and its varieties.  If you spot this black and yellow food truck anywhere in BTM layout. Without second thought you can try their crepes. It is the food truck for sweet toothÃ\x83Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x92s.

This food truck has been on my bucket list from quite a long time.. and happened to check out recently when they came to VR Mall in Whitefield. Ordered Snickers crepe, Mushroom & Spinach crepe, Peach flavoured Mojito and Watermelon Mojito. They were freshly made and tasted real good.. decent place to have a quick bite with your gang!! Would like to try out more of their crepe flavours!! Kudos to the team!?
address: 16th Mian Road, 2nd Stage, BTM, Bangalore

user_reviews: potion quantity was much less .
good and tasty

I just ordered for home delivery. I ordered for a cheesy chicken tikka. Let me tell you the pictures are misleading in terms of quality. The amount I paid and what received were two different things. The starter was so less in quantity that it's not worth it. I am just waisting words I guess you get the gist. Avoid unless you are drunk or have too much money to spend. :)

Worst place ever! I have never written a review ever but the food here was so bad-tasting and pricey that I had to warn you all against it. We paid 400+ and the food we got was so less in quantity that not even one person was satisfied completely. They even arrived late for home delivery.  Very disappointed.

Biryanis are really good to taste, Veg & Non-Veg. Had them home delivered. Note that these are pseudo- Biryanis, not so authentic but the taste is good and that's what matters. Chicken was cooked to perfection, paneer was a bit chewy. Only side served with it is raita and it was totally not disappointing, meaning it was good as well. Only drawback is the quantity against the price. Aam Aadmi Verdict: Must Try but at your own risk of expenditure.
address: 3, 1st Cross, Kalyani Kala Mandir, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

We had old monkey icecream also. Amazing.  Ambience:5/5 (lighting is low) Service:5/5 Taste:5/5 Satisfaction:6/5  NOTE:if u r a zomato gold card member,please carry an id proof with you.

user_reviews: For the money the charge and the quality of food - its really awesome. Surprised by how such a place can deliver a taste on menus so similar to those street vendors in Delhi. Definitely not a family dine in restaurant but home delivery choice.
A good place for a cheap takeout. The tandoori chicken, afghan kebabs and butter chicken is very good. The price is dead cheap and also their delivery is fast. Cant ask for anything else

Though the first look of this restaurant looks little shabby, dont get fooled by them. Some of the foods prepared here are authentic and yummy. A must try items includes Tandoori chicken, Fish masala fry and mutton pepper dry. It has a dine in service available, however it's not recommended for the people who look for good ambiance and cleanliness (for you guys takeaways are recommended).  Price wise it's far more cheaper than some of the restaurants around this place, you can have a stomach full just under 300-500.
Best Home Delivery Service .... They Serve good Tandoor chicken and Chicken chilly , Kabab ..... Keep up the good work ... The food quality is nice ...

This place serves good Chicken Tandoori among other North Indian dishes. However the USP of this place has to be that it serves great Roomali Roti's which is a rarity amongst eating joints in this area. It also delivers food to nearby localities which can be a great respite on days when you are bored of home-cooked meals.
address: 362, N V Building, Gotiigere, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Good fast food and good nature staff...lil disappointed by Wada pao it was not that tasty As I usually get at other place..dosa was really good chala nature was nice....overall it was good....
We went for shoping im we were just by passing thought there then we went and order for dosa ,pao bhaji,chhola bhatora... all good ...we had a good time......

The menu at Shiv Shagar is large and the display at the counter mouth watering. We ordered the masala combo and the methi paratha. The pav bhaji in the masala combo was not that great and the chilli cheese toast extremely oily. The methi paratha too wasn't that great. It lacked a lot of masala and salt. While the variety and display at this branch looks great, the quality and standard is way below what you would expect to receive at a Shiv Sagar restaurant.
address: 4th Floor, Royal Meenakshi Mall, Hulimavu, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Located next to Spar Hypermarket in the same compound, this is a complete Food Court in itself. I ordered Paneer Pakora, Coffee, Paneer Paratha, and Paav Bhaji. Everything was very delicious and good in quality. I liked the food. The paav bhaji was tasty and paneer paratha was very big and heavy, more than sufficient for two people. There seating space is also decent and quiet. So you can enjoy your meals while relaxing there after shopping at Spar.
Super clean, super taste, service with a smile and very affordable! Kudos to the management of the foodcourt who make you feel very comfortable once you enter the place.  All in all 5 stars!
address: Food Parade, Spar Hyper Market, Near Dairy Circle, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

Good momos. Good chutney. Great price. What more can you ask for? Palak momos are different and really good. Also delivers if you order more than 3 plates. Just put a couple more chairs outside to sit on!

user_reviews: Good food, affordable. Starter menu needs a change Weekdays are rush free. Quality of food ok, can get better tho. Service is fast and staff well mannered.

This is a bar so don't expect any gourmet restaurant experience. It's among the cleaner bars in the area which is frequented by blue collar people. I haven't found drunkards here. No unruly crowd here. If you want to have some good drinks, have a conversation with friends without blaring music or unruly people and some good food this is the place. Even though families can come here I would suggest against it. It is more of a guys adda sort of a place.  Food is good, ambience is nice (for what it is). Come here for a relaxed evening of drinks. Or get food delivered.

Had been seeing these slimy bars and restaurants everywhere in Bangalore and was wondering if the food is as good as other places in Chennai and everywhere else.   Got the experience... place was cleaner than the usual, drinks were cheap and food was amazing.... best Chinese I have had in a while.  The drunk men were better behaved than slimy bars in koramangala but I will order delivery next time... unless I have to take a friend around to experience Bangalore.
Average place to get some typical north indian dhaba food. Place is OK to sit and eat, little play area for kids, service is average and food good, overall a good place to grab a meal.

I and a friend visited this shitty restaurant on 23 September. We ordered food and drinks. We ordered a fried fish but the waiter served us masala fish after that we were served a chicken masala with too much salt , we complained but were ignored, the waiter was like a road side Romeo who had no knowledge of food and spoke so rudely that we decided to leave and ordered for the bill we were then given a wrong bill we argued and walked out we were the surrounded by 5 -7 people at the gate of the restaurant and forced to pay we had a heated argument and after paying walked a few steps towards the taxi 4-5 guys came after us with sticks and beat us very badly I was hit badly on my head and started to bleed profusely, I then had to go to the hospital where I got 4 stitches on my head.  If you care for your life never go to this place run by goons.
address: 30, Syndicate Bank Colony, Next to BPL Arkere, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Run by a family, the food here is absolutely delicious, honest, homely and reasonably priced. The peaceful ambience and the lake breeze make it an interesting place in this area for a happy meal with your family. Although the menu is quite good, the most of the dishes might not be available all the time, but they take orders upfront via phone in case you have special requests. Food can also be personalized to your choice as they cook specifically against orders.

Great place to go to when you're really hungry. Don't expect anything too fancy as far as the ambiance goes. It's a nice and cozy lil joint with a good view of the lake (hulimavu lake). You'll feel at home here at encyclofoodia and The food here is yummy and homely. If you are craving for some really good Malabari dishes and also don't wanna empty your wallets this here is the place to be ?. I highly recommend their malabar biriyani, malabar porotta and beef. Happy Fooding.
address: 33, 34, 1st Floor, Muthurayaswamy Layout, Hulimavu, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

Ordered Paneer Butter Masala and Butter Naan, for the pricing the quantity was awesome and so was the taste. Keep it up guys and continue to maintain your quality!!

I wonder when you guys start this in Delhi for people like me who keep craving for something different on the menu and that too in true traditional and homely style. It was a delight to have a Feast on the food ordered from you guys and let me be honest, i will relish those Burps for long long time. Way to go guys and keep rocking.  My recommendation is surely high for you guys. Curries are tasty(It is better to ask them to add less oil). Chapatis are soft( Just like home made chapatis)  Along with that we had solkadhi (It is a Maharashtrian drink made with coconut milk , spices and kokam). It is very refreshing.  Puranpoli is ok. user_reviews: Nice and small place to have south Indian delicacies. Onion Uthappam and Idly are awesome. Cheese dosa needs improvement. Tea was okay. Service is fast.

It's surprising why this place is so underrated. Idly Pidly is a tiny little outlet serving healthy food items. Having tasted most of their food such as Appam, Ragi dosa, Vada, etc I personally feel that the food is steamed, healthy and tastes pretty good knowing that there are zero additives and almost no oil in it. I really appreciate their effort to serve such fresh, healthy and tasty recipes. The prices are completely worth it and the service is super fast. So try it out or maybe order in from here and see for yourself :)

Its not that great. Not anything special i would say just a normal south indian breakfast outlet. It could be better the serving quality can be better. Food quality can be better. I ate 4 5 times in past and now i am writing a review after having a detailed pattern. Mornings the taste is even for everything at evening they just add lot of water in sambhar i guess thats why its not tasty at all. Sometimes in the afternoon also they serve cold food Breakfasts idli sambhar and rava dosas are good option. Sambhar mini idly is always a better option for some snacks or breakfast thats worth the cost.
This place is just beside my Place  Had breakfast and everything snacks here a couple of time.  As per my experience it's okay. I didn't like the momo of this place. Breakfast wise it's okay.

user_reviews: I've been coming here for the past five years. I love close by and sometimes, when I want some greasy American food, I visit this joint. And I have noticed a steady decline in the quantity of food served, although the quality is somehow undeterred.  I paid over 775 bucks for a burger that was infinitely smaller in size compared to what we were offered years ago. Months ago even. The prices have increased by a mile. I'd have expected both increase parallely. Not have an inverse effect.  The food quality, as usual,was appreciated. Delicious burgers, and also courteous staff.  Ambience: 4/5 Value for money: 1/5 Service: 4.5/5 Quality: 4/5

The ambience coupled with the view from the restaurant made the experience worthwhile. The waiters were on their toes and their service was great. Ambience : 5/5 Service : 4.5/5 Food : 4.5/5 Value : 5/5

We ordered for the bombay style falooda. To our surprise it wasn't upto the grade of even what one gets on the street wheelcart stalls. Those streeet stalls in mumbai n pune provide better falooda with 2-3 scoops of icecream or kulfi. The falooda at this place had the worst milkshake one can ever get. Even at home we make better milkshakes. The guy doesn't even mix up the roohafza with the falooda drink. A big no if you are going for that bombay style falooda. You can opt for only the kulfi n icecreams, which are good.

Kulfi and More serves Kulfi's of different flavours and fruits, There are a number of outlet of this chain located across South Bangalore. This outlet is located on BTM 2nd Stage right on the 7th Main Crossing. There is even a small bench to seat and eat.  We tried their Malai Kulfi which comes in different sizes. The Kulfi was delicious overall. Just the right amount of sugar. You can also try popular flavors like Sitaphal, Lichie and so on. Ambience is brilliant. Its in roof top. Very well lit up. The lighting is excellent. The tables are well arranged. The food is well presented and very tasty. I found the drink was pretty expensive. One mushroom starter, grill chicken with rice, one. Cocktail and two beer and a ice cream desert costed 3.2k. The place doesn't have good parking area..
Nothing great about this place. We were seated in the smoking zone. The chairs are not comfortable. The music system is not good, the speakers suck. Overall an average experience.

Very nice and big place. They have separate smoking and non smoking sitting arrangements. I liked that they kept the music minimum so that people could actually hear each other talking without struggling much. We ordered Char Grilled Spicy Prawn and London fish and Chips.. Both were nice. Ordered Alfredo chicken pasta,tasted better before. Overally enjoyed the time I spent here.

We wanted to visit some party place but most of the places were full and decided to give this place a shot..well this was not a bad choice at all. The ambience was cool with good music buzzing around. The receptionist offered 2+1 shots offer which we accepted with pleasure ?. Thanks to Zomato gold , as we had 2 membership and got some great discount.  Food - 4.5/5 Ambience - 4/5 Value for money - (if Zomato gold) 5/5
address: 309, 15th Cross, 100 Feet road, 5th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

the quality was worst .the rice was just yellow ,it was not even chicken biryani ,the quality was worst,taste was worst,packaging was below average and a lot of improvement is required.I need a refund

user_reviews: If Veg food tastes so good, one can eat this everyday.? Gourmet veg food at its best. Be prepared for a long wait on weekends and holidays. Really bustling (noisier than the other branch) with white walls and Isckon graffiti which is packed most times. The latest addition of Appam and stew is a winner. Sweet toothers celebrate here, the dessert spread is as much as the main course.

Had been here for dinner with my family. Seeing the pictures only you can just imagine how amazing is the food. You should be a complete foodie to try all the food items available here. Special mention to the desserts here. They are just yummy and melt in the mouth kind. I ate 90% desserts and 10% other food items. All in all itÃ\x83Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x92s the best place to have some nice and innovative veg buffet. The price is worth it if you can stuff yourself with all the food available there.

Nice place for pure vegetarian food. It's completely jain style. But you will get lots of options there and they have really done an excellent creativity. Love the food  Food! 5/5 Service :5/5 Ambience :4/5

After a very long time I actually enjoyed a buffet dinner. More or less the menu remains the same despite what such restaurants often claim as completely different, largest spread etc. This one IMHO however stands out the tallest. Excellent selection of food, amazing flavours, brilliant arrangement! Service standards are top class, the pace at which plates were replaced, I was totally impressed. The restaurant is spick and span with ISKCONish graffiti on the wall. Every item of food we liked barring the pastries, which we found considerably hard. Italian live counter, we skipped. Gajar ka halwa without sugar was what I liked the most. Given its commendable quality, around 650 RS per person is definitely bang for the buck. @Meghana

Great place with great range of Veg food..right from starters to chat items to main course and desserts...little on the expensive side but worth it....I loved their pani puri and gajar ka halwa specially..
address: 281, 2nd Floor, 15th Cross, 5th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

Located on the main road right below brewsky. Has a very rich and royal ambiance with nice woodwork & paintings. Absolutely loved that. The waiters are friendly and know each dish or item they're serving and what it has. This is important considering the fact that the meal they serve consists of more than 25 different items.  There were a lot of items but I liked very few. Among those I liked were starters, chats, Ghevar, dal and a paneer dish. Didn't find the others very interesting. Ghevar was the favourite and you won't be satisfied with just one serving. Don't miss this.  Nice place to visit with family. Do try this restaurant for a good Rajasthani cuisine.

user_reviews: If you are located within 5km of this place then you might know that there were are not many buffet options in this area so this is a very good option nearby without driving too far in traffic.  The 25 items variety mentioned in the menu section are definitely served. about 8 varieties of icecreams flavours.  Value for money.  You may go on weekdays to avoid crowds.

Ambiance of this place is really nice. We visited during the weekday and it was very quiet and calm. Food wise it was tasty as well. Variety wise not very large buffet spread but very neatly maintained. A little difficult to locate the place if you are not familiar with the area. Always use maps.

Warm ambience, Spacious area, plenty parking, unlimited food, good food. You can't possibly fault this place which probably ticks all boxes quite neatly. The buffet spread was pretty wide and you can go crazy with the 8 ice cream flavors alone! Try each and you'll have yoir last penny's worth already!.  A must visit for family dos and as well as a silent outing. Can't really say if there's anything wrong with the place.

Serene ambience, almost open space covered with lot of plants. Really a green place. Good place for corporate or group. Friendly staff. Mango greens is branch of Mango tree, Green for vegetarian buffet and Tree for non veg buffet. Liked the concept of seperating veg and non veg Buffets. Usual trend of review is to start with starters, but main course in this restaurant has topped over starters. Liked texture and taste. Akki Rotti and Ragi Rotti were today's special roti, to be frank these roties were really fresh and tasty. Overall good starters, good main course, good desserts. And fresh fruits. Liked it?

Nice place filled with lot of green plants , trees and open space ... food is clean and comfortable, we had mushroom italic , broccoli soup both turned out to be great, main course was a bit let down with too much of tomato curry over powering all other spice ... staff is friendly

user_reviews: Initially I didn't want to visit the place on account of how it looked from the outside. It looked very shady and the board isn't very attractive. As I made my way onto the second floor I realised that the ambience wasn't so bad. The food tastes great but the parking is very slow and irritating.

Kane naked fry, chicken gassi with Kori roti and prawn hingaudda ( hing based curry ) - all authentic coastal food. Very well done. The decor is beautiful and the food is worth the effort that we need to put in parking. The chicken ghee roast is good but I have tasted better ghee roast in other places in Bangalore - and that is where I reduced 1 star. I would strongly recommend the fresh lime soda , sweet n salt mix ...a wonderful drink to wash down the food.

It was Sunday and just wanted to eat something nice. After checking the reviews decided to order chicken special combo . The quantity was good. The price was reasonable and the taste fine. And then I realized the reason. The Kadai chicken has msg added. Just couldn't stop drinking water until late night. In the pic added only half portion is shown. The rest shared with someone who went through the same side effect of msg.

Initially I was hesitant to enter the place as it looks pretty shady from the road, the board doesn't do much to help. But with constant nudging by a friend, I reluctantly made my way to the second floor. I must say the ambience wasn't as bad as I imagined. In fact it would be pretty amazing at night. The washbasin was creatively done.  I had my lunch here. I accompanied a vegetarian friend so we ordered paneer ghee roast and neer dosa. And to my delight the food was served quite fast and tasted delicious! We ordered lime juice to wash down our palates. The ghee rice was next, light and flavourful. Overall this place took me by surprise. I'd definitely visit here again to try more dishes. Do not judge a book by its cover is all I can conclude with..?

I tried their fish thali. It has a decent stock for the buck but lacks taste. The vegetable has no taste, the fish curry has no flovour, the dry prawn chutney has no zing. We were thinking to taking ghee roast chicken at the side but we decided not to based on the experience we had with the thali. Fried fish in the thali saved our day. Can take a pass on this.
address: 312, 2nd Floor, 15th Cross, 100 Feet Road, 5th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: A (not so) hidden gem! Good ambience and wonderful food. While the menu is not exhaustive, what they serve is right up there in taste. Great burgers with buns dipped in vegetable juice to give them their colours (red, black, etc.). With the 25% discount offer they had going on, it was great value for money as well.
address: 14-15, 24th Main Road, Opposite IDBI Bank, Phase 5, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Tried Biryani, Ghee Rice and Egg Curry.Ghee rice was very flavourful with lots of ghee and sweet smelling spices.Biryani is Malabar style, not spicy at all with short grain rice, but tastewise good.Egg curry was okay. Overall good food.

I have known Rara Avis for ages, one of my favorite places in Thalassery and Kannur back in 2000s. I was happy when they came to Bangalore finally but couldn't try for a long due to the distance. Now that they are in JP Nagar, I'm enjoying my favorite Malabar dishes again. I would rate their biriyanis as one of the best in Bangalore for Malabar/Thalassery Biriyani, but still a little far from the real Thalassery biriyani. The snacks, appam, thenga pathiri, neypathiri, porotta are all perfect and delicios with the fish curries especially the raw mango one. The chicken curries and dishes need a lot of improvement as they prepare it the fast food style. Alisa/Alsa/Haleem was a huge disappointment, no meat or chicken at all and the wheat was not cooked well, looked like a half cooked porridge, flavorless and a drastic failure. You'll be stoned at if you serve this in Kannur as Alisa.

Ordered pathal, chattipathiri and kanthaari chicken curry from here..delivery was very latee..but tastewise it is up to the mark..  Chattipathiri was Soo soft and the chicken curry was delicious..  Recommended!

Very good Mango prawn curry...Really loved it.. Will look forward to having this again...  But the Malabar chicken is really bad.. It had a lot of chillies and crushed pepper.. Never had such Malabar chicken when I lived in Malabar a few year back.. Malabar food is light and full of whole spices that add flavour.. The one served by Rara Avis was more of chettinad chicken/guntur chicken made in Malabar style with coconut milk...
address: 1260 SY 35/4 SJR Tower's, JP Nagar 7th Phase, 24th Main Puttanhalli, JP Nagar, Bangalore

As every foodie worth his cumin knows, BTM can hold its own against Koramangala & Indiranagar when it comes to continental cuisine. Joey is a gem of a place located at the far end of BTM. To reach, take the lane opposite HDFC bank on Outer Ring Road.  Went on two separate occasions and had chicken steak and chicken pasta. Both were tasty and of generous quantity when their prices were taken into consideration. The steak was surprisingly excellent and much better than its more expensive counterparts.  I found only one fault: the chicken in the pasta was gamey. Other than that, the dish was superb.  Will I return? Definitely.

The price is reasonable and the quantity is huge. That summarize the good part. Coming to the quality of the food, it was cold, despite the restaurant being situated just 2 km away. The noodles were really bad and the chicken noodle hardly contains any chicken pieces. Never going to order from them again.

Ordered a home delivery of their famous chicken Biryani and a few Chinese dishes to feed the needy souls. The Biryani was very well layered, with succulent pieces of chicken and fragrant rice. For the needy souls there was Hakka noodles and chilly chicken which was selections! The packaging was excellent and the portion size just perfect! Overall a great meal.
Ordered the chicken fried rice and the chicken hot garlic. It was really good. The prices are also really affordable. One of the better chinese places in BTM. Will try the Indian food next time.

I didnt consume, because why should i harm my body by eating such harmful tasting food. after few days, I again bought food from this place thinking that it was just one odd day, but again I could smell the weird chemical smell(may be like that of bleaching powder) in the sambhar. I skipped the sambhar but consumed the rava idly, because it had no apparent smell. after 2 days, I fell ill of gastroentritis, not sure if its because of this food. This is my experience from this hotel food. After that day, decided not to order food from here. How can a hotel be so irresponsible in delivering such a poor quality food.

Guys don't order from this place if you are looking for food. My order's payment was made before hand online. The biggest mistake I end up doing at Zomato (realized today). The manager will keep calling you and will lie that the delivery boy wasn't able to find your place and would say now if you want the order I can send him in next 15 minutes. Also, when all this is happening and you approach Zomato chat, they will assure you that they are in touch over call with Restaurant and your order will be delivered soon and will say sorry for inconvenience and would say it's restaurant's fault. Then, finally after 1 hour + 30 minutes wait when you end up calling restaurant again then you would get to hear that since you enquired about delay in delivery and cut the call hence we haven't delivered. If you "still" want the order I can deliver it in next 15 minutes. Still??????? I paid for it damn it and waited almost close to 2 hours now. Don't fall in the trap!
