user_reviews: Amazing place. Saturday nights can be a little crowded. The food is really good. Service has to improve a lot. The pub is understaffed. Ambience is okayish. There was a dj night going on. Dance floor is small but then there aren't many people there. For starters we ordered the fries basket. This comprised of French fries, wedges and potato balls. This was really good and worth the money. Their sauce has a different flavour to it We tried the classic grilled chicken cheese burger. This was also good. As for the main course, we ordered the Jolly good mixed grill sizzlet. This was really good. We were informed that the food orders would take a min of 20-30 mins for the preparation. Staff are friendly.

It was extremely difficult to spot this place. There's just a small board with it's name written above vallet parking.  Food: I ordered a veg paneer burger. It was tasty and very well presented. My Friends ordered the chicken starters and fish.. they were apparently very bad. Their strawberry mocktail was pretty good.  Ambience: this place has a good ambience and a dance floor as well. Service: it was extremely slow. They took twenty mins to bring our orders. But the waiters were helpful And nice.

user_reviews: It was yesterday I visited this mall to watch 2.0. Found this place to have Masala Puri and Filter Coffee. Rates are high! But OK OK. Kudos!

Most certainly now we have a great place to eat when we head to the mall for shopping. They have a variety of things from juices, to chaats, to sandwiches and some great combos. We had two of their rice combos - one was the north Indian thali which had 2 rotis, dal, paneer butter masala, dhokla and papad. The rotis were cooked well, jeera rice was yummy and the dal was also tempered very well.  The other thali had a green pulav, papad, raita and gulab jamun, paneer tikka and hara bhara kebab. The rice was the best ever I have had! Loved the kebab though the tikka was little disappointing. The gulab jamun was good too.  We also ordered for a masala puri and it was ok.  The only drawback is that it is always crowded so it takes long to receive the order.

user_reviews: You havenÃ\x83Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x92t tried it all of u have not yet tried North Karnataka meals. Jowar roti with badnekai (baingan) and Junka is an amazing package. Thin hot soft jowar roti with melting butter on it is too good a combo. Though this place does not serve the best North Karnataka meals, but having it after a long time, I truly relished it!

Ambiance - They have an entire floor that serves jolad rotti meals. Interiors are decent with restroom facilities.  Service - We had visited the hotel on the day of Bandh and it had just opened for customers in the evening. We were the first people and the only people for a long time. Yet, they served us with utmost interest.  Price -  Slightly on the higher side given that many others serve the same for a much cheaper price.  Taste - We ordered for a special thali. The only difference between the normal one and this would be that they serve holige and icecream with fruit salad in this one. Only if you are dessert loving person, go for the deluxe else it can totally be avoided.  I must say, every item served on the plantain leaf was authentic and delicious.
Uttar karnataka meals at very reasonable price with high quality taste. Yes, am always hungry for this meal. There service is the best, they serve hot rotis unlimited for the full meals tali.

Double the enjoyment with jolada roti... second time in about a week's time... different venue... won't say dis not enjoy it at swad kamat... would have loved to get the Holige after a little spicy fare of gravies.... all butter thin jowari roti with 3 curries dal raita salad with resemblance to Maharashtrian stuff... loved it...the first in the week was at basaweshwara khanawali @ anandrao circle... would like to visit again for sure... enjoy

user_reviews: The place has some good puffs and snacks. Bakery has a choice of baked products and packed snacks on a shelf to choose from. The cakes are good but nothing extraordinary. Few tables are placed to sit and eat. The staff is freindly. Mostly people prefer takeaways. Enjoy!
I have been to this place many times... but never had there wonderful cakes. I like the way in which they make the puffs.... especially the egg puffs... just amazing!!
address: 989, Ambika Corner, DC Road, Off Bannerghatta Road, Bilekahalli, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Reasonably priced and tasty food. Perfect for a snack or two. I especially love the cutlets from this place. We had ordered chicken cutlet this time and by mistake they sent us veg ones. But they were kind enough to send us chicken ones later, late in the night. So good service by zomato and the restaurant. You know how to keep your costumers happy.

Lemme first look at this cheese cake again ?? i was loving it .. the taste was really cheesy cheese .. it was a blueberry one .. and i also tried chicken kabab hot dog ( If i am Not wrong with the name ) .. it was so filling .. the ambience was quite pleasant ?

Nice ambience and a lot of good food on their menu like sandwiches, pizzas, chicken roll and burgers.They serve pastries and milkshakes too. Overall a good cozy place to drop by with family or friends for your evening snacks.
One of my favourite place for hangout. Second floor is really very cozy.... Delicious food and great smoothies. Cake is really tasty..... Especially the rainbow cake...
address: 7, Doddakammanahalli Main Road, Central Excise Layout, Phase 2, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Made the Christmas special. Awesome plum cake. Very special experience. I liked not just how tasty it was, but also the way it was packed and presented ?

I have ordered a few cakes by cakes by M, they are amazing. Recently for my little ones birthday I ordered a black forest cake with a peppa pig fondant design. Must say it was fabulous & appreciated by all. The cake was moist & fresh.the design was a big hit with the kids.Thanks to cakes by M , the birthday was a memorable one.
address: DLF Westend Heights, Akshaya Nagar, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: I ordered their Belgian chocolate truffle cake. It was really tasty. The chocolate was rich and tasty. They had choco chips in between the layers This is very much worth the price.
Ordered a choxolate truffle cake for my bro's bday and it was really tasty.. really moist, soft and fresh that the cake just melt in our mouth.. ? will definitely order from here again...
address: 1 B, Krishnamurthy Complex, Kodichikkanahalli Road, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Desserts are average but pretty good. Their death by chocolate is a must try. A one boutique stop for all your dessert cravings. Good servicing even for home delivery.

The cityÃ\x83Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x92s old favorite charm - Polar Bear Ice cream Parlor is Bangalore's most loved ice cream shop. My old time favorite ice cream is Gadbad since the magic is eternally awakening.
Awesome place to have ice cream. Must have is Death By Chocolate. Absolutely loved it. Their Sundaey are also must try. Nice clean place to hang out away from all the rush.

They serve the best desserts. You'll go drooling over the waffles and ice creams. Even I think their sandwiches are also good to try. So whenever you have sweet cravings, rush to any polar bear near you. Or get it delivered. Also, please guys, why did you discontinue Tiramisu. It was my favourite. I'm really sad. Please bring back!!
address: 71, 1st Main Road, Panduranga Nagar, Doresanipalya Ward, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Ice Cream @ World on a Swirl is ok, Taste is Normal, am not able to find any special in terms of Flavour & Taste, Nothing to speak about ambiance it's quite normal as all Ice Cream Parlours.

A quite nice and lovely place with ample lightning. Their chocolate flavors are delicious and the place is heaven for chocolate lovers. I enjoyed the taco ice cream. Nice place to hangout and great ice creams.

Happen to visit this place recently with my wife who was craving Ice cream. Courteous staff, awesome ambience and most importantly awesome mixing of icecream. Waffle cup was crispy unlike soggy in many place... Great going. Now regular place for midnight icecream craving.

A cute little ice cream parlour overlooking a busy road, perfect for your " I don't feel so alive " days. A lot of variety in their menu and expert ice cream makers behind the counter deliver you one of the best ice creams in Bangalore.Do visit!
address: Mahadheshwara Swami Nilaya, 1/2, 1st Floor, DLF Circle Main Road, Near Akshaynagar, Yelenahalli, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: They have many kinds of different waffles. Must visit here if you ever visit Meenakshi mall. You can even customize your waffles at will. However some improvement is needed for eggless waffles.

Had a chance to have their amazing waffles, perfect blend of crispy and soft. The owners are very passionate about it which makes it a lot more amazing as they prepare fresh batter everyday and invest in quality. You have to go here if you want to have authentic waffles. Plus they also offer cool internships to college kids ;)

Have been there so many times in breezy Bangalore weather. The taste is great and service is nice. Plus point is that the service person remembers your favourite order if you have been there few times.

Ordered waffle combo from here..one was waffle with chocolate sauce and the other was waffle with caramel sauce..?  I am not a fan of waffles but I liked whatever I ordered from here..  Waffles were crispy and hot..?

ORDER REGULAR!! I would recommend a regular size if you are opting for a snack. Also, do opt for the Liege instead of Brussels if you have never tried the former. Loads of different toppings, mix-n-match and go crazy. In my opinion Caramel + Cashew > Belgian Hot Chocolate + Whipped Cream + Chocochips. Loyalty Offer - Buy 10 Get 1 over a period of 3 months.
address: Royal Meenakshi Mall, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: The waffles are a bit dry and they look good but aren't as delicious in taste. I asked for a second serving of chocolate sauce, which they were happy to provide, but that too did not help. Try with some other toppings and you might have a better luck.
Wonderful place. Had Strawberry Hong Kong and Smoothies with my wife. It was delicious. I'm willing to try Chocolate and Oreo flavours once I visit again. Kudos!
We went to the stall at Vega City Mall. The Oreo shake was good, the cappuccino was okayish. They can improve on the taste, I feel. It can get better with Service as well!

This place is located in Vega City Mall and serves such amazing waffles that you can't hv them just once.  The waffles are so tasty and yummy that you go into a different dimension altogether.  The pricing is very reasonable.  The staff was very courteous.

One of the best wafel houses in Bangalore, an world wide wafle chain now in Bangalore, a wide variety of savouries and coolers to pick from, a completely unique menu , and lip smacking taste , the wafel sandwich was really crisp and on point, The nutella nuts too is highly recommended, i loved it's softness and taste, one of the best restaurants on the Vega City food court . A must visit place for the best wafles in town.
address: 3rd Floor, Food Court, Vega City Mall, Srinivas Industrial Estate, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: I bet this place has a less rating because of the price.  Believe me, their ice creams are all worth it. A word from a sucker for shakes and ice creams.  I've tasted close to 7-8 flavors and sundaes here, and they never disappoint me.  The shakes are also good, but best to head here to try a new flavor every time.  The staff is friendly, polite and very lively. While the ice creams get you in high spirits, the lively staff only heighten the experience.  The decor and seating can be improved.

Cold stone creamery  Suitated in vega city mall, outlet looks cute and good..  I heard they have very good ice cream so I went and took there signature chocolate with peanut butter ice cream tasted like normal ice cream?seriously nothing much to say about it..

This is present in Vega city Mall third floor in the food court. The ice cream's are amazing and one of the tastiest flavours. The ice cream had the new Aquaman sponsor..after finishing the movie couldn't resist to buy that special edition Aquaman ice cream

Tried icecream here at vega city mall. We had sweet cream base icecream with brownie caramel sauce chocolate sauce and nuts. They served in the same concept of beating the icecream with all ingredients. The taste was mediocre... didn't really like the sweet cream base. The size of brownie was as tiny as coin. Can get better over all.

We were out at night and decided to visit this desert shop. We ordered Lave Cake Ice Cream and Litchi IÃ\x83Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x92ve and it was good. It is definitely worth visiting once.
address: 3, Third Floor, Vega City Mall, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: I ordered a chocolate ganache drip cake with a pool table on the cake. I must say the presentation was amazing and it was made exactly how it was in the pictures i sent. Coming to the taste the dark chocolateÃ\x83Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x92s taste went amazingly with the strawberries that were put on the cake for decoration. i would definitely recommend this place to everyone u wont be disappointed
address: Arjun Aura Apartment, Vijaya Bank Layout, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Love their White chocolate fudge.. everyone one loves it.. have ordered it multiple times..very different and delicious All products are delicious, delivered on time.  Plum cake was awesome!!

Was gifted a bake-ooh boxes by my friends. Not happy at all that my subscription is over :(  Super delicious granola bars. The almond-mocha/chocolate ones are my favourite. This place needs your love, people. :)

The next time, you get the craving for sweets & savouries, look no further & order from:  Bakeooh.in  A website that offers a great variety of cookies, brownies, energy bars, cakes & savouries. Their 'Millionaire ShortbreadÃ\x83Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x92, is my personal favourite. It, truly makes you feel like a Millionaire, while the rich cookie, melts away, in your mouth.  They have something for everyone, even those, who watch the calories.  So, what are you waiting for, go check out the website & relish the homemade goodness.  Bakeooh.in  The bakery was started by Nandini & her Mom. All of their products are still made at home.

BAKE - OOH is by far one of the best ever start up in the bakery chain. The mother daughter duo are gifted beyond the ordinary. They have artfully brought delicious home made goodies to our finger tips.  We love their biscuits, cakes, brownies and festive goody boxes because they are healthy, low on fat and sugar, use natural ingredients and are made in hygienic conditions.  Done with rats running around in bakery shelf's!!! Recommend them to people who want the best out of life's sweet moments.
Delicious and healthy snacks. Loved the ragi beetroot brownies, especially the egg-less sugar-less variant. Trail mix is a must with evening tea.
address: 973, 6th Cross, Vijaya Bank Layout, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Went to have dessert.its amazing and pocket friendly plus nice and small cafe.being small it gives u the cozy environment.so do try if u r near around it.
address: 4, 1st Cross, Christ School Road, Bhavani Layout, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: The food was sent in a paper bag without separation. No box was sent. Pathetic service.

Got a six pack of donuts (4+2) under some promotion from here. In taste, presentation and variety, Krispy Kreme stands above all it's competitors. It's my go to for an afternoon snack. The location in the mall is a little inconvenient, but it's not all that bad.
Had awesome chocolate donut and enjoyed the fullest. Bit pricey however quality is great. Would like to try more in the coming days. Kudos!!

Very bad service...never choose home delivery from here. i ordered 6 donuts for around 420rs and got just 2 donuts out of which one wasnÃ\x83Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x92t even the donut i chose they just kept whatever they wanted. It has happened to me not just once but several times whenever these people donÃ\x83Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x92t have the donut ordered by the customer they keep whatever they want and send. Pathetic service

It was decent . However they did not have much options in chocolate . Hope they get more options . Another draw back is they donÃ\x83Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x92t make the donuts fresh nor do they heat the donut . But taste was not that bad .
address: 172/1, 2nd Floor, Vega City Mall, Srinivas Industrial Estate, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: This smoor outlet is relatively newer one. There dine in area is more like a passage with just 5 to 6 high chairs. Currently they are serving only pasteries and chocolates. So i had red velvet naked cake and being a pista lover i had to try out Pista Passion. Both the desserts were good and moist.

Smoor is one place where I love to indulge but this one let me down. First of all, it did not have intensive red velvet cake. Secondly, the seating is way too less and I had to wait before I could get a place. Only good enough to take away not to eat in.

Newly opened place in Vega mall with most of the range of pastries and other baked products available. Yet they did not hv intensive red velvet cake.  As other branches of smoor are, this place is also quite expensive but you can't beat the taste of the products here.
address: 172/1, GF K 03, Kiosk Unit, Vega City Mall, Srinivas Industrial Estate, Bilekahalli, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: This place wowed me. All the sweets are fresh and very tasty. You will definitely be guilty of eating so many carbs but hardly will you be able to resist. Even the snacks served here are A class.

Saw this new place and stepped in to have some evening snacks. Well, brightly lit and being the initial days, all items were fresh and available.. About the snacks :-- - Rasamalai and chenna pies were amazing.. Value for money - Onion pakoda was fresh and crisp. But would have liked to have more onions and less flour in it. -Kachori was average. Found it oily.  Wanted to give a 3.5, but Zomato wasn't allowing me to rate with halves. So rounded  ?
address: No. 4, Arakere Village, Begur Hobli,Bannerghatta Road, opp. Reliance mart, Bengaluru-560078

user_reviews: Milkshake from Keventers hardly disappoint you. Bubblegum Thick Milkshake was yummy and for sure people who love bubblegum will enjoy this one. Not recommended for people who don't like bubble gums. Keventers #milkshake
It's really a wonderful place to have the flavoured and extinguish taste from the shakes. The menu has to be really discovered by one to explore the actual taste.
Good taste
No straw was given along with the milkshakes delivered.
rasmalai shake in classic shake not good very dilueted
address: Upper Ground Floor, 424/376/487 SYNO 63, Royal Meenakshi Mall, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Baskij Robbins is a popular ice cream parlor chain. They have really good flavors. However, ice creams are little hard. And they are not offering anything new, as there a lot of ice cream parlors springing in now, with such innovative ways of preparation. They're just giving scoops for 150-200 , will not be much recommended when you have other parlors in hand, that will some customization for you at a lower rate.
address: Ground Floor, Gopalan Innovation Mall, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: All types of lassi available here, normal lassi, mango lassi, dry fruit lassi. But there are many flies just outside the shop so much so that it becomes unbearable to sit outside and drink. Better go for parcel here.
Not a huge fan of their menu. Slightly overpriced. Could get similar if not better lassis at any normal restaurants. I only visit them, when we crave juices and nothing is really available.
address: DLF Newton, Akshay Nagar, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Iyengar bakery usually produce good quality bakery items. But especially this outlet have some problem I think so because I am not able to taste the same quality. Not a advisable one. Bon Appetite Chef BB  chefbb.in

Khara bun at Iyengar Bakery. 'Nuff said.  If your not local, you must try their Honey cake, cream roll, butter biscuits, khara biscuits and aloo bun. Also, don't forget to get some of their freshly baked bread packed. It will make you forget about firangi spreads like nutella etc. . .its that good!

This place sells a variety of goodies... But the quality of the items in the Bakery is low, either the puff has too much salt or the biscuits made have very little crisp to them ... The cleanliness is good ... All in all everyday maybe a different quality there so beware ... ???
address: 13, Arekere Gate, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore
8A, NS Palya, Near to Girias, Bannerghatta Main Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: I visited ice bowl while I was in royal minakshi mall food court. I was in found of some bevrages. So I visited Ice Bowl tried their milkshake its good in taste. All other they have varites in their menu I tried this time only one milkshake.
One of the few places that still serves the classic Indianised ice cream sundaes! They're really yummy.! And filling.! Also has lassi , kulfi .! Must try for a desert.! ?
address: Food Court, Royal Meenakshi Mall, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Have ordered cakes and puffs a couple of times. The quality is very good. Honey cake is the highlight with honey dripping from the cake...just yum. Packing is also good. Just one suggestion,please include more items. Veg puffs have nice filling inside doesn't have garlic which is a plus for me.Keep up the good work.
address: 3/7, N.G.R Complex, Arekere Main Road, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: This outlet has a very uninformed and impolite staff. They will deny home delivery if it doesn't suit them. The availability of products are limited. And they are indifferent.
No taste in pastries at all. Pineapple pastry is horrible. More like eating sweet cream. No flavour of pineapple at all on cake n cream. Horrible puffs. Full of oil company. Not fresh.

Just Bake is a bakery chain that is spread over all major localities in Bangalore. I had ordered Red Velvet cake and Rusty Rasberry cake from Just Bake for an occasion. The Red Velvet cake was a bit of disappointment as it was not very well prepared. The Raspberry was much better and I liked it. They have so many cakes and other items in their menu and I hope those might be good but I didn't try it.
Excellent tadka preparation. extremely pocket friendly pricing

I ordered fruit cake on my anniversary. I asked for the fruit cake and they had given me the option for fruit cake. When I asked them about the type of fruits, they started giving excuses. Then finally I asked for the mixed fruit cake and requested them to put fruits as many as possible. But they had done opposite. They put sugar as many as possible and make it so sweet that nobody had eaten after the 1st bite. I had to throw the same off. Thanks Just Bake for such memory. Also, dont go on their designs, its too much sugar inside. Not recommending to any one.
address: 10, Ground Floor, Arakere Gate, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Very good ambience and great service and cocktails... Specially Saju made a Pehala Nesha it's was awesome..... Special thanks to Arunachalm and Ajay......

The staffs are very helpful and communicative. It happened to be late at 9:30 pm when my cravings for sweets started and I landed up in Big Mishra's sweet shop.. Variety of sweets presented 10/10 Ambience 9/10 Unfortunately I received sour rashogollas which was smelling, the lencha which is long sized jamun had more sweetness consistency which would be 5/10 Cleanliness 1/10 It can be a one of incident that the sweet I was drooling over was the small ball shaped jamuns which had a hair strand. Cost 7/10 as it seems to be over priced than other shops. Not think of next visit as my love for rashogolla and craving was not up-to my expectations.
address: 116, Royal Residency, Near Sai Baba Temple, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: I ordered one blackforest cake it's good experienced.its unbelievable taste and fully soft sponge,well service their gave in time quickly.we fully enjoyed cake

A very average shop offering cakes and pastries with a good range but sadly not same can be said about the quality. There was better expectation out of the outlet but sadly not only the place is overly priced but also does not live up to the mark. I ordered the red velvet pastry which was too small in size and also was a bit harder than expected. The cream was made perfect but sadly the base was not complimenting it. The service is prompt but the neatness of the place isn't as expected upto standards of a sweet chariot outlet. Food:2.5/5 Cost:2.5/5 Ambience:2/5 Service:3.5/5

Quality is not as expected and I don't think they serve us the fresh baked ones.. I purchased Red velvet cake which was hard and also the birthday message font on the cake was not good.. overall customer satisfaction is average

From out side the cake looks so nice and attractive but the taste and quality is bit poor, for the same price you can provide a better quality cake why because in a birthday party at least 10 people will gather and they will talk about the cake.. and it's bad for you..

Long back , once I have been here along with my cousin , got a chocolate cake .. Cake was just average .. It was OK for us as it was not for any function .. Ambience nd service is average in the shop ..
address: 18/2, Opposite To Reliance Mart, Arakere Gate, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: I tried two of their best sellers. Chocolate flakes pastry and Choco fantasy pastry. Both were really good. But the Choco fantasy pastry was s bit more tastier than the other one.
good service

French loaf Bannerghatta branch is definitely very good in terms of both quality and service. I had placed a last minute cake order at 8pm in night on Sunday and despite their delivery boy was off for the day the counter manager came all the way close to my home to deliver the cake himself at 10.30 at night with no extra cost and was sweet enough to add a pack of candles too. I was totally impressed with their humble attitude. ??Keep it up and all the best... ??You can certainly outdo all other cake shopomment  Like
the croissant was old and brittle. it tasted bad and smelt bad
unsatisfactory..where as per the discussion veg roll was not sent even when I repeated the order.

user_reviews: Every thing is awesome i love rasmali and Bengali sweets I love every day I eat kachori here and the taste is same I'm from Rajasthan and kachori is the same taste

I am having sweets from 10year in this shop i really fell my home taste its very very good i hope they keep sam taste and qulity. You need to make some more iteam such as dry jamun n ect please let me know once they availabe

Excellent Sweet shop, i every seen in any state including Rajasthan from were i am belongs to.... variety of Sweet are traditionally North Indian Dey provide Good Quality, Variety& Staff value of money

We really loved the sweets from ???????. But unfortunately the taste and standard both have drastically deteorated . The jalebies I bought were soggy and the atta laddoos weren't tasty at all. There is only Sugar, hardly any atta and dry fruits. Their samosas and kachories used to be great. But that too are now too spicy and hing flavor dominates them.

Stale food. Ordered gulab jamun and rasgullah from here yesterday and they turned out to be extremely stale and tasteless. Must have been prepared a few days back. Was able to eat only one of each for the purpose of tasting how they are, and after that had to throw the remaining. Waste of money.
address: 86, 5th Main Road, Arekere MICO Layout 2nd stage, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Sure, I eat my feelings, but I save my emotional roller coaster for desserts. And this is my go to place when I am experiencing an emotional turbulence. The moment I have one bite of their cheesecake I forget all my worries. Trust me, it's that good!  This time I ordered the cheesecake (ofcourse) and their chocolate brownie. The brownie also came in hot and was nice and gooey.

It was Just Amazing To Have the Chocolate Fantasy and Pancakes Delivered From Here.  Sweet Truth Is Now My Favourite Dessert Platform Because they Serve The BEST Dessert I have Ever had.  Surely Want to try all their other variants super soon !!

Finest place to have desserts from. Today i tried their chocolate decadence and red velvet pastry.  Chocolate decadence was very smooth and creamy and had perfect sweetness. Red Velvet was also of high qulaity and was very delicious.  Highly recommended. Must give it a try.

Got a chance to review their desserts as a part of food reviewing program  My 3 choices were- Cheesecake Chocolate decadence Choco lava  All three stood way too delicious than my expectations.  Cheesecake- It was so delicate that it broke a little while unpacking it, this can show you how fresh the cake really was!I enjoyed it so much that one was not sufficient for me and hence ended up ordering one more.  Chocolate decadence- Best option for all the chocolate cake lovers. It was fresh, spongy and creamy with nuts on it.  Choco lava- it was hot with gooey centre of the chocolate melt.  Highly recommended- cheesecake (for sure) and chocolate decadence
address: 161 A, First Floor, Vinayaka Nagar, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore
2nd Floor, Gopalan Mall, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Must try Rasmanjuri,Rasmalancha and Kesar chumchum. They are very tasty and no one eat just one. Place is cramped..Never mind take them to home and enjoy these exotic sweets....
Really good variety of sweets. Manjuri, Keer kadham and malpua are my all time favourite from here. They also serve a variety of savouries which are equally yummy. :)
address: Akshayvana Complex, Akshay Nagar Main Road, Near DLF, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Worst quality cakes. Bought a birthday cake (butterscotch flavour) from this place - to call it a cake would be offensive to cakes. The 20% of the abomination that these guys sold, consisted of sponge cake. The remaining 80% was some cream substitute (not real cream, mind you). See the pic attached - the thin sorry mess is the cake. The rest of the "cake" is nothing but a sorry-excuse-for-cream.  The "cream" didn't have the taste, texture or feel of cream that is there in cakes usually. Not even sure if it is fit to eat, as we arent even sure what the "cream" is made of. This is undoubtedly the worst cake I've ever eaten.  Overall, it also had a chemical smell and was hardly palatable. Will never ever visit the place nor recommend to anyone. Please avoid.

Pathetic cakes. If possible would have given a negative rating. Unfortunately Zomato provides rating from 1-5.  Ordered a 2 kg chocolate cake didnt taste like one. On complaining they came in with a 1kg replacement. But that too tasted bad and rough. Post this they didn't even return our calls. No cake no money.  Pathetic cake and pathetic service. Unfortunately I ordered seeing a 4+ rating on Facebook. Please don't get cheated.  Not even worth a try!!!

They serve stale foods... I had a egg puff from here, the worst ever tasted.. it should have been prepared weeks back...  Unhygienic place, happened to see their kitchen... the door wasn't closed.. I stay nearby, 4 buildings apart...
address: 6, 60 Feet Road, Bilekahalli, Near Vijaya Bank Apartment, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: They haven't given me chance to even taste there cake to give a review. I am damn sure that the cake will taste as pathetic as the store attendant and the owners behavior. Extremely arrogant and rude behavior as if they are doing some favor by opening a cake shop in a mall. Never gonna visit this shop and will make sure non of my friend circle and known people will visit them. There are many good cake shops near by which provide excellent cakes with great service.

We ordered a orange butterscotch and strawberry cheesecake which came in a disposable paper plate with a disposable plastic spoon. They don't the facility to dine in but I think at least a chair or two is necessary. The service is quick and good. The strawberry cheesecake didn't appeal to my taste buds at all although the crust was comparatively good.  The orange butterscotch had a very slight flavour of orange which cannot be detected with the heavy butterscotch flavour and it had a layer of mango jelly on the top which spoiled the entire taste. We had to remove the mango jelly to eat the orange butterscotch pastry.  There are better desserts places that provide amazing pastries and other bake goods at almost the same price. I wouldn't recommend this place to anyone who wants to enjoy a decent pastry at a reasonable price.
address: Ground Floor, Gopalan Innovation Mall, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: I ordered DBC from this place and it was absolutely hideous.It was delivered in a torn polythene as if the ice-cream wasn't bad enough.They didn't even try to make it look good forget how it tasted.The ice cream didn't taste fresh and the fudge was worse.Ive ordered and eaten a lot of ice creams but this the WORST one yet .Gotta say the ice cream parlour has really lived up to its name.

Ordered a Tiramisu Sundae. Rs.172 including tax and delivery. There was no Tiramisu in the thing, and it definitely wasn't a "Sundae". Ridiculously small portion size as well. At best it was a small chocolate milkshake with a little bit of ice cream in it. Worth Rs 50-60 max. Highly recommend World on Swirl and The Lassi Shop over this. They have a much better selection of beverages/desserts and much better value for money. This place is a ripoff.

Zomato is a group of robbers. I ordered 4 ice creams from TFI through Zomato and they delivered only 3. When chat with the customer care they said they cant redeliver the same as the system wont allow it. Also they can't  return the money to my original payment mode and can only return to Zomato wallet. This is called robbery. First of all they did not deliver the item and the money I paid they put it in their wallet. End of the day the money which was in my wallet is now in their wallet. Great business. You are corporate thiefs. Idiotic customer care. The idiots at the customer care was not even willing to listen. A bunch of senseless $%^^$$%^^.
Good

user_reviews: Received a pack of 18 signature donuts from a friend. I must say they were more refined than the other donuts and less sugary. And they were small pop donuts, making it easier to have more variety. Though they all tasted good, but I feel the tastes can be a little more disntictive, especially the chocolate variants.

Ordered assorted doughnuts, pack of 6, buy 5 and get one free. Ordered via Zomato after selecting 6 flavours, got a call back immediately that 3 out of 6 flavours I chose aren't available and I should choose some other flavours because I HAVE ALREADY PAID !!  I don't get it, there's no value in compensating the customer in India. Customer should buy what I offer !!!  Anyways, got 6 assorted doughnuts in no time and every single doughnut was just awesome. Soft, fluffy and great flavour. I usually do not like doughnuts but these were too good.  My report card Price Ã\x83Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x96 5/10 Taste Ã\x83Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x96 8/10 Portion size - 7/10 Delivery time - 8/10 Value for money Ã\x83Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x96 7/10 Will I go back Ã\x83Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x96 Absolutely

user_reviews: Zero degree is right below Subway in bannerghatta road very close to Apollo hospital serving good sandwiches, burgers, wraps, hot dogs, fries, ice creams including sundaes, mocktails etc.  What all items tried?  1. Spicy grilled chicken sandwich 2. Mutton burger 3. Khatta meetha ice cream 4. Cherry bomb milk shake, 5. Coffee 6. Coffee couplet sundae 7. Shahi gulab ice cream scoop 8. Lychee caramel ice cream scoop  What you must try here?  I loved the mutton burger. Priced at 130 is worth it. Try the coffee couplet sundae too, it tastes great and for coffee lovers it is a must. Filter coffee flavor is great, however do modify it as per your taste.  Overall, the ambience is good for an ice cream parlor, presentation is decent. One needs to have patience to wait for the food to be served.    cupcakesontravel.blogspot.com

You can never imagine that there is this place beyond that glass door. You will be amazed to see the decor inside. They have a top notch ambience for a cafe. They basically serves all day breakfast/snacks menu. Their Ice Creams are very special. They have all natural ice creams. The most famous ice creams are Tamarind and Pineapple Pudding. We tried both and they were excellent. I have tried Tamarind ice cream earlier but this one is amde perfect with blending sweet and sour taste of tamarind upto the mark. Their sandwiches are also really good. Also they serves the mocktails. Cherry Bomb is the mocktail we tried. It was very refreshing and taste very unique. They have unique way to prepare and also it is a secret. Overall the cafe is one of the best to try in this area . The ambience and food both are great here.
address: Opposite IIMB, Krishnaraju Layout, Sundar Ram Shetty Nagar, Bilekahalli Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

We have ordered cakes on few occasions from Cake-O-Mania and never been disappointed. Jalpa takes care of the finest details and it has always been a good experience with her. One more good thing here is we also get healthy cakes made of wheat and ragi. Will surely order again.
I have tired cake o mania once and it's absolutely great! The chocolate cake pops were perfect and looked super cute too. Hope to indulge in some more of the deliciousness soon! :)

user_reviews: The Choco-Pie cookie is a must try. The molded orange chocolate bars are also delicious. One of the best chocolate shops I've seen in Bangalore. Will be glad to visit again. :)
I liked the Dark chocolates. It's one of the best i have tasted till now. i liked the almond dark chocolate too. I would definitely recommend people to try this place.

The sugar free chocolate was what caught my attention. It's perfect for those calorie conscious people who want to binge on chocolates once in a while. Not at all sweet but a tad buttery, this chocolate is worth its cost. Ps: ooty homemade chocolates are one of the best chocolates out there.
Bangalore lacked a place for good chocolates  and this is One of the most Delicious chocolates i have tasted till now... Keep it up guys .. Go chocolatiers..  :)

Best Home made chocolate shop in Bangalore till now !! Superior Quality taste & Cheaper in rates as compare to other shops like Ooty chocolates - what else u need !  Have been here around 7 times , tasted around all the flavours , they are the best I can say !
address: Third Floor, Royal Meenakshi Mall, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Nice place... good shakes and the burger is also nice here, nice atmosphere , music ?? , its fresh and it looks good... you should try it.

sad burgers and popcorns the price is equally good there is no fillings looks like breads and the chicken cutlet is put together no taste at all..they need to work on it otherwise this won't work longer...the packaging is worse

were skeptical ordering burger from here but to my surprise the burgers n fries were worth. Even the milk shake was nice to taste so other than McDonald we also have this cafe to order from and they were quicker then McDonald

Ordered food from cafe Indiana last Friday. I wasn't sure about there quality so dint order burger and just ordered few sides like nuggets, cheese finger etc. and litchi shakes. Nuggets and cheese fingers and French fries were good. Shake was lil on the sweeter side. Overall decent enough! Will order burger next time.
Need to improvise on the burger. the variety needs to shaken up a little bit.   The patty looked like it was soaked in oil.
address: 1&2 Pai Layout, Hulimavu, Bannerghatta Main Road, Next to Christ University, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: As fancy as it looks, their ice creams are absolute delight to your sweet cravings. Tried Desi paan, salted caramel and ras-mishti-lai and loved each one of them. They are camped in JP Nagar 7th phase these days. Do give your taste buds a joyous ride.

I've been here a couple of times, tried Paan, Salted Caramel and Ras Mishti Lai (Rasgulla) Ice cream and all are amazing! It's an instant icecream made with liquid nitrogen and this cute little truck is doing an amazing job serving the best ice creams in town!
Delicious Taste, Awesome people, Very Unique, Best ice cream was Chocolate Peanut butter which was recommended by people in the store and best part was Ice Dragon... ?
We ordered a mango frozen yogurt and liked the taste. It wasn't the authentic taste but was a welcome change. Its a small yet very clean outlet.

At the Karle SEZ, on a sunny summer day in barren Bangalore, Frosty Creams food truck showed up. Liquid nitrogen ice cream is their  USP so to beat the heat, HR Gal and I had the coconut creme and chocolate classic.  The ice cream is made then and there, right before your very eyes, with a certain amount of dramatic flair when the nitrogen vapour emanates from the cup. My coconut creme was creamy and covered with colored edible confetti, which was quite pretty to look at. HR Gal's chocolate classic was predictably pleasing.  Each ice cream averages INR 120ish in price and the two of ours cost us INR 220. For the  ice cream enthusiast, this is novelty in your mouth.
address: Location Varies, Bangalore

user_reviews: It is a small cafe with big ambience. Place is decorated very nice. They have used each and every inches perfect. The wall paintings are appealing. The concept their is thick shakes under categories of Fruit base, Chocolate Base and Waffle Base. The chocolate ones are the best. I specially liked them. Fruit base which is called Frolicks is also good. They have Pizza, Sandwiches and Grills. The best one was Sandwich. Their Veg Chese is the best sandwich I ever had. Nothing can beat it. Overall the cafe is good place for Couples and Familly. Must try for chocolate lovers.

Very nice ambience. The look and feel of restaurant is very nice. They have yellow chairs which gives you throwback. Walls are painted very nice. Their speciality is chocoholicks. It is known as cad b in Pune amd Mumbai. Their sandwiches are the best i ever had.

I used to visit this cafe almost evening during my office hours. Their frolicks are tooo delicious. Try their crusher, crunchy and choco rocks frolicks ;) Me and colleagues also tried their Sandwiches, french fries and garlic bread, everything was upto the mark. Now, i have to shift to new office so wont be able to visit this cafe. Staff is also very courteous.
address: A-3, Ranka Colony Road, Bilakhalli, Bannerghatta Road
5 Sri Basavasai, Nilaya, Kodichikkanahalli Road, Opposite Sana Super Market, Bilekahalli, BG Road, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

Appearance can do a lot more than what we think. Looking at that chocolate monster shake made me drool for a while. Coming to the taste. It was good. But the only thing you'll like about it is how they present it. Recommended to taste it once.  Price: 209/-

The look is good n not the feel is what took me back. They are good at presenting it however the taste goes just flat. Took kitkat shake n wasnÃ\x83Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x92t a tad bit amused.

It's in Vega mall Food court. Good choice of juice, ice creams, kulfi's. Tried their mixed fruit parfaits, it's too good. Bit pricy, but worthy.

user_reviews: This is their second outlet in the city, the first one located near Brigade Millenium.  The owner Nanda is a nice chap who is happy to assist you in customizing your cake exactly as you want it to be. They have some yummy snacks that are quite affordably priced as well. The only downside of this place is the location. They provide free home delivery and office delivery also. Great choice for corporate events and birthday parties.  Do try their snacks and specially the butter cookies.
Surprisingly not many varieties of cakes were available in shop! When tried out few cakes available, no complaints as such. It appears this shop is yet to go full fledged, will give a try again.

user_reviews: What can someone write about some of the specific places like Starbucks or CCD. But still there are lot of other things to consider about the outlet. 3 star rating is because of the service. Its like some of the generic things to be taken care of which i felt were not upto the expectation. If someone asks for a cold coffee, it better be cold instead of being served with a normal coffee. Chillness of the coffee enhances the taste for it. Basically what i am trying to say out here is they didnt take care of the temperature of coffee be it hot or cold. In other outlets this is not the case. Hot coffee is exactly how it needs to be and the same is with cold.

Bakasura gives it a five just for the free stuff. BOGO was on, ordered a chocolate milkshake. Thinking i'll be getting one more. That's two all together. But they get me 4 all together and the delivery guy says "enjoy sir". The shake was amazing too as usual, but yes you get a special mention. kudos.

Located in a calm and quiet locality opposite to the garden. Staff is courteous but they don't listen carefully to our order. During evenings the place seems a bit crowded. Best time to visit is morning.

Doesn't have such lovely cakes as their competitors but not too bad also..They have multiple branches along with cakes they sell snacks too and bakery items.Wish for the price they sold a little richer cakes were sold

We informed the same but no much reaction from the person on the counter.  Dear Multicakes owner, please don't play with the health of the people.  ***************PEOPLE DON'T VISIT THIS PLACE*********

user_reviews: Ordered rajbhog kulfi "family" pack and got a box that literally fit between my fingers. Expected much more for 355 rupees. Forget the family, this wasn't sufficient even for one person. Also the MRP mentioned inside the pack was 250 rupees and I was charged 355 rupees and 20 rupees for delivery.

A bit costly place but no replacement for this nearby the outlet. Falooda is a must have here and the malai kulfi is so flavourful. Sitafal kulfi on the other hand i did not found it to be that great but other kulfis are. Kulfi falooda is great but its so costly there is lassi shop nearby where you can have kulfi falooda but not as good as this so if you dont bother about cost then you should have it at asharfilal or else go for the lassi shop

Asharfilal Kulfi - near DLF new town is a tuck shop for ice cream and kulfi. This place is well lighted and clean next to Krishna Kuteera.  Seating and Parking  It doesn't have a place to sit and park your vehicle. For vehicle parking you can park on road as long as there is some space.  These guys have kept few stools to sit down and enjoy kulfi.      Our Kulfi  We had Pista and Regular Malai Kulfi. Kulfi was good but did not find it to be fresh. Our kulfi was brittle and hard not as smooth as it should be.    Recommendation: Enjoy the kulfi, it is a good place to grab sweet post lunch and dinner.  letmecookfood.blogspot.com

Totally amazing ... the small shop offers really yummy kulfi's ... such creamy ku?fi's, divine taste amazing flavours ... variety really surprised me but the quality is simply superb !!! A must visit for Ice cream lovers ...

small place..Good for pickup/parcel...Must try Mewa chowpati and natural malai.They are the best. Dont go for rose coconut its worse.BPK is kind of okay.Mewa is the best of the lot. Dont eat it frozen allow some time for the chilness to come down.  Edit 1 ********  Kulfi choco bar is too good. It gived taste of chocolatr and chowpati kulfi.
address: No 19/3C, Next to Krishna Kuteera Restaurant ,Avani Shringeri Nagar, Near Nano Hospital, Begur Hobli, Bangalore, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Yummy ice creams and friendly staff. Make it a point to visit this place every time I am in Vijaya bank layout. Love the chilly guava flavour and can have it any number of times. The chocolate flavoured ice cream is good too. There are several other flavours including Pani puri and mango among others but love the chilli guava ice cream the best.

Ice Cream lover should try this place right? Yeah ! Finally it happened :) We tried Jack Fruit,Fererorocher,Litchie,Guava,Coconut Ice creams from here .  I don't want to elaborate much here because each ans every ice cream i tried is awsome and natural.I found another brand before but after trying this made me to give Winner Title..I loved all the flavours i tried .  I wanna try more so will start to try all from the menu soon.  NB: Never go out from this Quality #apsaraicecream.  VFM:4.5/5 Taste:4.5/5

Combination of perfect sweetness and awesome flavor. A ice cream parlour worth drooling. Couldn't stop myself for trying some amazing flavors. Best- Chilli guava, Ferraro crust and berry blast. Would love to visit again and again.
2 flavours that stand out - Guava and Masala Chai. What makes guava extraordinary is some red chilli powder sprinkled on top. Super unique and delicious.
address: 1065 B, 5th Cross, Vijaya Bank Layout, Bilekahalli, Bannerghatta Road, Bangalore

user_reviews: Had this place on my bucket list for quite some time. I have been observing this place from a mediocre rating to rise to a 4+ rating. Coming to the restaurant itself honestly was not blown away by the ambience. The menu Is cleverly designed incorporating wizardry acronyms. The food is also quite tasty and well presented. The prices are economical. A good place to chill with your friends for a few hours.

Happened to drop in to this place without much of an expectation. First to notice was the pleasing ambience. This place is on the first floor, with a Harry Potter theme set up. With a menu that needs time to grasp and order, the food also was as good as the ambience. Overall, would recommend you to visit this place. Worth your time spent.

I like how the first floor is conveniently converted into the cafe. I loved the fact that this cafe has a theme and what makes it better is that it is Harry Potter themed. The names of the dishes served here are very catchy and the food here is great. Lovely place to visit with friends.

Lovely wizard ambience of Harry Potter ....loved the place . They have placards to take photos ...food is also tasty.  Ordered white slime soup , jack o runner chicken in grapes and chicken just ....yummy ....lamb and cheese in red sauce and cats ....all dishes were good , cheesy and yummy. Will go once again ...

A cosy place to hangout with friends and colleagues. The ambience is very thrilling along with the menu. Though the names will cause tingle to your throat but the taste will be a contentment for ones soul. We ordered for a wide variety of dishes which were all served hot and fresh within a decent wait time. Quantity of the dishes were value for money. The staffs are very courteous and will help in figuring out the dishes in details. Do spent some time in the menu and you will end up spending quality time munching some mouth watering food. The beverages are also worth mentioning. Our menu included: Bloody Bruschetta, Flying Faith, Flit Flat, Mumble Munch, Fire from the Forest, Dragons Diary, Warlocks Wrath and Ghosts Gluttony. I'm eagerly waiting to try the other dishes soon.
address: 39, 15th Cross, Besides HDFC Bank, 4th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: A small and a warm cafÃ\x83Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x83Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82ÃÂ© with lots of friendly vibes. Located near the delmia circle in JP Nagar is this newly opened Cafe with lots of potential. Yes, this is also pet friendly with a small section just for them!  You can get whole lot of interesting books here to read or probably bring your own book of choice and enjoy with your food.  Coming to the food, it was really good and they are always up for suggestions and feedback if it's not upto the mark.  Some of my favorites were the nostalgia drink which is a unique combination of complan, hot chocolate and cocoa. Then the square shaped pizza's which were cheesy and very affordable as well. The pasta and sandwiches were also really good which was really soothing. All the bread is made in-house which is really soft and tasty.  I'm giving an extra star just for the amazing service and hospitality given by the owners here. Definitely a must visit for people residing nearby JP Nagar area.

Nice place which a pet friendly nook inside the cafe ... there is no place for the dogs to play or walk around ... we ordered for burger which was unique but tasted ok and burji pav ... may or may not visit the cafe again ... they also have books if you wanna read ...

Had a really great time at Slate Cafe, new outlet in JP Nagar. Aesthetic and very comforting ambience, The food was delicious and the staff was very hospitable, had a very positive experience in a long time, also it is pet friendly. Until next time, cheers! :)
address: 5th Cross Road, Dollar Layout, 3rd Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: If you are located within 5km of this place then you might know that there were are not many buffet options in this area so this is a very good option nearby without driving too far in traffic.  The 25 items variety mentioned in the menu section are definitely served. about 8 varieties of icecreams flavours.  Value for money.  You may go on weekdays to avoid crowds.

Ambiance of this place is really nice. We visited during the weekday and it was very quiet and calm. Food wise it was tasty as well. Variety wise not very large buffet spread but very neatly maintained. A little difficult to locate the place if you are not familiar with the area. Always use maps.

Warm ambience, Spacious area, plenty parking, unlimited food, good food. You can't possibly fault this place which probably ticks all boxes quite neatly. The buffet spread was pretty wide and you can go crazy with the 8 ice cream flavors alone! Try each and you'll have yoir last penny's worth already!.  A must visit for family dos and as well as a silent outing. Can't really say if there's anything wrong with the place.

Serene ambience, almost open space covered with lot of plants. Really a green place. Good place for corporate or group. Friendly staff. Mango greens is branch of Mango tree, Green for vegetarian buffet and Tree for non veg buffet. Liked the concept of seperating veg and non veg Buffets. Usual trend of review is to start with starters, but main course in this restaurant has topped over starters. Liked texture and taste. Akki Rotti and Ragi Rotti were today's special roti, to be frank these roties were really fresh and tasty. Overall good starters, good main course, good desserts. And fresh fruits. Liked it?

Nice place filled with lot of green plants , trees and open space ... food is clean and comfortable, we had mushroom italic , broccoli soup both turned out to be great, main course was a bit let down with too much of tomato curry over powering all other spice ... staff is friendly
address: 99/4, Nataraja Layout, 7th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: How does one cope with the Blues..?? My answer has always been Desserts Desserts Desserts ? ?  Received Red Velvet Cupcakes on one such day, and you guys can imagine the smile on my face ??  ??\u200d?? What TummyTumms Liked..?? Ã\x83Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82Ã\x95 Very Fresh. user_reviews: The pizza tastes good but the quantity showed in the picture and given is totally opposite. The layer of the Pizza including topping was so thin. I would never recommend this cafe if u are a foodie. U'll be disappointed for sure. It's not worth the money!!!
I had been to this place. Tried new varieties of pizza, one can get authentic taste of italian food at reasonable price here. Good place to take family too. Must try.

user_reviews: I knew this was going to be a good experience right off the bat - for the care that went into packing the food for a delivery order was clearly visible. It was proper! There was zero spillage, as it happens with most dessert orders. I ordered for an English Tosca Sundae, the quantity was generous and so was it for the chocolate sauce which came in a separate jar. I never really ran out of the sauce, and had enough to continue pouring onto the never ending bowl of sundae!

One of the finest place to have Ice Cream ?  They have very good varieties of ice cream, milk shake, pastries and service is very good?  Ambience is very pleasant to chill with friends ??  They have live counter and pleasure to see how they prepare the ice Cream roll?  I just loved the roll over ice cream and it was so delicious and yummy..  I took devil chocolate chip it was well garnished and looking so cute?

They have a great selection of ice creams and sundaes. They have fries available with a variety of dips. I tried the irish coffee love from the gourmet plates section which came with irish coffee rolls, tiramisu cake and a cup of chocolate which was thick and rich,though the cake could use a little more flavour the ice cream was good. The place is very clean and perfect for family visits and hangouts.

Nice presentation by some skilled people. I guess we tried smoor sundae and devils chocolate... One had a huge jelly piece while the other had low quality chocolate sauce and ice cream. Menu was missing kid friendly and non dry fruit and fresh fruit ice cream options. Desserts quality was slightly low when compared with the lights of cream Stone or corner house or stoner. Can do better!

They have a nice setup on jp nagar to puttenhalli road.. Took a caramel chocolate based Sunday and a paan flavor roll!! Ambience is nice and the paan ice cream was nice and had real sweet supari which gave a nice fresh flavour. The ice cream sundae was okok
address: 10, Ground Floor, 24th Main, Ayodhya Nagar, 5th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Got this delicious paan banaras which is a must have here. the quality of gulkand was fresh and the guy topped it with some extra dates and almonds to seal the deal for me. Only con: the cup size should have been a little bigger. This brings down the last star!
Ambience was good but not that spacious A nice themed with a monkey pic Stoned ice creams are little overpriced but presentation was k.the other branch was better compered to this I felt.

Presentation and taste are two things that matter to all connoisseurs of food. But if you can only choose one of those two, most of us would choose the latter. This is something stoned monkey can pay a little more attention to.

I am giving 2 only because of ice cream. I feel everything is overpriced.  Ordered nachos and ice cream from here online. They simply cheated because it was online delivery.  There was nothing in nachos when in the description it is mentioned baked beans, onions, tomatoes n all other veggies. They have put carrot, capsicum peels and little mayonnaise and Even nachos was not at all crispy. Very disappointed.  And ice cream (Date the nuts) was actually good. It was full of nuts, dry fruits. Worth having.
Open late at night. A decent place for deserts. Bit overpriced though. Lavalicious is a must try here. The person taking at the counter should be a bit more interactive

user_reviews: It's a bungalow converted into cafe having outdoor garden sitting as well as indoor sitting They have there own bakery  Food and drinks we just ok nothing so special ! It seems they take small party orders as well  If u want quite n serene ambience , then this is the place for u in that part of town  Food 3/5. Ambience 3.5/5 Service 3.5/5 Pricing 3.5/5  Overall 3/5

A cute little cafÃ\x83Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x83Ã\x83Ã\x82Ã\x82ÃÂ© to relax and enjoy some coffee and food. Just like any other regular cafe. The chicken nuggets and fries are good! The ambience is lovely too. A bit pricey for the quantity but definitely worth a visit.

Though I see this place almost everyday never bothered to try it..finally today got the opportunity and I must admit this is a great option if you want to grab a quick bite along with a cold or hot beverage. Menu is simple an option of veg and non veg quick bites, salads and soups, sandwiches & burgers, pasta and pizzas.  We had the broccoli soup, veggie salad, veg burger and a veg pizza along with lime soda. Service is reasonably quick, food is yummy and portions adequate. Loved the veg pizza. Service is friendly and there is both outdoor and indoor seating arrangements. Will definitely recommend and will revisit.

Well..the place has an outside sitting and an inside sitting as well.. Like many Banglorean restaurants the place is a house converted into a cafe  The ambience was nice in garden and the service was quick. Food..I was lured by Desserts pics... Food was not that great but I loved the rainbow pastry.(forgot the name :P) , the chicken starter was not that great. Grilled sandwich was okish  Its a nice place if u want hangout with friends and chit chat.  Ambience :3.5 Service :4 Food :2.5

This residential house turned into restaurant is located on the busy roads of JP nagar. The lawn is converted has the sit out area, for which my full marks goes. Have tasted chicken puff, egg puff, pastry and pasta here. This is one of our regular visit adda quiet and calm place. Service and taste is also satisfactory.
address: 8, 15th Main, 5th Phase, JP Nagar, Bangalore

user_reviews: Ordered customised cake on husband's birthday. We were happy with the taste. Also tasted their chicken puff from snacks corner , that was tasty too.

Booked for cake for sister birthday party. And pastries are awesome with their taste and delivery. Thinking to visit again and again for next friends birthday party.

Staff here is very rude. And also I felt pricing for cakes are high. And not as fresh as ammas pastry in Jaynagar. Hands down to this shop. Even though it is near to my house. I will prefer to go to jayanagar shop. At least the quality of the cake is guaranteed.

user_reviews: Ordered Whiskey flavored Cup cake and Chocolate for Christmas celebration @ office. Everyone liked it and it was very tasty!! Timely delivery and good followup with good packaging..
Best cake place..Beat place to order eggless cake..ppl in Bangalore should try this place...Taste s delicious..Red velvet cake awesome..Must

hey!!! all you guys out there, please don't give a second thought before ordering from this place. I ordered an ice cream cake for my husbands first birthday and I wanted it to be special, I crossed my fingers and ordered from this place. Inspite of heavy rainfall in Bangalore on saturday and my house being in an isolated place in whitefield they managed to deliver it in time without any hassle. The delivery guy was too good with the directions. And the cake was amazing to taste. We all loved it. Thank you team for making this surprise the best one and for having such a professional approach.

I ordered online and the guy delivered the cake at exact time which I requested for. The cake was tasty but the brownie layer was a bit hard which could have been soft and also the presentation could have been better. Price is also very high But the taste is worth trying once.

user_reviews: Bangalore is well versed with concept of ice cream bashing. Numbers of similar concept outlets are open but not everyone is good, that includes Cream Stone. The ambiance is set that of a restaurant with sofas and table...? Usually ice cream parlor has to have a vibrant and cute ambiance. The person who takes the order in the cash counter is not well versed with menu and is slow. We had Dry fruit delight, Choco Hazel, Strawberry , Coffee Craze and Chilli Guava. Dry fruit delight was the only ice cream that was good. Rest all were not upto the mark. Chilli guava tasted bad and other 3 was mediocre. Cream stone does have potential but needs to improve in presentation and develop there own identity.

Ordered from Cream Stone for delivery couple of days ago. The order reached on time and was extremely well packed.   We ordered the Fruit Bonanza, Caramel Nuts and the Brownie Delight. The Fruit Bonanza tasted more like blended tutti-fruity. It was good in taste though, a bit sweeter than expected. The Brownie Delight was also decent. But the Caramel Nuts was out of the world. The caramel was smooth with the creamy icecream. The presence of nuts was almost negligible which was a bit disappointing. It looks very small from the outside but the inside is pretty large and cozy, they have fantastic range of ice creams and waffles. It's very creamy and fruity, we tried the waffle ice cream sundae with salted caramel ice cream, the waffle was good and complimented the ice cream flavour.

This cafe is pet friendly and the staff are kind and welcoming. Though the food takes a little time to reach you, as they say... good things come to those who wait. It is a great place for sweets and they are pretty good here. The kachori and samosas are really good. If they open a proper chat counter then it will be amazing as they are Delhi based.

Location - A little ahead of Big Bazaar, JP Nagar 7th Phase. Ambiance - Spacious. A neat and tidy place.
